86|a7345d|    // MARK: - Enhanced Fold Detection
87|b4687f|    
88|04d736|    /// Detects all foldable regions in the given code
89|573286|    func detectFoldableRegions(in code: String, filePath: String? = nil) {
90|aeaa84|        self.currentFilePath = filePath
91|73450d|        self.currentFileId = filePath
92|d6ed84|        
93|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
94|fa1808|        var regions: [FoldRegion] = []
95|d6ed84|        
96|69e2fe|        // Track different types of blocks
97|1fae8b|        var blockStack: [(type: FoldRegion.FoldType, startLine: Int, label: String?)] = []
98|57aa0f|        var commentStack: [(startLine: Int, isMultiline: Bool)] = []
99|c5b1d1|        var regionStack: [(startLine: Int, label: String)] = []
100|adc83b|
101|ff8cec|        // If we detect a declaration/function/control-flow whose opening brace is on a later line,
102|724e06|        // we mark that brace line so it won't be treated as a standalone generic block.
103|945b20|        var braceLinesClaimed: Set<Int> = []
104|adc83b|
105|cce061|        // Used to prevent duplicate regions for grouped constructs (imports, // comments)
106|0cdafa|        var previousNonEmptyWasImport = false
107|8a6567|        var previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
108|d6ed84|        
109|035521|        for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
110|ec6750|            let trimmed = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
111|8a2732|            let leadingWhitespace = line.prefix { $0 == " " || $0 == "\t" }.count
112|3070d1|            
113|4be2b3|            // Skip empty lines for most detections
114|94f56f|            guard !trimmed.isEmpty else { continue }
115|adc83b|
116|096595|            // MARK: - Close blocks BEFORE opening new ones (handles "} else {" correctly)
117|3c0070|            if trimmed.hasPrefix("}") {
118|f8c18c|                // Count consecutive leading '}' so we can pop multiple blocks for lines like "}}"
119|7f8903|                let closeCount = max(1, trimmed.prefix { $0 == "}" }.count)
120|539d99|                for _ in 0..<closeCount {
121|75d4ef|                    if let lastBlock = blockStack.popLast() {
122|23d31e|                        if index - lastBlock.startLine > 1 {
123|9008b5|                            regions.append(FoldRegion(
124|c6f153|                                startLine: lastBlock.startLine,
125|419111|                                endLine: index,
126|b1c048|                                type: lastBlock.type,
127|b802b0|                                label: lastBlock.label
128|b6c95b|                            ))
129|392b35|                        }
130|c9717a|                    }
131|4e2d32|                }
132|a7dc16|            }
133|3070d1|            
134|454897|            // MARK: - Region Detection (#region, #pragma mark, MARK:)
135|18ca54|            if let label = detectRegionStart(trimmed) {
136|77dbe9|                regionStack.append((index, label))
137|a9d0ef|            } else if detectRegionEnd(trimmed) {
138|24137d|                if let region = regionStack.popLast() {
139|58d5c1|                    if index - region.startLine > 1 {
140|22c663|                        regions.append(FoldRegion(
141|626a73|                            startLine: region.startLine,
142|46d058|                            endLine: index,
143|b9c772|                            type: .region,
144|06e9cb|                            label: region.label
145|78dc58|                        ))
146|c9717a|                    }
147|4e2d32|                }
148|a7dc16|            }
149|3070d1|            
150|b80509|            // MARK: - Import Statement Detection (group consecutive imports once)
151|25e1cc|            if trimmed.hasPrefix("import ") {
152|7054bb|                if !previousNonEmptyWasImport {
153|a670fd|                    let importEnd = findConsecutiveImports(from: index, in: lines)
154|83c6e4|                    if importEnd > index {
155|22c663|                        regions.append(FoldRegion(
156|0dc011|                            startLine: index,
157|83c660|                            endLine: importEnd,
158|c870dd|                            type: .importStatement,
159|3afe11|                            label: "Imports"
160|78dc58|                        ))
161|c9717a|                    }
162|4e2d32|                }
163|8edb98|                previousNonEmptyWasImport = true
164|f5a6eb|            } else {
165|cd6ad3|                previousNonEmptyWasImport = false
166|a7dc16|            }
167|3070d1|            
168|9e2e57|            // MARK: - Comment Detection
169|d91d6c|            if detectCommentStart(trimmed) {
170|de49a5|                commentStack.append((index, true))
171|0b3758|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
172|08da46|            } else if trimmed.starts(with: "//") {
173|058130|                // Only create a fold region at the start of a consecutive // block
174|d2441e|                if !previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment {
175|a2e79c|                    let commentEnd = findConsecutiveComments(from: index, in: lines)
176|1111e2|                    if commentEnd > index {
177|22c663|                        regions.append(FoldRegion(
178|0dc011|                            startLine: index,
179|03f2b5|                            endLine: commentEnd,
180|64e6ca|                            type: .comment,
181|0e7feb|                            label: "Comment"
182|78dc58|                        ))
183|c9717a|                    }
184|4e2d32|                }
185|cda61a|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = true
186|fd1885|            } else if detectCommentEnd(trimmed) {
187|0b3758|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
188|e33d82|                if let comment = commentStack.popLast() {
189|bf0471|                    if index - comment.startLine > 1 {
190|22c663|                        regions.append(FoldRegion(
191|d5b0c0|                            startLine: comment.startLine,
192|46d058|                            endLine: index,
193|64e6ca|                            type: .comment,
194|0e7feb|                            label: "Comment"
195|78dc58|                        ))
196|c9717a|                    }
197|4e2d32|                }
198|f5a6eb|            } else {
199|0b3758|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
200|a7dc16|            }
201|3070d1|            
202|3d946d|            // MARK: - Class/Struct/Enum/Protocol/Extension Detection
203|2f1070|            if let declaration = detectDeclaration(trimmed) {
204|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
205|2b937f|                    blockStack.append((declaration.type, index, declaration.label))
206|fdd0e2|                } else {
207|7ec133|                    // Declaration without opening brace - look ahead for it
208|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
209|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)
210|c09b95|                        blockStack.append((declaration.type, index, declaration.label))
211|c9717a|                    }
212|4e2d32|                }
213|a7dc16|            }
214|3070d1|            
215|9273f4|            // MARK: - Function/Method Detection
216|8fb15a|            if let functionInfo = detectFunction(trimmed) {
217|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
218|072276|                    blockStack.append((.function, index, functionInfo))
219|fdd0e2|                } else {
220|ca50d4|                    // Function without opening brace - look ahead
221|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
222|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)
223|568400|                        blockStack.append((.function, index, functionInfo))
224|c9717a|                    }
225|4e2d32|                }
226|a7dc16|            }
227|3070d1|            
228|1e5bf2|            // MARK: - Control Flow Detection (if, guard, for, while, switch, etc.)
229|6b5dd6|            if let controlFlowLabel = detectControlFlow(trimmed) {
230|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
231|cb4212|                    blockStack.append((.controlFlow, index, controlFlowLabel))
232|fdd0e2|                } else {
233|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
234|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)
235|648280|                        blockStack.append((.controlFlow, index, controlFlowLabel))
236|c9717a|                    }
237|4e2d32|                }
238|a7dc16|            }
239|3070d1|            
240|b850f8|            // MARK: - Generic Block Detection
241|83f6cf|            // Avoid adding a generic block for a standalone "{" that belongs to a previously detected declaration.
242|bcf366|            if trimmed.hasSuffix("{"),
243|bd639e|               trimmed != "{",
244|f372eb|               !braceLinesClaimed.contains(index),
245|097ec3|               !isDeclarationLine(trimmed),
246|747356|               !isFunctionLine(trimmed) {
247|d74eec|                blockStack.append((.genericBlock, index, nil))
248|a7dc16|            }
249|adc83b|
250|caca44|            _ = leadingWhitespace // keep param for potential future heuristics
251|5f3077|        }
252|d6ed84|        
253|a60e7c|        // Handle any remaining unclosed blocks
254|193bf7|        while let lastBlock = blockStack.popLast() {
255|30813f|            if lines.count - 1 - lastBlock.startLine > 1 {
256|e50ab8|                regions.append(FoldRegion(
257|42046c|                    startLine: lastBlock.startLine,
258|a646f4|                    endLine: lines.count - 1,
259|68bd66|                    type: lastBlock.type,
260|2cb6f6|                    label: lastBlock.label
261|2188d8|                ))
262|a7dc16|            }
263|5f3077|        }
264|d6ed84|        
265|da4698|        // Sort regions by start line
266|e60f91|        regions.sort { $0.startLine < $1.startLine }
267|d6ed84|        
268|5f2f76|        self.foldRegions = regions
269|d6ed84|        
270|3b484c|        // Store regions in the per-file dictionary
271|8c6b47|        if let fileId = currentFileId {
272|823f0a|            foldRegionsByFile[fileId] = regions
273|5f3077|        }
274|d6ed84|        
275|83ae12|        // Restore previous fold state for this file
276|f7b7e9|        if let filePath = filePath {
277|b86c9c|            restoreFoldState(for: filePath)
278|5f3077|        }
279|d6ed84|        
280|08ca44|        updateCollapsedLines()
281|27e597|    }
282|b4687f|    
283|f96bbc|    // MARK: - Detection Helper Methods
284|b4687f|    
285|d80e09|    private func detectRegionStart(_ line: String) -> String? {
286|2a6674|        // C# / VS style regions
287|1989c4|        if line.hasPrefix("#region") {
288|08b9aa|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#region")
289|94d9b5|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Region"
290|5f3077|        }
291|39fca1|        // Objective-C pragma marks
292|667815|        if line.hasPrefix("#pragma mark") {
293|4621b4|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#pragma mark")
294|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
295|5f3077|        }
296|ccd53a|        // Swift MARK comments
297|b5e23f|        if line.contains("MARK:") {
298|504937|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "MARK:")
299|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
300|5f3077|        }
301|c9afee|        // TODO/FIXME regions
302|453092|        if line.contains("TODO:") {
303|a4bc68|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "TODO:")
304|5b14a7|            return "TODO: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
305|5f3077|        }
306|92ac0a|        if line.contains("FIXME:") {
307|0b0cff|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "FIXME:")
308|218d1e|            return "FIXME: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
309|5f3077|        }
310|c2ae65|        return nil
311|27e597|    }
312|b4687f|    
313|c62450|    private func detectRegionEnd(_ line: String) -> Bool {
314|6c0837|        return line.hasPrefix("#endregion") || 
315|325a81|               line == "// MARK: -" ||
316|52ea28|               line.hasPrefix("#pragma mark -")
317|27e597|    }
318|b4687f|    
319|c6e97d|    private func detectCommentStart(_ line: String) -> Bool {
320|1cbff6|        return line.hasPrefix("/*") && !line.contains("*/")
321|27e597|    }
322|b4687f|    
323|ea9113|    private func detectCommentEnd(_ line: String) -> Bool {
324|d521b7|        return line.contains("*/") && !line.hasPrefix("/*")
325|27e597|    }
326|b4687f|    
327|766920|    private func findConsecutiveImports(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int {
328|b1d128|        var endIndex = startIndex
329|2c6406|        for i in startIndex..<lines.count {
330|ac4d84|            let trimmed = lines[i].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
331|25e1cc|            if trimmed.hasPrefix("import ") {
332|d549e2|                endIndex = i
333|4a3466|            } else if !trimmed.isEmpty {
334|74cfd8|                break
335|a7dc16|            }
336|5f3077|        }
337|7678e6|        return endIndex
338|27e597|    }
339|b4687f|    
340|fd2e13|    private func findConsecutiveComments(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int {
341|b1d128|        var endIndex = startIndex
342|2c6406|        for i in startIndex..<lines.count {
343|ac4d84|            let trimmed = lines[i].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
344|730926|            if trimmed.starts(with: "//") {
345|d549e2|                endIndex = i
346|4a3466|            } else if !trimmed.isEmpty {
347|74cfd8|                break
348|a7dc16|            }
349|5f3077|        }
350|7678e6|        return endIndex
351|27e597|    }
352|b4687f|    
353|763883|    private func detectDeclaration(_ line: String) -> (type: FoldRegion.FoldType, label: String)? {
354|3ccee6|        func matchName(pattern: String) -> String? {
355|6cc0c4|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return nil }
356|f2f390|            guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
357|ebf922|                  match.numberOfRanges >= 2,
358|762e94|                  let r = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line)
359|f5f042|            else { return nil }
360|480e4a|            return String(line[r])
361|5f3077|        }
362|adc83b|
363|f67078|        // Allow leading attributes like "@MainActor", "@available(...)"
364|0c5ed8|        // Allow common modifiers in any order (best-effort).
365|ca2c54|        let prefix = #"^(?:\s*@\w+(?:\([^\)]*\))?\s+)*(?:\s*(?:public|private|internal|fileprivate|open|final|indirect|lazy|static|override|mutating|nonmutating)\s+)*"#
366|adc83b|
367|cf49c1|        // IMPORTANT: avoid treating "class func"/"class var" as a type declaration.
368|e1fc33|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"class\s+(?!func\b|var\b|let\b)([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
369|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
370|5f3077|        }
371|adc83b|
372|8d6e9b|        // Actor (Swift concurrency) – fold like a class/struct
373|8d98f9|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"actor\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
374|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
375|5f3077|        }
376|adc83b|
377|c629a9|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"struct\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
378|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
379|5f3077|        }
380|adc83b|
381|75283c|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"enum\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
382|0f57db|            return (.enumDeclaration, name)
383|5f3077|        }
384|adc83b|
385|bb35e5|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"protocol\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
386|982dbc|            return (.protocolDeclaration, name)
387|5f3077|        }
388|adc83b|
389|940527|        // Extensions can include dotted names (Foo.Bar)
390|b2a8c3|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"extension\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_\.]*)"#) {
391|fbf8d2|            return (.extension, name)
392|5f3077|        }
393|adc83b|
394|c2ae65|        return nil
395|27e597|    }
396|b4687f|    
397|a1a6f6|    private func detectFunction(_ line: String) -> String? {
398|d7dbc1|        // Function detection with visibility modifiers
399|2861c1|        let visibilityKeywords = ["public", "private", "internal", "fileprivate", "static", "class", "override", "final", "mutating", "convenience"]
400|d6ed84|        
401|981adf|        // Check for 'func' keyword
402|db4a2c|        if line.contains("func ") {
403|25ca5f|            // Extract function name
404|270a0d|            let funcPattern = "func\\s+(\\w+)"
405|b5e31c|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: funcPattern),
406|d7fb50|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
407|9e61c1|               let nameRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line) {
408|456ee3|                let functionName = String(line[nameRange])
409|185b9c|                // Check for parameters to create label
410|bbf605|                if let parenStart = line.firstIndex(of: "("), let parenEnd = line.firstIndex(of: ")") {
411|2d3254|                    let params = String(line[parenStart...parenEnd])
412|929aa2|                    return "\(functionName)\(params)"
413|4e2d32|                }
414|8aa06e|                return functionName
415|a7dc16|            }
416|5f3077|        }
417|d6ed84|        
418|4d99b7|        // Init detection
419|a1d502|        if let initName = extractName(from: line, prefix: "init", visibility: visibilityKeywords) {
420|3d8f8b|            return "\(initName)"
421|5f3077|        }
422|d6ed84|        
423|2a2371|        // Deinit detection
424|70e552|        if line.contains("deinit") {
425|9db7b1|            return "deinit"
426|5f3077|        }
427|d6ed84|        
428|307e69|        // Computed property with get/set
429|f3cc39|        if line.hasPrefix("var ") && (line.contains("{") || line.contains("get")) {
430|950394|            if let varName = extractVariableName(from: line) {
431|99146d|                return varName
432|a7dc16|            }
433|5f3077|        }
434|d6ed84|        
435|c2ae65|        return nil
436|27e597|    }
437|b4687f|    
438|1ec945|    private func detectControlFlow(_ line: String) -> String? {
439|bad9a4|        let controlFlowPatterns = [
440|0bf98c|            ("if ", "if"),
441|9fe51e|            ("guard ", "guard"),
442|62af45|            ("else if", "else if"),
443|7da324|            ("else", "else"),
444|99fc8d|            ("for ", "for"),
445|37f5a4|            ("while ", "while"),
446|402c75|            ("repeat", "repeat"),
447|f81318|            ("switch ", "switch"),
448|ff609c|            ("case ", "case"),
449|d493af|            ("default:", "default"),
450|0ca7b9|            ("do ", "do"),
451|30a630|            ("catch", "catch")
452|220505|        ]
453|d6ed84|        
454|186e39|        for (pattern, label) in controlFlowPatterns {
455|3cfde0|            if line.contains(pattern) {
456|6ef273|                return label
457|a7dc16|            }
458|5f3077|        }
459|c2ae65|        return nil
460|27e597|    }
461|b4687f|    
462|143320|    private func extractName(from line: String, prefix: String, visibility: [String]) -> String? {
463|47867c|        var components = line.components(separatedBy: .whitespaces).filter { !$0.isEmpty }
464|d6ed84|        
465|b4fd50|        // Remove visibility modifiers
466|6bbc02|        components = components.filter { !visibility.contains($0) }
467|d6ed84|        
468|ad7b7d|        // Find prefix index
469|524a3a|        if let prefixIndex = components.firstIndex(where: { $0 == prefix }),
470|22dab3|           prefixIndex + 1 < components.count {
471|5c4751|            var name = components[prefixIndex + 1]
472|43f61d|            // Remove colons and other trailing characters
473|dcb9cb|            name = name.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? name
474|3f8c05|            name = name.components(separatedBy: "<").first ?? name
475|dcb9cb|            name = name.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? name
476|470adb|            return name
477|5f3077|        }
478|c2ae65|        return nil
479|27e597|    }
480|b4687f|    
481|c68b6f|    private func extractVariableName(from line: String) -> String? {
482|6e7aec|        let components = line.components(separatedBy: .whitespaces).filter { !$0.isEmpty }
483|a2b557|        if components.count >= 2, components[0] == "var" {
484|696097|            var varName = components[1]
485|cdb291|            varName = varName.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? varName
486|0300ee|            varName = varName.components(separatedBy: "=").first ?? varName
487|c7c291|            return varName
488|5f3077|        }
489|c2ae65|        return nil
490|27e597|    }
491|b4687f|    
492|9d571e|    private func findOpeningBrace(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int? {
493|1ccc79|        for i in startIndex..<min(startIndex + 5, lines.count) {
494|539363|            if lines[i].contains("{") {
495|883981|                return i
496|a7dc16|            }
497|5f3077|        }
498|c2ae65|        return nil
499|27e597|    }
500|b4687f|    
501|a3e3d4|    private func isDeclarationLine(_ line: String) -> Bool {
502|3d6d16|        let keywords = ["class", "struct", "enum", "protocol", "extension", "init", "func"]
503|ce9d51|        return keywords.contains { line.contains("\($0) ") }
504|27e597|    }
505|b4687f|    
506|785057|    private func isFunctionLine(_ line: String) -> Bool {
507|00501b|        return line.contains("func ") || line.contains("init ")
508|27e597|    }
509|b4687f|    
510|70bda3|    private func detectBlockEnd(_ line: String, leadingWhitespace: Int) -> Bool {
511|ae2f5c|        return (line.hasPrefix("}") || line.starts(with: "}")) && 
512|9c322d|               (line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) == "}" || 
513|65b3d9|                line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces).hasPrefix("}"))
514|27e597|    }

516|94cc0f|    // MARK: - Fold State Persistence
517|b4687f|    
518|786ea9|    /// Saves the current fold state to UserDefaults
519|1043ae|    func saveFoldState(for filePath: String) {
520|d1c5a5|        let key = UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix + filePath
521|d6ed84|        
522|1c2856|        // Use regions from the dictionary if available
523|19f890|        let regionsToSave: [FoldRegion]
524|021ffe|        if let fileId = currentFileId, let storedRegions = foldRegionsByFile[fileId] {
525|b1db84|            regionsToSave = storedRegions
526|b31999|        } else {
527|210675|            regionsToSave = foldRegions
528|5f3077|        }
529|d6ed84|        
530|c424a6|        // Create a simplified representation for storage
531|40fb34|        let foldState = regionsToSave.map { FoldStateEntry(startLine: $0.startLine, isFolded: $0.isFolded) }
532|d6ed84|        
533|284b9a|        if let data = try? JSONEncoder().encode(foldState) {
534|d8ca2f|            UserDefaults.standard.set(data, forKey: key)
535|5f3077|        }
536|27e597|    }
537|b4687f|    
538|171d6b|    /// Restores fold state from UserDefaults
539|710040|    private func restoreFoldState(for filePath: String) {
540|d1c5a5|        let key = UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix + filePath
541|d6ed84|        
542|d7f816|        guard let data = UserDefaults.standard.data(forKey: key),
543|9cfa7e|              let foldState = try? JSONDecoder().decode([FoldStateEntry].self, from: data) else {
544|bef5d6|            return
545|5f3077|        }
546|d6ed84|        
547|f0448e|        // Apply saved state to current regions
548|9663b0|        for savedState in foldState {
549|65fcdc|            if let index = foldRegions.firstIndex(where: { $0.startLine == savedState.startLine }) {
550|7dfd32|                foldRegions[index].isFolded = savedState.isFolded
551|a7dc16|            }
552|5f3077|        }
553|27e597|    }
554|b4687f|    
555|1981e4|    /// Helper struct for persisting fold state
556|2b3d97|    private struct FoldStateEntry: Codable {
557|eef71e|        let startLine: Int
558|8ba562|        let isFolded: Bool
559|27e597|    }
560|b4687f|    
561|e874ec|    /// Clears fold state for a specific file
562|00eab3|    func clearFoldState(for filePath: String) {
563|d1c5a5|        let key = UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix + filePath
564|f413e9|        UserDefaults.standard.removeObject(forKey: key)
565|27e597|    }
566|b4687f|    
567|61f95b|    /// Clears all fold states
568|e8e04b|    func clearAllFoldStates() {
569|2f577c|        let defaults = UserDefaults.standard
570|a64386|        let keys = defaults.dictionaryRepresentation().keys.filter { $0.hasPrefix(UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix) }
571|35aefd|        for key in keys {
572|984243|            defaults.removeObject(forKey: key)
573|5f3077|        }
574|27e597|    }
575|b4687f|    
576|8aaef2|    // MARK: - Fold Operations
577|b4687f|    
578|37bb1e|    /// Toggles the fold state at a specific line
579|e2ee32|    func toggleFold(at line: Int) {
580|24bb8d|        if let regionIndex = foldRegions.firstIndex(where: { $0.startLine == line }) {
581|c49ebc|            foldRegions[regionIndex].isFolded.toggle()
582|bfd980|            updateCollapsedLines()
583|3070d1|            
584|05b9d6|            // Save state after toggling
585|3a89b4|            if let filePath = currentFilePath {
586|4a82a6|                saveFoldState(for: filePath)
587|a7dc16|            }
588|5f3077|        }
589|27e597|    }
590|b4687f|    
591|96748f|    /// Expands a folded region
592|d06486|    func expandRegion(at line: Int) {
593|24bb8d|        if let regionIndex = foldRegions.firstIndex(where: { $0.startLine == line }) {
594|916cf7|            foldRegions[regionIndex].isFolded = false
595|bfd980|            updateCollapsedLines()
596|3070d1|            
597|3a89b4|            if let filePath = currentFilePath {
598|4a82a6|                saveFoldState(for: filePath)
599|a7dc16|            }
600|5f3077|        }
601|27e597|    }
602|b4687f|    
603|4383f2|    /// Collapses a region
604|f7a196|    func collapseRegion(at line: Int) {
605|24bb8d|        if let regionIndex = foldRegions.firstIndex(where: { $0.startLine == line }) {
606|20e273|            foldRegions[regionIndex].isFolded = true
607|bfd980|            updateCollapsedLines()
608|3070d1|            
609|3a89b4|            if let filePath = currentFilePath {
610|4a82a6|                saveFoldState(for: filePath)
611|a7dc16|            }
612|5f3077|        }
613|27e597|    }
614|b4687f|    
615|98aa18|    /// Expands all folded regions
616|60d5e4|    func expandAll() {
617|8f6c3b|        for index in foldRegions.indices {
618|24f435|            foldRegions[index].isFolded = false
619|5f3077|        }
620|08ca44|        updateCollapsedLines()
621|d6ed84|        
622|8b7173|        if let filePath = currentFilePath {
623|4212f0|            saveFoldState(for: filePath)
624|5f3077|        }
625|27e597|    }
626|b4687f|    
627|3693ad|    /// Folds the region containing the given cursor line
628|d8038c|    func foldAtLine(_ cursorLine: Int) {
629|03814c|        // Find the innermost region containing this line
630|2e3469|        if let region = foldRegions.filter({ 
631|fd455c|            cursorLine >= $0.startLine && cursorLine <= $0.endLine && !$0.isFolded
632|0a42c8|        }).min(by: { ($0.endLine - $0.startLine) < ($1.endLine - $1.startLine) }) {
633|acad0e|            collapseRegion(at: region.startLine)
634|5f3077|        }
635|27e597|    }
636|b4687f|    
637|97b9ff|    /// Unfolds the region containing the given cursor line
638|97b77c|    func unfoldAtLine(_ cursorLine: Int) {
639|f02da6|        // Find any folded region that starts at or contains this line
640|add066|        if let region = foldRegions.first(where: { 
641|89c4dd|            $0.isFolded && ($0.startLine == cursorLine || (cursorLine >= $0.startLine && cursorLine <= $0.endLine))
642|294d4c|        }) {
643|2e10a5|            expandRegion(at: region.startLine)
644|5f3077|        }
645|27e597|    }
646|b4687f|    
647|8dc40d|    /// Toggle fold at cursor line - convenience method
648|d4ed4a|    func toggleFoldAtLine(_ cursorLine: Int) {
649|3df676|        // First check if we're on a fold start line
650|1c9044|        if let region = foldRegions.first(where: { $0.startLine == cursorLine }) {

773|f5af03|    /// Toggles the fold state at a specific line for a specific file

776|d6ed84|

834|d6ed84|

838|5f3077|        }
839|d6ed84|        
840|1fae88|        return FoldStatistics(

849|822cbf|    private func updateCollapsedLines() {

78|cc80ed|    @Published var collapsedLines: Set<Int> = []
79|b4687f|    
80|a6ff54|    // Dictionary to manage fold regions per file

85|b4687f|    
86|a7345d|    // MARK: - Enhanced Fold Detection
87|b4687f|    
88|04d736|    /// Detects all foldable regions in the given code
89|573286|    func detectFoldableRegions(in code: String, filePath: String? = nil) {
90|aeaa84|        self.currentFilePath = filePath
91|73450d|        self.currentFileId = filePath
92|d6ed84|        
93|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
94|fa1808|        var regions: [FoldRegion] = []
95|d6ed84|        
96|69e2fe|        // Track different types of blocks
97|1fae8b|        var blockStack: [(type: FoldRegion.FoldType, startLine: Int, label: String?)] = []
98|57aa0f|        var commentStack: [(startLine: Int, isMultiline: Bool)] = []
99|c5b1d1|        var regionStack: [(startLine: Int, label: String)] = []
100|adc83b|
101|ff8cec|        // If we detect a declaration/function/control-flow whose opening brace is on a later line,
102|724e06|        // we mark that brace line so it won't be treated as a standalone generic block.
103|945b20|        var braceLinesClaimed: Set<Int> = []
104|adc83b|
105|cce061|        // Used to prevent duplicate regions for grouped constructs (imports, // comments)
106|0cdafa|        var previousNonEmptyWasImport = false
107|8a6567|        var previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
108|d6ed84|        
109|035521|        for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
110|ec6750|            let trimmed = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
111|8a2732|            let leadingWhitespace = line.prefix { $0 == " " || $0 == "\t" }.count
112|3070d1|            
113|4be2b3|            // Skip empty lines for most detections
114|94f56f|            guard !trimmed.isEmpty else { continue }
115|adc83b|
116|096595|            // MARK: - Close blocks BEFORE opening new ones (handles "} else {" correctly)
117|3c0070|            if trimmed.hasPrefix("}") {
118|f8c18c|                // Count consecutive leading '}' so we can pop multiple blocks for lines like "}}"
119|7f8903|                let closeCount = max(1, trimmed.prefix { $0 == "}" }.count)
120|539d99|                for _ in 0..<closeCount {
121|75d4ef|                    if let lastBlock = blockStack.popLast() {
122|23d31e|                        if index - lastBlock.startLine > 1 {
123|9008b5|                            regions.append(FoldRegion(
124|c6f153|                                startLine: lastBlock.startLine,
125|419111|                                endLine: index,
126|b1c048|                                type: lastBlock.type,
127|b802b0|                                label: lastBlock.label
128|b6c95b|                            ))
129|392b35|                        }
130|c9717a|                    }
131|4e2d32|                }
132|a7dc16|            }
133|3070d1|            
134|454897|            // MARK: - Region Detection (#region, #pragma mark, MARK:)
135|18ca54|            if let label = detectRegionStart(trimmed) {
136|77dbe9|                regionStack.append((index, label))
137|a9d0ef|            } else if detectRegionEnd(trimmed) {
138|24137d|                if let region = regionStack.popLast() {
139|58d5c1|                    if index - region.startLine > 1 {
140|22c663|                        regions.append(FoldRegion(
141|626a73|                            startLine: region.startLine,
142|46d058|                            endLine: index,
143|b9c772|                            type: .region,
144|06e9cb|                            label: region.label
145|78dc58|                        ))
146|c9717a|                    }
147|4e2d32|                }
148|a7dc16|            }
149|3070d1|            
150|b80509|            // MARK: - Import Statement Detection (group consecutive imports once)
151|25e1cc|            if trimmed.hasPrefix("import ") {
152|7054bb|                if !previousNonEmptyWasImport {
153|a670fd|                    let importEnd = findConsecutiveImports(from: index, in: lines)
154|83c6e4|                    if importEnd > index {
155|22c663|                        regions.append(FoldRegion(
156|0dc011|                            startLine: index,
157|83c660|                            endLine: importEnd,
158|c870dd|                            type: .importStatement,
159|3afe11|                            label: "Imports"
160|78dc58|                        ))
161|c9717a|                    }
162|4e2d32|                }
163|8edb98|                previousNonEmptyWasImport = true
164|f5a6eb|            } else {
165|cd6ad3|                previousNonEmptyWasImport = false
166|a7dc16|            }
167|3070d1|            
168|9e2e57|            // MARK: - Comment Detection
169|d91d6c|            if detectCommentStart(trimmed) {
170|de49a5|                commentStack.append((index, true))
171|0b3758|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
172|08da46|            } else if trimmed.starts(with: "//") {
173|058130|                // Only create a fold region at the start of a consecutive // block
174|d2441e|                if !previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment {
175|a2e79c|                    let commentEnd = findConsecutiveComments(from: index, in: lines)
176|1111e2|                    if commentEnd > index {
177|22c663|                        regions.append(FoldRegion(
178|0dc011|                            startLine: index,
179|03f2b5|                            endLine: commentEnd,
180|64e6ca|                            type: .comment,
181|0e7feb|                            label: "Comment"
182|78dc58|                        ))
183|c9717a|                    }
184|4e2d32|                }
185|cda61a|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = true
186|fd1885|            } else if detectCommentEnd(trimmed) {
187|0b3758|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
188|e33d82|                if let comment = commentStack.popLast() {
189|bf0471|                    if index - comment.startLine > 1 {
190|22c663|                        regions.append(FoldRegion(
191|d5b0c0|                            startLine: comment.startLine,
192|46d058|                            endLine: index,
193|64e6ca|                            type: .comment,
194|0e7feb|                            label: "Comment"
195|78dc58|                        ))
196|c9717a|                    }
197|4e2d32|                }
198|f5a6eb|            } else {
199|0b3758|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
200|a7dc16|            }
201|3070d1|            
202|3d946d|            // MARK: - Class/Struct/Enum/Protocol/Extension Detection
203|2f1070|            if let declaration = detectDeclaration(trimmed) {
204|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
205|2b937f|                    blockStack.append((declaration.type, index, declaration.label))
206|fdd0e2|                } else {
207|7ec133|                    // Declaration without opening brace - look ahead for it
208|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
209|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)
210|c09b95|                        blockStack.append((declaration.type, index, declaration.label))
211|c9717a|                    }
212|4e2d32|                }
213|a7dc16|            }
214|3070d1|            
215|9273f4|            // MARK: - Function/Method Detection
216|8fb15a|            if let functionInfo = detectFunction(trimmed) {
217|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
218|072276|                    blockStack.append((.function, index, functionInfo))
219|fdd0e2|                } else {
220|ca50d4|                    // Function without opening brace - look ahead
221|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
222|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)
223|568400|                        blockStack.append((.function, index, functionInfo))
224|c9717a|                    }
225|4e2d32|                }
226|a7dc16|            }
227|3070d1|            
228|1e5bf2|            // MARK: - Control Flow Detection (if, guard, for, while, switch, etc.)
229|6b5dd6|            if let controlFlowLabel = detectControlFlow(trimmed) {
230|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
231|cb4212|                    blockStack.append((.controlFlow, index, controlFlowLabel))
232|fdd0e2|                } else {
233|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
234|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)
235|648280|                        blockStack.append((.controlFlow, index, controlFlowLabel))
236|c9717a|                    }
237|4e2d32|                }
238|a7dc16|            }
239|3070d1|            
240|b850f8|            // MARK: - Generic Block Detection
241|83f6cf|            // Avoid adding a generic block for a standalone "{" that belongs to a previously detected declaration.
242|bcf366|            if trimmed.hasSuffix("{"),
243|bd639e|               trimmed != "{",
244|f372eb|               !braceLinesClaimed.contains(index),
245|097ec3|               !isDeclarationLine(trimmed),
246|747356|               !isFunctionLine(trimmed) {
247|d74eec|                blockStack.append((.genericBlock, index, nil))
248|a7dc16|            }
249|adc83b|
250|caca44|            _ = leadingWhitespace // keep param for potential future heuristics
251|5f3077|        }
252|d6ed84|        
253|a60e7c|        // Handle any remaining unclosed blocks
254|193bf7|        while let lastBlock = blockStack.popLast() {
255|30813f|            if lines.count - 1 - lastBlock.startLine > 1 {
256|e50ab8|                regions.append(FoldRegion(
257|42046c|                    startLine: lastBlock.startLine,
258|a646f4|                    endLine: lines.count - 1,
259|68bd66|                    type: lastBlock.type,
260|2cb6f6|                    label: lastBlock.label
261|2188d8|                ))
262|a7dc16|            }
263|5f3077|        }
264|d6ed84|        
265|da4698|        // Sort regions by start line
266|e60f91|        regions.sort { $0.startLine < $1.startLine }
267|d6ed84|        
268|5f2f76|        self.foldRegions = regions
269|d6ed84|        
270|3b484c|        // Store regions in the per-file dictionary
271|8c6b47|        if let fileId = currentFileId {
272|823f0a|            foldRegionsByFile[fileId] = regions
273|5f3077|        }
274|d6ed84|        
275|83ae12|        // Restore previous fold state for this file
276|f7b7e9|        if let filePath = filePath {
277|b86c9c|            restoreFoldState(for: filePath)
278|5f3077|        }
279|d6ed84|        
280|08ca44|        updateCollapsedLines()
281|27e597|    }
282|b4687f|    
283|f96bbc|    // MARK: - Detection Helper Methods
284|b4687f|    
285|d80e09|    private func detectRegionStart(_ line: String) -> String? {
286|2a6674|        // C# / VS style regions
287|1989c4|        if line.hasPrefix("#region") {
288|08b9aa|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#region")
289|94d9b5|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Region"
290|5f3077|        }
291|39fca1|        // Objective-C pragma marks
292|667815|        if line.hasPrefix("#pragma mark") {
293|4621b4|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#pragma mark")
294|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
295|5f3077|        }
296|ccd53a|        // Swift MARK comments
297|b5e23f|        if line.contains("MARK:") {
298|504937|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "MARK:")
299|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
300|5f3077|        }
301|c9afee|        // TODO/FIXME regions
302|453092|        if line.contains("TODO:") {
303|a4bc68|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "TODO:")
304|5b14a7|            return "TODO: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
305|5f3077|        }
306|92ac0a|        if line.contains("FIXME:") {
307|0b0cff|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "FIXME:")
308|218d1e|            return "FIXME: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
309|5f3077|        }
310|c2ae65|        return nil
311|27e597|    }
312|b4687f|    
313|c62450|    private func detectRegionEnd(_ line: String) -> Bool {
314|6c0837|        return line.hasPrefix("#endregion") || 
315|325a81|               line == "// MARK: -" ||
316|52ea28|               line.hasPrefix("#pragma mark -")
317|27e597|    }
318|b4687f|    
319|c6e97d|    private func detectCommentStart(_ line: String) -> Bool {
320|1cbff6|        return line.hasPrefix("/*") && !line.contains("*/")
321|27e597|    }
322|b4687f|    
323|ea9113|    private func detectCommentEnd(_ line: String) -> Bool {
324|d521b7|        return line.contains("*/") && !line.hasPrefix("/*")
325|27e597|    }
326|b4687f|    
327|766920|    private func findConsecutiveImports(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int {
328|b1d128|        var endIndex = startIndex
329|2c6406|        for i in startIndex..<lines.count {
330|ac4d84|            let trimmed = lines[i].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
331|25e1cc|            if trimmed.hasPrefix("import ") {
332|d549e2|                endIndex = i
333|4a3466|            } else if !trimmed.isEmpty {
334|74cfd8|                break
335|a7dc16|            }
336|5f3077|        }
337|7678e6|        return endIndex
338|27e597|    }
339|b4687f|    
340|fd2e13|    private func findConsecutiveComments(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int {
341|b1d128|        var endIndex = startIndex
342|2c6406|        for i in startIndex..<lines.count {
343|ac4d84|            let trimmed = lines[i].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
344|730926|            if trimmed.starts(with: "//") {
345|d549e2|                endIndex = i
346|4a3466|            } else if !trimmed.isEmpty {
347|74cfd8|                break
348|a7dc16|            }
349|5f3077|        }
350|7678e6|        return endIndex
351|27e597|    }
352|b4687f|    
353|763883|    private func detectDeclaration(_ line: String) -> (type: FoldRegion.FoldType, label: String)? {
354|3ccee6|        func matchName(pattern: String) -> String? {
355|6cc0c4|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return nil }
356|f2f390|            guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
357|ebf922|                  match.numberOfRanges >= 2,
358|762e94|                  let r = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line)
359|f5f042|            else { return nil }
360|480e4a|            return String(line[r])
361|5f3077|        }
362|adc83b|
363|f67078|        // Allow leading attributes like "@MainActor", "@available(...)"
364|0c5ed8|        // Allow common modifiers in any order (best-effort).
365|ca2c54|        let prefix = #"^(?:\s*@\w+(?:\([^\)]*\))?\s+)*(?:\s*(?:public|private|internal|fileprivate|open|final|indirect|lazy|static|override|mutating|nonmutating)\s+)*"#
366|adc83b|
367|cf49c1|        // IMPORTANT: avoid treating "class func"/"class var" as a type declaration.
368|e1fc33|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"class\s+(?!func\b|var\b|let\b)([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
369|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
370|5f3077|        }
371|adc83b|
372|8d6e9b|        // Actor (Swift concurrency) – fold like a class/struct
373|8d98f9|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"actor\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
374|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
375|5f3077|        }
376|adc83b|
377|c629a9|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"struct\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
378|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
379|5f3077|        }
380|adc83b|
381|75283c|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"enum\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
382|0f57db|            return (.enumDeclaration, name)
383|5f3077|        }
384|adc83b|
385|bb35e5|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"protocol\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
386|982dbc|            return (.protocolDeclaration, name)
387|5f3077|        }
388|adc83b|
389|940527|        // Extensions can include dotted names (Foo.Bar)
390|b2a8c3|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"extension\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_\.]*)"#) {
391|fbf8d2|            return (.extension, name)
392|5f3077|        }
393|adc83b|
394|c2ae65|        return nil
395|27e597|    }
396|b4687f|    
397|a1a6f6|    private func detectFunction(_ line: String) -> String? {
398|d7dbc1|        // Function detection with visibility modifiers
399|2861c1|        let visibilityKeywords = ["public", "private", "internal", "fileprivate", "static", "class", "override", "final", "mutating", "convenience"]
400|d6ed84|        
401|981adf|        // Check for 'func' keyword
402|db4a2c|        if line.contains("func ") {
403|25ca5f|            // Extract function name
404|270a0d|            let funcPattern = "func\\s+(\\w+)"
405|b5e31c|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: funcPattern),
406|d7fb50|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
407|9e61c1|               let nameRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line) {
408|456ee3|                let functionName = String(line[nameRange])
409|185b9c|                // Check for parameters to create label
410|bbf605|                if let parenStart = line.firstIndex(of: "("), let parenEnd = line.firstIndex(of: ")") {
411|2d3254|                    let params = String(line[parenStart...parenEnd])
412|929aa2|                    return "\(functionName)\(params)"
413|4e2d32|                }
414|8aa06e|                return functionName
415|a7dc16|            }
416|5f3077|        }
417|d6ed84|        
418|4d99b7|        // Init detection
419|a1d502|        if let initName = extractName(from: line, prefix: "init", visibility: visibilityKeywords) {
420|3d8f8b|            return "\(initName)"
421|5f3077|        }
422|d6ed84|        
423|2a2371|        // Deinit detection
424|70e552|        if line.contains("deinit") {
425|9db7b1|            return "deinit"
426|5f3077|        }
427|d6ed84|        
428|307e69|        // Computed property with get/set
429|f3cc39|        if line.hasPrefix("var ") && (line.contains("{") || line.contains("get")) {
430|950394|            if let varName = extractVariableName(from: line) {
431|99146d|                return varName
432|a7dc16|            }
433|5f3077|        }
434|d6ed84|        
435|c2ae65|        return nil
436|27e597|    }
437|b4687f|    
438|1ec945|    private func detectControlFlow(_ line: String) -> String? {
439|bad9a4|        let controlFlowPatterns = [
440|0bf98c|            ("if ", "if"),
441|9fe51e|            ("guard ", "guard"),
442|62af45|            ("else if", "else if"),
443|7da324|            ("else", "else"),
444|99fc8d|            ("for ", "for"),
445|37f5a4|            ("while ", "while"),
446|402c75|            ("repeat", "repeat"),
447|f81318|            ("switch ", "switch"),
448|ff609c|            ("case ", "case"),
449|d493af|            ("default:", "default"),
450|0ca7b9|            ("do ", "do"),
451|30a630|            ("catch", "catch")
452|220505|        ]
453|d6ed84|        
454|186e39|        for (pattern, label) in controlFlowPatterns {
455|3cfde0|            if line.contains(pattern) {
456|6ef273|                return label
457|a7dc16|            }
458|5f3077|        }
459|c2ae65|        return nil
460|27e597|    }
461|b4687f|    
462|143320|    private func extractName(from line: String, prefix: String, visibility: [String]) -> String? {
463|47867c|        var components = line.components(separatedBy: .whitespaces).filter { !$0.isEmpty }
464|d6ed84|        
465|b4fd50|        // Remove visibility modifiers
466|6bbc02|        components = components.filter { !visibility.contains($0) }
467|d6ed84|        
468|ad7b7d|        // Find prefix index
469|524a3a|        if let prefixIndex = components.firstIndex(where: { $0 == prefix }),
470|22dab3|           prefixIndex + 1 < components.count {
471|5c4751|            var name = components[prefixIndex + 1]
472|43f61d|            // Remove colons and other trailing characters
473|dcb9cb|            name = name.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? name
474|3f8c05|            name = name.components(separatedBy: "<").first ?? name
475|dcb9cb|            name = name.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? name
476|470adb|            return name
477|5f3077|        }
478|c2ae65|        return nil
479|27e597|    }
480|b4687f|    
481|c68b6f|    private func extractVariableName(from line: String) -> String? {
482|6e7aec|        let components = line.components(separatedBy: .whitespaces).filter { !$0.isEmpty }
483|a2b557|        if components.count >= 2, components[0] == "var" {
484|696097|            var varName = components[1]
485|cdb291|            varName = varName.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? varName
486|0300ee|            varName = varName.components(separatedBy: "=").first ?? varName
487|c7c291|            return varName
488|5f3077|        }
489|c2ae65|        return nil
490|27e597|    }
491|b4687f|    
492|9d571e|    private func findOpeningBrace(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int? {
493|1ccc79|        for i in startIndex..<min(startIndex + 5, lines.count) {
494|539363|            if lines[i].contains("{") {
495|883981|                return i
496|a7dc16|            }
497|5f3077|        }
498|c2ae65|        return nil
499|27e597|    }
500|b4687f|    
501|a3e3d4|    private func isDeclarationLine(_ line: String) -> Bool {
502|3d6d16|        let keywords = ["class", "struct", "enum", "protocol", "extension", "init", "func"]
503|ce9d51|        return keywords.contains { line.contains("\($0) ") }
504|27e597|    }
505|b4687f|    
506|785057|    private func isFunctionLine(_ line: String) -> Bool {
507|00501b|        return line.contains("func ") || line.contains("init ")
508|27e597|    }
509|b4687f|    
510|70bda3|    private func detectBlockEnd(_ line: String, leadingWhitespace: Int) -> Bool {
511|ae2f5c|        return (line.hasPrefix("}") || line.starts(with: "}")) && 
512|9c322d|               (line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) == "}" || 
513|65b3d9|                line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces).hasPrefix("}"))
514|27e597|    }
515|b4687f|    
516|94cc0f|    // MARK: - Fold State Persistence
517|b4687f|    
518|786ea9|    /// Saves the current fold state to UserDefaults
519|1043ae|    func saveFoldState(for filePath: String) {
520|d1c5a5|        let key = UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix + filePath
521|d6ed84|        
522|1c2856|        // Use regions from the dictionary if available
523|19f890|        let regionsToSave: [FoldRegion]
524|021ffe|        if let fileId = currentFileId, let storedRegions = foldRegionsByFile[fileId] {
525|b1db84|            regionsToSave = storedRegions
526|b31999|        } else {
527|210675|            regionsToSave = foldRegions
528|5f3077|        }
529|d6ed84|        
530|c424a6|        // Create a simplified representation for storage
531|40fb34|        let foldState = regionsToSave.map { FoldStateEntry(startLine: $0.startLine, isFolded: $0.isFolded) }
532|d6ed84|        
533|284b9a|        if let data = try? JSONEncoder().encode(foldState) {
534|d8ca2f|            UserDefaults.standard.set(data, forKey: key)
535|5f3077|        }
536|27e597|    }
537|b4687f|    
538|171d6b|    /// Restores fold state from UserDefaults
539|710040|    private func restoreFoldState(for filePath: String) {
540|d1c5a5|        let key = UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix + filePath
541|d6ed84|        
542|d7f816|        guard let data = UserDefaults.standard.data(forKey: key),
543|9cfa7e|              let foldState = try? JSONDecoder().decode([FoldStateEntry].self, from: data) else {
544|bef5d6|            return
545|5f3077|        }
546|d6ed84|        
547|f0448e|        // Apply saved state to current regions
548|9663b0|        for savedState in foldState {
549|65fcdc|            if let index = foldRegions.firstIndex(where: { $0.startLine == savedState.startLine }) {
550|7dfd32|                foldRegions[index].isFolded = savedState.isFolded
551|a7dc16|            }
552|5f3077|        }
553|27e597|    }
554|b4687f|    
555|1981e4|    /// Helper struct for persisting fold state
556|2b3d97|    private struct FoldStateEntry: Codable {
557|eef71e|        let startLine: Int
558|8ba562|        let isFolded: Bool
559|27e597|    }
560|b4687f|    
561|e874ec|    /// Clears fold state for a specific file
562|00eab3|    func clearFoldState(for filePath: String) {
563|d1c5a5|        let key = UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix + filePath
564|f413e9|        UserDefaults.standard.removeObject(forKey: key)
565|27e597|    }
566|b4687f|    
567|61f95b|    /// Clears all fold states

158|cb81b4|    private func canonicalFileId(_ file: String) -> String {
159|e998da|        // Many call sites use URL.absoluteString; convert file:// URLs to paths so we
160|b513c2|        // don't end up with duplicate breakpoint buckets for the same file.
161|9942cc|        if let url = URL(string: file), url.isFileURL {
162|bdef50|            return url.path
163|5f3077|        }
164|374ff6|        return file
165|27e597|    }
166|adc83b|
167|de10cc|    /// Normalizes UI-provided line indices.
168|2cbc84|    ///
169|20e2d8|    /// The editor UI typically uses 0-based indices for line iteration. We clamp
170|6014a1|    /// to a minimum of 0 to avoid negative values.
171|b22942|    private func canonicalLine(_ line: Int) -> Int {
172|20f91b|        max(0, line)
173|27e597|    }
174|adc83b|
175|5ce9fa|    func hasBreakpoint(file: String, line: Int) -> Bool {
176|345f2b|        let fileId = canonicalFileId(file)
177|e74a32|        let line = canonicalLine(line)
178|c135e6|        return breakpointsByFile[fileId]?.contains(line) == true
179|27e597|    }
180|adc83b|
181|c99ea4|    func toggleBreakpoint(file: String, line: Int) {
182|345f2b|        let fileId = canonicalFileId(file)
183|e74a32|        let line = canonicalLine(line)
184|adc83b|
185|5c5f53|        // IMPORTANT: mutate via a copy so @Published emits reliably for collection changes.
186|8dfb09|        var dict = breakpointsByFile
187|2eb6b8|        var set = dict[fileId] ?? []
188|adc83b|
189|e49052|        if set.contains(line) {
190|646b56|            set.remove(line)
191|b31999|        } else {
192|ec8126|            set.insert(line)
193|5f3077|        }
194|adc83b|
195|be2c1c|        if set.isEmpty {
196|9e6e9b|            dict.removeValue(forKey: fileId)
197|b31999|        } else {
198|63e6d5|            dict[fileId] = set
199|5f3077|        }
200|adc83b|
201|718dd5|        breakpointsByFile = dict
202|27e597|    }
203|adc83b|
204|1f1804|    func setBreakpoint(file: String, line: Int, isEnabled: Bool) {
205|7614bc|        // UI-only model currently treats "enabled" as "present/absent".
206|de12f2|        // (Real debugger integration can extend this to store disabled breakpoints.)
207|771692|        if isEnabled {
208|e95a4e|            if !hasBreakpoint(file: file, line: line) {
209|b3cdcc|                toggleBreakpoint(file: file, line: line)
210|a7dc16|            }
211|b31999|        } else {
212|d0d375|            removeBreakpoint(file: file, line: line)
213|5f3077|        }
214|27e597|    }
215|adc83b|
216|de9666|    func removeBreakpoint(file: String, line: Int) {
217|345f2b|        let fileId = canonicalFileId(file)
218|e74a32|        let line = canonicalLine(line)
219|adc83b|
220|8dfb09|        var dict = breakpointsByFile
221|5f981e|        guard var set = dict[fileId] else { return }
222|adc83b|
223|24ed09|        set.remove(line)
224|be2c1c|        if set.isEmpty {
225|9e6e9b|            dict.removeValue(forKey: fileId)
226|b31999|        } else {
227|63e6d5|            dict[fileId] = set
228|5f3077|        }
229|718dd5|        breakpointsByFile = dict
230|27e597|    }
231|adc83b|
232|149cc0|    func breakpoints(in file: String) -> [Breakpoint] {
233|345f2b|        let fileId = canonicalFileId(file)
234|cf3a7f|        let lines = breakpointsByFile[fileId] ?? []
235|913e01|        return lines.sorted().map { Breakpoint(file: fileId, line: $0) }
236|27e597|    }

238|14a790|    // MARK: - Watch expressions
239|adc83b|
240|144775|    @discardableResult
241|923c00|    func addWatchExpression(_ expression: String, initialValue: String = "—") -> WatchExpression? {
242|074c5b|        let trimmed = expression.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
243|e44359|        guard !trimmed.isEmpty else { return nil }
244|adc83b|
245|8392ab|        // Avoid duplicates by expression text.
246|08eef3|        if watchExpressions.contains(where: { $0.expression == trimmed }) {
247|000cef|            return watchExpressions.first(where: { $0.expression == trimmed })
248|5f3077|        }
249|adc83b|
250|5dc639|        let watch = WatchExpression(expression: trimmed, value: initialValue)
251|c52964|        var watches = watchExpressions
252|edd007|        watches.append(watch)
253|6dfccd|        watchExpressions = watches
254|8e207e|        return watch
255|27e597|    }
256|adc83b|
257|2f15d9|    func removeWatchExpression(id: WatchExpression.ID) {
258|c52964|        var watches = watchExpressions
259|0049f1|        watches.removeAll { $0.id == id }
260|6dfccd|        watchExpressions = watches
261|27e597|    }
262|adc83b|
263|4ab657|    func updateWatchExpression(id: WatchExpression.ID, expression: String) {
264|074c5b|        let trimmed = expression.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
265|0eedd3|        guard !trimmed.isEmpty else { return }
266|8f9568|        guard let idx = watchExpressions.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == id }) else { return }
267|adc83b|
268|c52964|        var watches = watchExpressions
269|4d1038|        watches[idx].expression = trimmed
270|6dfccd|        watchExpressions = watches
271|27e597|    }
272|adc83b|
273|491aa0|    func setWatchValue(id: WatchExpression.ID, value: String) {
274|8f9568|        guard let idx = watchExpressions.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == id }) else { return }
275|c52964|        var watches = watchExpressions
276|017183|        watches[idx].value = value
277|6dfccd|        watchExpressions = watches
278|27e597|    }

310|be9780|    func play() {
311|e441df|        // If paused, resume; if stopped, start a simulated session.
312|b6ddc2|        if state == .stopped {
313|99b12d|            callStack = [
314|796293|                StackFrame(function: "main()", file: "App.swift", line: 12),
315|4dd7d2|                StackFrame(function: "run()", file: "Runner.swift", line: 48),
316|0ac5cf|                StackFrame(function: "doWork()", file: "Worker.swift", line: 103)
317|324820|            ]
318|1e5c04|            selectedFrameId = callStack.first?.id
319|adc83b|
320|637a32|            variables = [
321|55b8bc|                Variable(name: "counter", value: "0", type: "Int"),
322|c94f21|                Variable(
323|1eb713|                    name: "user",
324|31c053|                    value: "User(…)",
325|2538a3|                    type: "User",
326|f2148b|                    children: [
327|525a15|                        Variable(name: "id", value: "42", type: "Int"),
328|eb7f7a|                        Variable(name: "name", value: "\"Taylor\"", type: "String")
329|3b8c65|                    ]
330|6f642e|                )
331|324820|            ]
332|5f3077|        }
333|adc83b|
334|481302|        state = .running
335|adc83b|
336|f9d6ee|        // Auto-pause quickly so step buttons make sense in the UI.
337|bcc94c|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.35) { [weak self] in
338|270dfc|            Task { @MainActor in
339|5db6fa|                guard let self else { return }
340|417546|                if self.state == .running { self.state = .paused }
341|a7dc16|            }
342|5f3077|        }
343|27e597|    }
344|adc83b|
345|8e47e1|    /// Start a real JavaScript debug session
346|2b9817|    func startDebugging(code: String, fileName: String, fileId: String) {
347|4118d6|        // Clear previous state
348|96e590|        consoleEntries.removeAll()
349|f75c5d|        callStack.removeAll()
350|ad2751|        variables.removeAll()
351|d6ed84|        
352|c0f638|        // Add system message
353|49277e|        consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
354|c18490|            message: "Starting debug session for \(fileName)...",
355|27afb6|            kind: .system
356|813e75|        ))
357|d6ed84|        
358|ed1770|        // Set up initial call stack
359|ee221a|        callStack = [
360|db8273|            StackFrame(function: "<module>", file: fileName, line: 1)
361|220505|        ]
362|b51589|        selectedFrameId = callStack.first?.id
363|481302|        state = .running
364|d6ed84|        
365|fabbcb|        // Run JavaScript with JSRunner
366|0f1953|        Task {
367|78f5a7|            let runner = JSRunner()
368|3070d1|            
369|80530a|            // Capture console output
370|2bcb08|            runner.setConsoleHandler { [weak self] message in
371|df2890|                Task { @MainActor in
372|9e6003|                    guard let self = self else { return }
373|1b9d24|                    let kind: ConsoleEntry.Kind
374|571cf3|                    if message.hasPrefix("[ERROR]") {
375|19d4ff|                        kind = .error
376|6ba763|                    } else if message.hasPrefix("[WARN]") {
377|bd649a|                        kind = .warning
378|e9bff4|                    } else if message.hasPrefix("[INFO]") {
379|cb1c58|                        kind = .info
380|540066|                    } else {
381|bc6733|                        kind = .output
382|c9717a|                    }
383|56aa6d|                    // Strip prefix for cleaner output
384|63772a|                    let cleanMessage = message
385|ba5a18|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[LOG] ", with: "")
386|dbc777|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[ERROR] ", with: "")
387|be10bc|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[WARN] ", with: "")
388|1f973e|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[INFO] ", with: "")
389|ffc155|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(message: cleanMessage, kind: kind))
390|4e2d32|                }
391|a7dc16|            }
392|3070d1|            
393|71cc09|            do {
394|8a3016|                let result = try await runner.execute(code: code, timeout: 30.0)
395|dbac47|                let resultString = result.toString() ?? ""
396|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
397|2160a3|                    if !resultString.isEmpty && resultString != "undefined" {
398|cfc3f8|                        self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
399|23cb42|                            message: "→ \(resultString)",
400|07ef2b|                            kind: .output
401|78dc58|                        ))
402|c9717a|                    }
403|8a0189|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
404|7997c0|                        message: "Debug session ended.",
405|32eda6|                        kind: .system
406|c89922|                    ))
407|f62f49|                    self.state = .stopped
408|27adbc|                    self.callStack.removeAll()
409|4e2d32|                }
410|91b9a2|            } catch {
411|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
412|8a0189|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
413|fd7354|                        message: error.localizedDescription,
414|bddd8e|                        kind: .error
415|c89922|                    ))
416|8a0189|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
417|4ae511|                        message: "Debug session ended with error.",
418|32eda6|                        kind: .system
419|c89922|                    ))
420|f62f49|                    self.state = .stopped
421|4e2d32|                }
422|a7dc16|            }
423|5f3077|        }
424|27e597|    }
425|b4687f|    
426|bed8ef|    func stop() {
427|9f038d|        state = .stopped
428|458bf1|        callStack = []
429|79284e|        variables = []
430|629278|        selectedFrameId = nil
431|27e597|    }
432|adc83b|
433|d1463b|    func stepOver() {
434|ce02c3|        guard state.canStep else { return }
435|f0b58f|        advanceTopFrameLine(by: 1)
436|27e597|    }
437|adc83b|
438|2ca9c8|    func stepInto() {
439|ce02c3|        guard state.canStep else { return }
440|f0b58f|        advanceTopFrameLine(by: 1)
441|23d0ec|        // Pretend we stepped into a function.
442|982289|        if let top = callStack.first {
443|8c256c|            var cs = callStack
444|27877d|            cs.insert(StackFrame(function: "helper()", file: top.file, line: top.line), at: 0)
445|b80726|            callStack = cs
446|1e5c04|            selectedFrameId = callStack.first?.id
447|5f3077|        }
448|27e597|    }
449|adc83b|
450|d1c987|    private func advanceTopFrameLine(by delta: Int) {
451|1735de|        guard !callStack.isEmpty else { return }
452|adc83b|
453|5c5f53|        // IMPORTANT: mutate via a copy so @Published emits reliably for collection changes.
454|e6cfa2|        var cs = callStack
455|dc199c|        cs[0].line += delta
456|917f8a|        callStack = cs
457|adc83b|
458|390c0e|        // Make the demo watch expression change a bit.
459|592404|        if let idx = watchExpressions.firstIndex(where: { $0.expression == "counter" }) {
460|95bd8c|            var watches = watchExpressions
461|2ed9b0|            let n = Int(watches[idx].value) ?? 0
462|5b5bc8|            watches[idx].value = "\(n + delta)"
463|6dcd0c|            watchExpressions = watches
464|5f3077|        }
465|adc83b|
466|c6c3e0|        if let varIdx = variables.firstIndex(where: { $0.name == "counter" }) {
467|c2619d|            var vars = variables
468|1520a4|            let n = Int(vars[varIdx].value) ?? 0
469|5da7be|            vars[varIdx].value = "\(n + delta)"
470|dac60a|            variables = vars
471|5f3077|        }
472|27e597|    }

132|e4df05|    weak var fileNavigator: FileSystemNavigator?
133|adc83b|
134|9ec84f|    // Navigation history
135|6a3111|    private var navigationHistory: [NavigationLocation] = []
136|4d0d46|    private var navigationIndex = -1
137|adc83b|
138|7b8f21|    /// Track active security-scoped URL access while files are open in tabs.
139|b24c0d|    /// This avoids losing access after opening a document (common on iPadOS).
140|e6fd81|    private var securityScopedAccessCounts: [URL: Int] = [:]
141|adc83b|
142|b8bdf3|    var activeTab: Tab? {
143|59ee7e|        tabs.first { $0.id == activeTabId }
144|27e597|    }
145|adc83b|
146|75cc04|    var activeTabIndex: Int? {
147|de4487|        tabs.firstIndex { $0.id == activeTabId }
148|27e597|    }
149|adc83b|
150|359b1b|    init() {
151|62fd7f|        // Create example tabs for all supported languages
152|0ba339|        let exampleTabs = Self.createExampleTabs()
153|8780f1|        tabs.append(contentsOf: exampleTabs)
154|4f6451|        activeTabId = exampleTabs.first?.id ?? UUID()
155|adc83b|
156|f0086d|        // Observe UserDefaults changes from Settings slider
157|f1f68f|        fontSizeObserver = NotificationCenter.default.addObserver(
158|70f406|            forName: UserDefaults.didChangeNotification,
159|33f159|            object: nil,
160|7c2cc3|            queue: .main
161|bf17df|        ) { [weak self] _ in
162|bd7394|            guard let self else { return }
163|224392|            let stored = UserDefaults.standard.double(forKey: "fontSize")
164|3ad977|            if stored > 0, CGFloat(stored) != self.editorFontSize {
165|dccfac|                self.editorFontSize = CGFloat(stored)
166|a7dc16|            }
167|5f3077|        }
168|27e597|    }
169|adc83b|
170|e57f77|    deinit {
171|e11618|        if let fontSizeObserver {
172|443da4|            NotificationCenter.default.removeObserver(fontSizeObserver)
173|5f3077|        }
174|27e597|    }
175|b4687f|    
176|78f12b|    /// Creates example tabs demonstrating syntax highlighting for all supported languages
177|a830d6|    private static func createExampleTabs() -> [Tab] {
178|8cfd49|        var examples: [Tab] = []
179|d6ed84|        
180|a13ba8|        // Swift example
181|f0955b|        examples.append(Tab(
182|0bc9a8|            fileName: "Welcome.swift",
183|7a029b|            content: """
184|cf53a7|// Welcome to VS Code for iPadOS! 🎉
185|8d0643|//
186|f205ed|// Features:
187|8cef3f|// • Syntax highlighting for Swift, JS, Python, and more
188|9a4015|// • Multiple tabs with drag reordering
189|ca1f11|// • File explorer sidebar
190|463668|// • Command palette (⌘+Shift+P)
191|9a7f61|// • Quick open (⌘+P)
192|73eab0|// • Find & Replace (⌘+F)
193|c04970|// • AI Assistant
194|cb07e6|// • Minimap navigation
195|7db993|// • Code folding
196|8f1f2b|// • Go to line (⌘+G)
197|8d0643|//
198|3349e5|// Start editing or open a file!
199|adc83b|
200|d755ba|import SwiftUI
201|adc83b|
202|4a07a6|struct ContentView: View {
203|bfb6e5|    @State private var counter = 0
204|b4687f|    
205|504e43|    var body: some View {
206|69d3a9|        VStack(spacing: 20) {
207|034352|            Text("Hello, World!")
208|1b4a82|                .font(.largeTitle)
209|f7ad69|                .foregroundColor(.blue)
210|3070d1|            
211|a1d5d1|            Button("Count: \\(counter)") {
212|497b4e|                counter += 1
213|a7dc16|            }
214|a68f66|            .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)
215|5f3077|        }
216|72583e|        .padding()
217|27e597|    }
218|b31277|}
219|adc83b|
220|5e4767|// MARK: - Preview
221|0eca73|#Preview {
222|c476ef|    ContentView()
223|b31277|}
224|b7ce6e|""",

226|813e75|        ))

228|5bfc87|        // JavaScript example
229|f0955b|        examples.append(Tab(
230|75279c|            fileName: "example.js",
231|7a029b|            content: """
232|08e83e|// JavaScript Example - ES6+ Features
233|adc83b|
234|d9b09f|import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
235|adc83b|
236|4bb664|const API_URL = 'https://api.example.com';
237|adc83b|
238|4e581e|// Async function with error handling
239|5a86c3|async function fetchData(endpoint) {
240|3c751d|    try {
241|8e9b1e|        const response = await fetch(`${API_URL}/${endpoint}`);
242|c52d1e|        if (!response.ok) {
243|4e9ea1|            throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`);
244|5f3077|        }
245|1f4f06|        return await response.json();
246|6e1365|    } catch (error) {
247|da4c02|        console.error('Fetch failed:', error);
248|0a5fa4|        return null;
249|27e597|    }
250|b31277|}
251|adc83b|
252|0b2611|// React Component
253|c85565|function UserProfile({ userId }) {
254|21b1ca|    const [user, setUser] = useState(null);
255|9d5052|    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
256|b4687f|    
257|b7837a|    useEffect(() => {
258|fd3d47|        fetchData(`users/${userId}`)
259|4a85c4|            .then(data => {
260|cd836c|                setUser(data);
261|b2d927|                setLoading(false);
262|892e8b|            });
263|349367|    }, [userId]);
264|b4687f|    
265|32b313|    if (loading) return <div>Loading...</div>;
266|b4687f|    
267|d09267|    return (
268|b5ce1f|        <div className="profile">
269|3b6efe|            <h1>{user?.name ?? 'Unknown'}</h1>
270|81326b|            <p>Email: {user?.email}</p>
271|2d89f1|        </div>
272|209670|    );
273|b31277|}
274|adc83b|
275|e498aa|// Array methods & destructuring
276|5c73a8|const numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];
277|128f8a|const doubled = numbers.map(n => n * 2);
278|251ac8|const [first, second, ...rest] = doubled;
279|adc83b|
280|b32033|export { fetchData, UserProfile };
281|b7ce6e|""",
282|2f9d42|            language: "javascript"
283|813e75|        ))
284|d6ed84|        
285|8af368|        // Python example
286|f0955b|        examples.append(Tab(
287|d04e33|            fileName: "example.py",
288|7a029b|            content: """
289|e05c05|#!/usr/bin/env python3
290|5aac47|\"\"\"
291|a39a14|Python Example - Modern Python Features
292|d6a5ac|Demonstrates type hints, dataclasses, async, and more.
293|5aac47|\"\"\"
294|adc83b|
295|e13070|import asyncio
296|57a161|from dataclasses import dataclass, field
297|3e7c83|from typing import Optional, List
298|acc0ed|from enum import Enum
299|adc83b|
300|054df8|class Status(Enum):
301|5c9625|    PENDING = "pending"
302|132770|    ACTIVE = "active"
303|bacb8e|    COMPLETED = "completed"
304|adc83b|
305|4cd340|@dataclass
306|603d0e|class Task:
307|e89e79|    \"\"\"Represents a task with metadata.\"\"\"
308|45c89b|    id: int
309|c662c5|    title: str
310|4b5b96|    status: Status = Status.PENDING
311|d39601|    tags: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
312|c4d782|    description: Optional[str] = None
313|b4687f|    
314|291a22|    def mark_complete(self) -> None:
315|b93a57|        self.status = Status.COMPLETED
316|b90567|        print(f"Task '{self.title}' completed!")
317|adc83b|
318|d9ba4a|class TaskManager:
319|8fa5a7|    def __init__(self):
320|2e7c6d|        self._tasks: dict[int, Task] = {}
321|1ced01|        self._next_id = 1
322|b4687f|    
323|1a3e8a|    def add_task(self, title: str, **kwargs) -> Task:
324|c350a2|        task = Task(id=self._next_id, title=title, **kwargs)
325|8f87cb|        self._tasks[task.id] = task
326|48db70|        self._next_id += 1
327|46b7e5|        return task
328|b4687f|    
329|ffb550|    async def process_tasks(self) -> None:
330|1f6997|        for task in self._tasks.values():
331|960af6|            await asyncio.sleep(0.1)  # Simulate work
332|741a3c|            task.mark_complete()
333|adc83b|
334|8efbd4|# Main execution
335|fe03be|async def main():
336|a47a74|    manager = TaskManager()
337|b84b88|    manager.add_task("Learn Python", tags=["programming", "learning"])
338|081e24|    manager.add_task("Build app", description="Create VSCode for iPad")
339|b4687f|    
340|bef3bc|    await manager.process_tasks()
341|adc83b|
342|cfba8f|if __name__ == "__main__":
343|33c963|    asyncio.run(main())
344|b7ce6e|""",
345|cdea1f|            language: "python"
346|813e75|        ))
347|d6ed84|

446|889224|            fileName: "styles.css",
447|7a029b|            content: """
448|4fbc3e|/* VS Code iPadOS - Stylesheet */
449|8f459f|/* Modern CSS with variables, grid, and animations */
450|adc83b|
451|80477a|:root {
452|08021a|    --primary-color: #007acc;
453|f3d2d1|    --secondary-color: #3c3c3c;
454|b8e284|    --background-dark: #1e1e1e;
455|49fc5d|    --text-light: #d4d4d4;
456|e07b10|    --accent-green: #4ec9b0;
457|ba90a3|    --font-mono: 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace;
458|0ca247|    --shadow-lg: 0 10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
459|b31277|}
460|adc83b|
461|528114|* {
462|0d96ba|    margin: 0;
463|20ce36|    padding: 0;
464|59004d|    box-sizing: border-box;
465|b31277|}
466|adc83b|
467|3e84a3|body {
468|b2d922|    font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
469|e33751|    background-color: var(--background-dark);
470|a7026f|    color: var(--text-light);
471|508c34|    line-height: 1.6;
472|b31277|}
473|adc83b|
474|bca70d|.navbar {
475|701f74|    position: sticky;
476|978aba|    top: 0;
477|b44137|    background: rgba(30, 30, 30, 0.95);
478|2859c9|    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
479|420323|    padding: 1rem 2rem;
480|35c4be|    z-index: 1000;
481|b31277|}
482|adc83b|
483|40cda2|.hero-section {
484|9dd02d|    min-height: 100vh;
485|8928a5|    display: grid;
486|d1ff91|    place-items: center;
487|2d6734|    text-align: center;
488|4173b0|    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--background-dark), #2d2d30);
489|b31277|}
490|adc83b|
491|de992a|.btn.primary {
492|1af0b4|    background: var(--primary-color);
493|3b4c82|    color: white;
494|4bafa9|    padding: 12px 24px;
495|84f6c0|    border: none;
496|7265d9|    border-radius: 6px;
497|0235f4|    font-size: 1rem;
498|ad2c58|    cursor: pointer;
499|6f67b9|    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
500|b31277|}
501|adc83b|
502|9ad7b2|.btn.primary:hover {
503|9a2e0f|    transform: translateY(-2px);
504|c6f6d6|    box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
505|b31277|}
506|adc83b|
507|2dae44|.feature-grid {
508|8928a5|    display: grid;
509|4a5fbb|    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
510|2a5a6f|    gap: 2rem;
511|54ce2f|    padding: 2rem;
512|b31277|}
513|adc83b|
514|0202ba|@keyframes fadeIn {
515|77cf08|    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
516|4358d6|    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
517|b31277|}
518|adc83b|
519|a0a323|.feature-card {
520|f63ff0|    animation: fadeIn 0.5s ease-out forwards;
521|b31277|}
522|adc83b|
523|09eb02|@media (max-width: 768px) {
524|fc0953|    .nav-links { display: none; }
525|36bb36|    .hero-section { padding: 2rem; }
526|b31277|}
527|b7ce6e|""",
