309|adc83b|
310|be9780|    func play() {
311|e441df|        // If paused, resume; if stopped, start a simulated session.
312|b6ddc2|        if state == .stopped {
313|99b12d|            callStack = [
314|796293|                StackFrame(function: "main()", file: "App.swift", line: 12),
315|4dd7d2|                StackFrame(function: "run()", file: "Runner.swift", line: 48),
316|0ac5cf|                StackFrame(function: "doWork()", file: "Worker.swift", line: 103)
317|324820|            ]
318|1e5c04|            selectedFrameId = callStack.first?.id
319|adc83b|
320|637a32|            variables = [
321|55b8bc|                Variable(name: "counter", value: "0", type: "Int"),
322|c94f21|                Variable(
323|1eb713|                    name: "user",
324|31c053|                    value: "User(…)",
325|2538a3|                    type: "User",
326|f2148b|                    children: [
327|525a15|                        Variable(name: "id", value: "42", type: "Int"),
328|eb7f7a|                        Variable(name: "name", value: "\"Taylor\"", type: "String")
329|3b8c65|                    ]
330|6f642e|                )
331|324820|            ]
332|5f3077|        }
333|adc83b|
334|481302|        state = .running
335|adc83b|
336|f9d6ee|        // Auto-pause quickly so step buttons make sense in the UI.
337|bcc94c|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.35) { [weak self] in
338|270dfc|            Task { @MainActor in
339|5db6fa|                guard let self else { return }
340|417546|                if self.state == .running { self.state = .paused }
341|a7dc16|            }
342|5f3077|        }
343|27e597|    }
344|adc83b|
345|8e47e1|    /// Start a real JavaScript debug session
346|2b9817|    func startDebugging(code: String, fileName: String, fileId: String) {
347|4118d6|        // Clear previous state
348|96e590|        consoleEntries.removeAll()
349|f75c5d|        callStack.removeAll()
350|ad2751|        variables.removeAll()
351|d6ed84|        
352|c0f638|        // Add system message
353|49277e|        consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
354|c18490|            message: "Starting debug session for \(fileName)...",
355|27afb6|            kind: .system
356|813e75|        ))
357|d6ed84|        
358|ed1770|        // Set up initial call stack
359|ee221a|        callStack = [
360|db8273|            StackFrame(function: "<module>", file: fileName, line: 1)
361|220505|        ]
362|b51589|        selectedFrameId = callStack.first?.id
363|481302|        state = .running
364|d6ed84|        
365|fabbcb|        // Run JavaScript with JSRunner
366|0f1953|        Task {
367|78f5a7|            let runner = JSRunner()
368|3070d1|            
369|80530a|            // Capture console output
370|2bcb08|            runner.setConsoleHandler { [weak self] message in
371|df2890|                Task { @MainActor in
372|9e6003|                    guard let self = self else { return }
373|1b9d24|                    let kind: ConsoleEntry.Kind
374|571cf3|                    if message.hasPrefix("[ERROR]") {
375|19d4ff|                        kind = .error
376|6ba763|                    } else if message.hasPrefix("[WARN]") {
377|bd649a|                        kind = .warning
378|e9bff4|                    } else if message.hasPrefix("[INFO]") {
379|cb1c58|                        kind = .info
380|540066|                    } else {
381|bc6733|                        kind = .output
382|c9717a|                    }
383|56aa6d|                    // Strip prefix for cleaner output
384|63772a|                    let cleanMessage = message
385|ba5a18|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[LOG] ", with: "")
386|dbc777|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[ERROR] ", with: "")
387|be10bc|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[WARN] ", with: "")
388|1f973e|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[INFO] ", with: "")
389|ffc155|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(message: cleanMessage, kind: kind))
390|4e2d32|                }
391|a7dc16|            }
392|3070d1|            
393|71cc09|            do {
394|8a3016|                let result = try await runner.execute(code: code, timeout: 30.0)
395|dbac47|                let resultString = result.toString() ?? ""
396|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
397|2160a3|                    if !resultString.isEmpty && resultString != "undefined" {
398|cfc3f8|                        self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
399|23cb42|                            message: "→ \(resultString)",
400|07ef2b|                            kind: .output
401|78dc58|                        ))
402|c9717a|                    }
403|8a0189|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
404|7997c0|                        message: "Debug session ended.",
405|32eda6|                        kind: .system
406|c89922|                    ))
407|f62f49|                    self.state = .stopped
408|27adbc|                    self.callStack.removeAll()
409|4e2d32|                }
410|91b9a2|            } catch {
411|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
412|8a0189|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
413|fd7354|                        message: error.localizedDescription,
414|bddd8e|                        kind: .error
415|c89922|                    ))
416|8a0189|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
417|4ae511|                        message: "Debug session ended with error.",
418|32eda6|                        kind: .system
419|c89922|                    ))
420|f62f49|                    self.state = .stopped
421|4e2d32|                }
422|a7dc16|            }
423|5f3077|        }
424|27e597|    }
425|b4687f|    
426|bed8ef|    func stop() {
427|9f038d|        state = .stopped
428|458bf1|        callStack = []
429|79284e|        variables = []
430|629278|        selectedFrameId = nil
431|27e597|    }
432|adc83b|
433|d1463b|    func stepOver() {
434|ce02c3|        guard state.canStep else { return }
435|f0b58f|        advanceTopFrameLine(by: 1)
436|27e597|    }
437|adc83b|
438|2ca9c8|    func stepInto() {
439|ce02c3|        guard state.canStep else { return }
440|f0b58f|        advanceTopFrameLine(by: 1)
441|23d0ec|        // Pretend we stepped into a function.
442|982289|        if let top = callStack.first {
443|8c256c|            var cs = callStack
444|27877d|            cs.insert(StackFrame(function: "helper()", file: top.file, line: top.line), at: 0)
445|b80726|            callStack = cs
446|1e5c04|            selectedFrameId = callStack.first?.id
447|5f3077|        }
448|27e597|    }
449|adc83b|
450|d1c987|    private func advanceTopFrameLine(by delta: Int) {
451|1735de|        guard !callStack.isEmpty else { return }
452|adc83b|
453|5c5f53|        // IMPORTANT: mutate via a copy so @Published emits reliably for collection changes.
454|e6cfa2|        var cs = callStack
455|dc199c|        cs[0].line += delta
456|917f8a|        callStack = cs
457|adc83b|
458|390c0e|        // Make the demo watch expression change a bit.
459|592404|        if let idx = watchExpressions.firstIndex(where: { $0.expression == "counter" }) {
460|95bd8c|            var watches = watchExpressions
461|2ed9b0|            let n = Int(watches[idx].value) ?? 0
462|5b5bc8|            watches[idx].value = "\(n + delta)"
463|6dcd0c|            watchExpressions = watches
464|5f3077|        }
465|adc83b|
466|c6c3e0|        if let varIdx = variables.firstIndex(where: { $0.name == "counter" }) {
467|c2619d|            var vars = variables
468|1520a4|            let n = Int(vars[varIdx].value) ?? 0
469|5da7be|            vars[varIdx].value = "\(n + delta)"
470|dac60a|            variables = vars
471|5f3077|        }
472|27e597|    }
473|b31277|}

930|cdacf1|        let localLLM = LocalLLMService.shared
931|d6ed84|        
932|7f5962|        // Auto-load model if not loaded

934|b1c14b|            await localLLM.loadModel()

944|d6ed84|

950|090c3f|        return response

953|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
954|b4687f|    
955|a96bea|    private func buildSystemPrompt(context: String?) -> String {
956|a60aaf|        var prompt = """
957|de15a3|You are an expert coding assistant integrated into a code editor on iPadOS. You help developers write, debug, explain, and improve their code. Always respond in English.
958|adc83b|
959|3584f0|Guidelines:
960|9e10fd|- Provide clear, concise explanations
961|d9814a|- Use code blocks with proper language tags for code snippets
962|fab31f|- Suggest best practices and optimizations
963|17f65d|- Be helpful with debugging and error resolution
964|a2707f|- When generating code, ensure it's complete and runnable
965|ea2d25|- ALWAYS respond in English regardless of input language
966|d72f9a|- Never output raw XML tags like <think> or </think>
967|e4615a|"""
968|d6ed84|        
969|54cd50|        if let context = context, !context.isEmpty {
970|b91f6a|            prompt += "\n\nCurrent file context:\n```\n\(context)\n```"
971|5f3077|        }
972|d6ed84|        
973|dd02e7|        return prompt
974|27e597|    }
975|b4687f|    
976|c53a51|    private func extractCodeBlocks(from text: String) -> [CodeBlock] {
977|791eb5|        var blocks: [CodeBlock] = []
978|0f2b2b|        let pattern = "```(\\w*)\\n([\\s\\S]*?)```"
979|d6ed84|        
980|cbccc8|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern) else {
981|f7ed63|            return blocks
982|5f3077|        }
983|d6ed84|        
984|10d615|        let range = NSRange(text.startIndex..., in: text)
985|b29406|        let matches = regex.matches(in: text, range: range)
986|d6ed84|        
987|847e6d|        for match in matches {
988|b137ab|            if let langRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: text),
989|f66f31|               let codeRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: text) {
990|dfd4cc|                let language = String(text[langRange])
991|894c52|                let code = String(text[codeRange]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
992|9e5c94|                blocks.append(CodeBlock(language: language.isEmpty ? "text" : language, code: code))
993|a7dc16|            }
994|5f3077|        }
995|d6ed84|        
996|db7106|        return blocks
997|27e597|    }
998|b31277|}

1002|c16cee|enum AIError: LocalizedError {
1003|06d89d|    case invalidResponse
1004|dbebbc|    case httpError(Int)
1005|24e92a|    case apiError(String)
1006|b833b2|    case noAPIKey
1007|b4687f|    
1008|242b78|    var errorDescription: String? {
1009|2e6d08|        switch self {
1010|9a7b43|        case .invalidResponse: return "Invalid response from AI service"
1011|385ec1|        case .httpError(let code): return "HTTP Error: \(code)"
1012|1b0277|        case .apiError(let message): return message
1013|e8a23b|        case .noAPIKey: return "No API key configured"
1014|5f3077|        }
1015|27e597|    }

32|d6ed84|        
33|19a0b8|        var color: UIColor {
34|20c960|            switch self {
35|c09e13|            case .error: return .systemRed
36|fe769b|            case .warning: return .systemYellow
37|4a3796|            case .note: return .systemBlue
38|d0648b|            case .info: return .systemGreen
39|fdc62b|            case .unknown: return .systemGray
40|a7dc16|            }
41|5f3077|        }
42|27e597|    }
43|b4687f|    
44|ad4226|    /// Creates a sanitized file path
45|b841da|    var sanitizedFile: String {
46|2894bc|        return file.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
47|27e597|    }
48|b4687f|    
49|538079|    /// Returns a display-friendly location string
50|25720f|    var locationString: String {
51|7976fb|        if column > 0 {
52|d80915|            return "\(sanitizedFile):\(line):\(column)"
53|5f3077|        }
54|d4b357|        return "\(sanitizedFile):\(line)"
55|27e597|    }
56|b4687f|    
57|98cc9f|    /// Converts to legacy ErrorLocation for backward compatibility
58|6c6d47|    func toErrorLocation(errorType: ErrorLocation.ErrorType = .unknown, fullOutput: String = "") -> ErrorLocation {
59|bb42e8|        return ErrorLocation(
60|5bb816|            file: file,
61|13903b|            line: line,
62|b3d857|            column: column,
63|acd4b4|            message: "[\(severity.displayName.uppercased())] \(message)",
64|bb0c2f|            errorType: errorType,
65|b00b08|            fullOutput: fullOutput
66|3143a4|        )
67|27e597|    }
68|b31277|}

70|07b99a|// MARK: - Static Parser Functions
71|adc83b|
72|128b17|/// Parse Swift compiler errors from output
73|bc2615|func parseSwiftError(output: String) -> [ParsedError] {
74|021783|    var errors: [ParsedError] = []
75|8053da|    let pattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
76|66fc67|        pattern: #"^([^:]+):(\d+):(\d+):\s*(error|warning|note):\s*(.+)$"#,
77|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
78|829c44|    )
79|b4687f|    
80|48813d|    let nsRange = NSRange(output.startIndex..., in: output)
81|91f230|    let matches = pattern.matches(in: output, range: nsRange)
82|b4687f|    
83|6e2d2f|    for match in matches {
84|f65006|        guard let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: output),
85|b59fd4|              let lineRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: output),
86|440969|              let colRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: output),
87|07ac39|              let severityRange = Range(match.range(at: 4), in: output),
88|05bf7d|              let messageRange = Range(match.range(at: 5), in: output) else {
89|0e4f53|            continue
90|5f3077|        }
91|d6ed84|        
92|ceb47d|        let file = String(output[fileRange])
93|054d61|        let line = Int(output[lineRange]) ?? 1
94|857777|        let column = Int(output[colRange]) ?? 0
95|edf968|        let severityString = String(output[severityRange])
96|0af55b|        let message = String(output[messageRange])
97|d6ed84|        
98|6ff385|        let severity = ParsedError.ErrorSeverity(rawValue: severityString) ?? .unknown
99|d6ed84|        
100|a8808f|        errors.append(ParsedError(
101|5bb816|            file: file,
102|13903b|            line: line,
103|b3d857|            column: column,
104|b934ce|            message: message,
105|cb0000|            severity: severity
106|813e75|        ))
107|27e597|    }
108|b4687f|    
109|b5c4b2|    return errors
110|b31277|}
111|adc83b|
112|3fd25f|/// Parse Python errors from traceback output
113|fc7910|func parsePythonError(output: String) -> [ParsedError] {
114|021783|    var errors: [ParsedError] = []
115|b4687f|    
116|f13885|    // Python traceback pattern: File "path", line N
117|78bf0d|    let filePattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
118|145f7b|        pattern: #"File \"([^\"]+)\", line (\d+)(?:, in (.+))?"#,
119|d114fc|        options: []
120|829c44|    )
121|b4687f|    
122|6abe93|    // Python exception pattern at the end of traceback
123|351cbb|    let exceptionPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
124|d57a96|        pattern: #"^(\w+Error):\s*(.+)$"#,
125|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
126|829c44|    )
127|b4687f|    
128|48813d|    let nsRange = NSRange(output.startIndex..., in: output)
129|5e9409|    let matches = filePattern.matches(in: output, range: nsRange)
130|b4687f|    
131|676c19|    // Get exception message from the end
132|93aee8|    var exceptionMessage = "Unknown Python error"
133|a2f2e9|    if let exceptionMatch = exceptionPattern.firstMatch(in: output, range: nsRange) {
134|754902|        if let messageRange = Range(exceptionMatch.range(at: 2), in: output) {
135|cbab8a|            exceptionMessage = String(output[messageRange])
136|5f3077|        }
137|27e597|    }
138|b4687f|    
139|6e2d2f|    for match in matches {
140|f65006|        guard let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: output),
141|a240d7|              let lineRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: output) else {
142|0e4f53|            continue
143|5f3077|        }
144|d6ed84|        
145|ceb47d|        let file = String(output[fileRange])
146|054d61|        let line = Int(output[lineRange]) ?? 1
147|d6ed84|        
148|cbd9dd|        // Try to get function name
149|395c81|        var message = exceptionMessage
150|f0084d|        if match.numberOfRanges > 3,
151|8cd76a|           let funcRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: output) {
152|af6c49|            let function = String(output[funcRange])
153|b31f6e|            message = "\(exceptionMessage) (in '\(function)')"
154|5f3077|        }
155|d6ed84|        
156|a8808f|        errors.append(ParsedError(
157|5bb816|            file: file,
158|13903b|            line: line,
159|310bbd|            column: 0,
160|b934ce|            message: message,
161|1c1924|            severity: .error
162|813e75|        ))
163|27e597|    }
164|b4687f|    
165|b5c4b2|    return errors
166|b31277|}
167|adc83b|
168|2d0933|/// Parse Node.js/JavaScript errors from stack trace output
169|0775c2|func parseNodeError(output: String) -> [ParsedError] {
170|021783|    var errors: [ParsedError] = []
171|b4687f|    
172|77be5f|    // Node.js/V8 stack trace pattern: at function (path:line:column)
173|0389cd|    let stackPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
174|2f19ba|        pattern: #"at\s+(?:.+?\s+)?\(?([^:]+):(\d+):(\d+)\)?"#,
175|d114fc|        options: []
176|829c44|    )
177|b4687f|    
178|5a03ba|    // Node.js error message pattern
179|68512d|    let errorPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
180|d57a96|        pattern: #"^(\w+Error):\s*(.+)$"#,
181|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
182|829c44|    )
183|b4687f|    
184|48813d|    let nsRange = NSRange(output.startIndex..., in: output)
185|b4687f|    
186|027ee8|    // Extract error message
187|adc22b|    var errorMessage = "Unknown JavaScript error"
188|6d6f23|    if let errorMatch = errorPattern.firstMatch(in: output, range: nsRange) {
189|e9206a|        if let typeRange = Range(errorMatch.range(at: 1), in: output),
190|e26d9a|           let messageRange = Range(errorMatch.range(at: 2), in: output) {
191|f20a48|            let errorType = String(output[typeRange])
192|c8551a|            let message = String(output[messageRange])
193|275253|            errorMessage = "\(errorType): \(message)"
194|5f3077|        }
195|27e597|    }
196|b4687f|    
197|a625b9|    // Find all stack trace locations
198|9193d9|    let matches = stackPattern.matches(in: output, range: nsRange)
199|b4687f|    
200|6e2d2f|    for match in matches {
201|f65006|        guard let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: output),
202|b59fd4|              let lineRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: output),
203|68fb3e|              let colRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: output) else {
204|0e4f53|            continue
205|5f3077|        }
206|d6ed84|        
207|ceb47d|        let file = String(output[fileRange])
208|054d61|        let line = Int(output[lineRange]) ?? 1
209|857777|        let column = Int(output[colRange]) ?? 0
210|d6ed84|        
211|a8808f|        errors.append(ParsedError(
212|5bb816|            file: file,
213|13903b|            line: line,
214|b3d857|            column: column,
215|ac86d9|            message: errorMessage,
216|1c1924|            severity: .error
217|813e75|        ))
218|27e597|    }
219|b4687f|    
220|b5c4b2|    return errors
221|b31277|}
222|adc83b|
223|040507|/// Parse GCC/Clang compiler errors from output
224|7c475d|func parseGccError(output: String) -> [ParsedError] {
225|021783|    var errors: [ParsedError] = []
226|b4687f|    
227|1d71ea|    // GCC/Clang error pattern: path:line:column: error: message
228|8053da|    let pattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
229|66fc67|        pattern: #"^([^:]+):(\d+):(\d+):\s*(error|warning|note):\s*(.+)$"#,
230|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
231|829c44|    )
232|b4687f|    
233|48813d|    let nsRange = NSRange(output.startIndex..., in: output)
234|91f230|    let matches = pattern.matches(in: output, range: nsRange)
235|b4687f|    
236|6e2d2f|    for match in matches {
237|f65006|        guard let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: output),
238|b59fd4|              let lineRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: output),
239|440969|              let colRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: output),
240|07ac39|              let severityRange = Range(match.range(at: 4), in: output),
241|05bf7d|              let messageRange = Range(match.range(at: 5), in: output) else {
242|0e4f53|            continue
243|5f3077|        }
244|d6ed84|        
245|ceb47d|        let file = String(output[fileRange])
246|054d61|        let line = Int(output[lineRange]) ?? 1
247|857777|        let column = Int(output[colRange]) ?? 0
248|edf968|        let severityString = String(output[severityRange])
249|0af55b|        let message = String(output[messageRange])
250|d6ed84|        
251|6ff385|        let severity = ParsedError.ErrorSeverity(rawValue: severityString) ?? .unknown
252|d6ed84|        
253|a8808f|        errors.append(ParsedError(
254|5bb816|            file: file,
255|13903b|            line: line,
256|b3d857|            column: column,
257|b934ce|            message: message,
258|cb0000|            severity: severity
259|813e75|        ))
260|27e597|    }
261|b4687f|    
262|b5c4b2|    return errors
263|b31277|}
264|adc83b|
265|cf9479|/// Parse Rust compiler errors from output
266|fb69d5|func parseRustError(output: String) -> [ParsedError] {
267|021783|    var errors: [ParsedError] = []
268|b4687f|    
269|7037f1|    // Rust error pattern: error[EXXXX]: message
270|b6cd14|    // followed by --> path:line:column
271|436e2c|    let errorHeaderPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
272|ca8561|        pattern: #"^(error|warning)\[(E\d+)\]:\s*(.+)$"#,
273|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
274|829c44|    )
275|b4687f|    
276|93d87e|    // Rust location pattern: --> path:line:column
277|ac1eda|    let locationPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
278|2f743f|        pattern: #"^\s*-->\s+([^:]+):(\d+):(\d+)"#,
279|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
280|829c44|    )
281|b4687f|    
282|0d8ef7|    // Alternative pattern without error code: error: message
283|f738e0|    let simpleErrorPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
284|d07935|        pattern: #"^(error|warning):\s*(.+)$"#,
285|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
286|829c44|    )
287|b4687f|    
288|48813d|    let nsRange = NSRange(output.startIndex..., in: output)
289|fc288a|    let lines = output.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
290|b4687f|    
291|a310ae|    var currentMessage: String?
292|dcacfa|    var currentSeverity: ParsedError.ErrorSeverity = .error
293|b4687f|    
294|352c31|    for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
295|e1b372|        let lineRange = NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)
296|d6ed84|        
297|ded761|        // Check for error header with code
298|345436|        if let match = errorHeaderPattern.firstMatch(in: line, range: lineRange) {
299|aed211|            if let severityRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line),
300|2eae41|               let codeRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: line),
301|fc5d23|               let messageRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: line) {
302|cc8cde|                let severityString = String(line[severityRange])
303|917c9b|                let code = String(line[codeRange])
304|bd16ab|                let message = String(line[messageRange])
305|b940e3|                currentMessage = "[\(code)] \(message)"
306|bf0e26|                currentSeverity = ParsedError.ErrorSeverity(rawValue: severityString) ?? .error
307|a7dc16|            }
308|5f3077|        }
309|40dc51|        // Check for simple error without code
310|40a9d1|        else if let match = simpleErrorPattern.firstMatch(in: line, range: lineRange) {
311|aed211|            if let severityRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line),
312|50b8db|               let messageRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: line) {
313|cc8cde|                let severityString = String(line[severityRange])
314|bd16ab|                let message = String(line[messageRange])
315|0e4b8b|                currentMessage = message
316|bf0e26|                currentSeverity = ParsedError.ErrorSeverity(rawValue: severityString) ?? .error
317|a7dc16|            }
318|5f3077|        }
319|dde2ec|        // Check for location line
320|04b7bf|        else if let match = locationPattern.firstMatch(in: line, range: lineRange) {
321|510d16|            if let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line),
322|66f856|               let lineNumRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: line),
323|a7176f|               let colRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: line) {
324|8231df|                let file = String(line[fileRange])
325|d4a390|                let lineNum = Int(line[lineNumRange]) ?? 1
326|6d4e94|                let column = Int(line[colRange]) ?? 0
327|e4cfce|                let message = currentMessage ?? "Rust \(currentSeverity.displayName)"
328|216278|                
329|fd281c|                errors.append(ParsedError(
330|7b52a4|                    file: file,
331|88de6d|                    line: lineNum,
332|0adac9|                    column: column,
333|88bd6a|                    message: message,
334|ff4c75|                    severity: currentSeverity
335|2188d8|                ))
336|216278|                
337|a40ddf|                // Reset for next error
338|152685|                currentMessage = nil
339|a7dc16|            }
340|5f3077|        }
341|27e597|    }
342|b4687f|    
343|b5c4b2|    return errors
344|b31277|}
345|adc83b|
346|d03b27|/// Generic regex fallback parser for unknown formats
347|9a0fc5|func parseGeneric(output: String) -> [ParsedError] {
348|021783|    var errors: [ParsedError] = []
349|b4687f|    
350|5318fc|    // Generic file:line:column pattern as fallback
351|8053da|    let pattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
352|b84b2f|        pattern: #"([^\s:]+):(\d+)(?::(\d+))?"#,
353|d114fc|        options: []
354|829c44|    )
355|b4687f|    
356|48813d|    let nsRange = NSRange(output.startIndex..., in: output)
357|91f230|    let matches = pattern.matches(in: output, range: nsRange)
358|b4687f|    
359|6e2d2f|    for match in matches {
360|f65006|        guard let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: output),
361|a240d7|              let lineRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: output) else {
362|0e4f53|            continue
363|5f3077|        }
364|d6ed84|        
365|ceb47d|        let file = String(output[fileRange])
366|67ea83|        // Skip if it doesn't look like a file path
367|93496b|        if !file.contains("/") && !file.contains(".") && !file.contains("\\") {
368|0e4f53|            continue
369|5f3077|        }
370|d6ed84|        
371|054d61|        let line = Int(output[lineRange]) ?? 1
372|ce30c0|        var column = 0
373|d6ed84|        
374|f0084d|        if match.numberOfRanges > 3,
375|8c8a61|           let colRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: output) {
376|dd1219|            let colString = String(output[colRange])
377|2b064b|            column = Int(colString) ?? 0
378|5f3077|        }
379|d6ed84|        
380|a8808f|        errors.append(ParsedError(
381|5bb816|            file: file,
382|13903b|            line: line,
383|b3d857|            column: column,
384|9ab956|            message: "Potential error at \(file):\(line)",
385|2c5080|            severity: .unknown
386|813e75|        ))
387|27e597|    }
388|b4687f|    
389|b5c4b2|    return errors
390|b31277|}
391|adc83b|
392|83feba|// MARK: - Legacy ErrorLocation (backward compatibility)
393|adc83b|
394|30a3a8|/// Represents the location of an error in source code
395|f83b08|struct ErrorLocation: Identifiable, Equatable, Hashable {
396|c90f8e|    let id = UUID()
397|2553d0|    let file: String
398|390384|    let line: Int
399|539e50|    let column: Int
400|edcb08|    let message: String
401|885e18|    let errorType: ErrorType
402|7d4476|    let fullOutput: String
403|b4687f|    
404|7fa33d|    enum ErrorType: String, CaseIterable {
405|30a1fa|        case python
406|d25fa3|        case nodeJS
407|2eb380|        case swift
408|e98076|        case go
409|287255|        case ruby
410|4419ed|        case gcc
411|b8e490|        case rust
412|456663|        case unknown
413|d6ed84|        
414|ea6d43|        var displayName: String {
415|20c960|            switch self {
416|c303fc|            case .python: return "Python"
417|cc84dd|            case .nodeJS: return "Node.js"
418|c0642e|            case .swift: return "Swift"
419|eaf685|            case .go: return "Go"
420|fe6fc8|            case .ruby: return "Ruby"
421|0d270e|            case .gcc: return "GCC/Clang"
422|171964|            case .rust: return "Rust"
423|e5821b|            case .unknown: return "Unknown"
424|a7dc16|            }
425|5f3077|        }
426|27e597|    }
427|b4687f|    
428|ad4226|    /// Creates a sanitized file path
429|b841da|    var sanitizedFile: String {
430|2894bc|        return file.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
431|27e597|    }
432|b4687f|    
433|538079|    /// Returns a display-friendly location string
434|25720f|    var locationString: String {
435|7976fb|        if column > 0 {
436|d80915|            return "\(sanitizedFile):\(line):\(column)"
437|5f3077|        }
438|d4b357|        return "\(sanitizedFile):\(line)"
439|27e597|    }
440|b4687f|    
441|694767|    /// Converts to new ParsedError format
442|a1a2d0|    func toParsedError() -> ParsedError {
443|f72422|        let severity: ParsedError.ErrorSeverity
444|cea86c|        if message.contains("[ERROR]") {
445|2c99ce|            severity = .error
446|39bb83|        } else if message.contains("[WARNING]") {
447|3064d0|            severity = .warning
448|308424|        } else if message.contains("[NOTE]") {
449|81926d|            severity = .note
450|b31999|        } else {
451|a6c96a|            severity = .unknown
452|5f3077|        }
453|d6ed84|        
454|7a00bf|        // Clean up message by removing severity prefix
455|d17ac6|        var cleanMessage = message
456|22730d|            .replacingOccurrences(of: "[ERROR] ", with: "")
457|5fcb5e|            .replacingOccurrences(of: "[WARNING] ", with: "")
458|64c3f2|            .replacingOccurrences(of: "[NOTE] ", with: "")
459|d6ed84|        
460|7fdb78|        return ParsedError(
461|5bb816|            file: file,
462|13903b|            line: line,
463|b3d857|            column: column,
464|5dd76c|            message: cleanMessage,
465|cb0000|            severity: severity
466|3143a4|        )
467|27e597|    }
468|b31277|}
469|adc83b|
470|88786c|// MARK: - Protocol for error navigation delegates
471|adc83b|
472|794c51|protocol ErrorNavigationDelegate: AnyObject {
473|1ecc22|    func navigateToFile(_ file: String, line: Int, column: Int)
474|d8a587|    func highlightError(in outputView: UIView, location: ErrorLocation)
475|b31277|}
476|adc83b|
477|bec4ae|// MARK: - Main ErrorParser Class
478|adc83b|
479|787102|/// Parser for extracting error locations from various language outputs
480|ada787|class ErrorParser {
481|b4687f|    
482|110f8f|    // MARK: - Regex Patterns
483|b4687f|    
484|55eb77|    /// Python traceback pattern: File "path", line N
485|c1ced3|    private let pythonPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
486|145f7b|        pattern: #"File \"([^\"]+)\", line (\d+)(?:, in (.+))?"#,
487|d114fc|        options: []
488|829c44|    )
489|b4687f|    
490|2f688a|    /// Python exception pattern at the end of traceback
491|ee8936|    private let pythonExceptionPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
492|d57a96|        pattern: #"^(\w+Error):\s*(.+)$"#,
493|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
494|829c44|    )
495|b4687f|    
496|8ce785|    /// Node.js/V8 stack trace pattern: at function (path:line:column)
497|9c7450|    private let nodeJSPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
498|2f19ba|        pattern: #"at\s+(?:.+?\s+)?\(?([^:]+):(\d+):(\d+)\)?"#,
499|d114fc|        options: []
500|829c44|    )
501|b4687f|    
502|918c60|    /// Node.js error message pattern
503|46f687|    private let nodeJSErrorPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
504|d57a96|        pattern: #"^(\w+Error):\s*(.+)$"#,
505|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
506|829c44|    )
507|b4687f|    
508|3a7c11|    /// Swift compiler error pattern: path:line:column: error: message
509|015be5|    private let swiftPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
510|66fc67|        pattern: #"^([^:]+):(\d+):(\d+):\s*(error|warning|note):\s*(.+)$"#,
511|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
512|829c44|    )
513|b4687f|    
514|c0f8d7|    /// Go build error pattern: path:line:column: message OR path:line: message
515|c280f8|    private let goPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
516|88ebcb|        pattern: #"^([^:]+):(\d+)(?::(\d+))?:\s*(.+)$"#,
517|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
518|829c44|    )
519|b4687f|    
520|9e8fd1|    /// Ruby error pattern: path:line:in `method': message (ErrorClass)
521|15a462|    private let rubyPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
522|7b0cc1|        pattern: #"^([^:]+):(\d+):in\s+`([^']+)':\s*(.+)$"#,
523|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
524|829c44|    )
525|b4687f|    
526|3f256e|    /// Ruby traceback pattern: from path:line:in `method'
527|93f074|    private let rubyTracePattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
528|36c3ba|        pattern: #"from\s+([^:]+):(\d+):in\s+`([^']+)'"#,
529|d114fc|        options: []
530|829c44|    )
531|b4687f|    
532|7f0bcb|    /// GCC/Clang error pattern: path:line:column: error: message
533|190101|    private let gccPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
534|66fc67|        pattern: #"^([^:]+):(\d+):(\d+):\s*(error|warning|note):\s*(.+)$"#,
535|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
536|829c44|    )
537|b4687f|    
538|22f606|    /// Rust error header pattern: error[E####]: message
539|e8baf2|    private let rustErrorPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
540|ca8561|        pattern: #"^(error|warning)\[(E\d+)\]:\s*(.+)$"#,
541|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
542|829c44|    )
543|b4687f|    
544|3ed228|    /// Rust location pattern: --> path:line:column
545|22d678|    private let rustLocationPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
546|2f743f|        pattern: #"^\s*-->\s+([^:]+):(\d+):(\d+)"#,
547|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
548|829c44|    )
549|b4687f|    
550|104fb3|    /// Generic file:line pattern as fallback
551|8c2b97|    private let genericPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
552|b84b2f|        pattern: #"([^\s:]+):(\d+)(?::(\d+))?"#,
553|d114fc|        options: []
554|829c44|    )
555|b4687f|    
556|6503ae|    // MARK: - Properties
557|b4687f|    
558|f076c7|    weak var navigationDelegate: ErrorNavigationDelegate?
559|292b4b|    private var errorHighlighter: ErrorHighlighter?
560|b4687f|    
561|7dca75|    // MARK: - Initialization
562|b4687f|    
563|f4a5f7|    init(delegate: ErrorNavigationDelegate? = nil) {
564|3acbd5|        self.navigationDelegate = delegate
565|b1287f|        self.errorHighlighter = ErrorHighlighter()
566|27e597|    }
567|b4687f|    
568|81c2c9|    // MARK: - Public Methods
569|b4687f|    
570|82ad5e|    /// Parse error output and extract all error locations using new ParsedError format
571|bce787|    func parseErrorsToParsedErrors(from output: String, language: ErrorLocation.ErrorType? = nil) -> [ParsedError] {
572|ed19ec|        if let lang = language {
573|b9eed3|            switch lang {
574|a15bc4|            case .python:
575|56129f|                return parsePythonError(output: output)
576|433a23|            case .nodeJS:
577|ed68bd|                return parseNodeError(output: output)
578|fb4d4c|            case .swift:
579|f13af8|                return parseSwiftError(output: output)
580|267968|            case .go:
581|f4b2f7|                return parseGoErrorsToParsedErrors(output)
582|ca5b3f|            case .ruby:
583|222f01|                return parseRubyErrorsToParsedErrors(output)
584|016192|            case .gcc:
585|d3cf73|                return parseGccError(output: output)
586|0db80b|            case .rust:
587|70f0e2|                return parseRustError(output: output)
588|de2fec|            case .unknown:
589|17fb9c|                return parseGeneric(output: output)
590|a7dc16|            }
591|b31999|        } else {
592|6bd52e|            // Try all parsers and combine results
593|a709a5|            var allErrors: [ParsedError] = []
594|4120a3|            allErrors.append(contentsOf: parseSwiftError(output: output))
595|bfe2d2|            allErrors.append(contentsOf: parsePythonError(output: output))
596|6d2820|            allErrors.append(contentsOf: parseNodeError(output: output))
597|00f5ab|            allErrors.append(contentsOf: parseGccError(output: output))
598|61f1b4|            allErrors.append(contentsOf: parseRustError(output: output))
599|bddefc|            allErrors.append(contentsOf: parseGoErrorsToParsedErrors(output))
600|06bd43|            allErrors.append(contentsOf: parseRubyErrorsToParsedErrors(output))
601|3070d1|            
602|591600|            // If no specific errors found, try generic parsing
603|9ae25d|            if allErrors.isEmpty {
604|788970|                allErrors.append(contentsOf: parseGeneric(output: output))
605|a7dc16|            }
606|3070d1|            
607|ec0371|            // Remove duplicates while preserving order
608|e3fdfb|            var seen = Set<String>()
609|835b3f|            return allErrors.filter { error in
610|0e2c5d|                let key = "\(error.file):\(error.line):\(error.column)"
611|a704c8|                if seen.contains(key) {
612|df59cf|                    return false
613|4e2d32|                }
614|6a87ac|                seen.insert(key)
615|50bdea|                return true
616|a7dc16|            }
617|5f3077|        }
618|27e597|    }
619|b4687f|    
620|329539|    /// Parse error output and extract all error locations (legacy format)
621|afd3f0|    func parseErrors(from output: String, language: ErrorLocation.ErrorType? = nil) -> [ErrorLocation] {
622|d3099f|        let parsedErrors = parseErrorsToParsedErrors(from: output, language: language)
623|57e677|        return parsedErrors.map { error in
624|b4b203|            let type = language ?? detectLanguage(from: output)
625|d2e123|            return error.toErrorLocation(errorType: type, fullOutput: output)
626|5f3077|        }
627|27e597|    }
628|b4687f|    
629|14e133|    /// Navigate to a specific error location
630|c2eb9d|    func navigateToError(_ error: ErrorLocation) {
631|bf1ec3|        navigationDelegate?.navigateToFile(
632|5824b6|            error.sanitizedFile,
633|3f1c73|            line: error.line,
634|11b099|            column: error.column
635|3143a4|        )
636|27e597|    }
637|b4687f|    
638|6c7295|    /// Navigate to a specific parsed error
639|daf5f4|    func navigateToParsedError(_ error: ParsedError) {
640|bf1ec3|        navigationDelegate?.navigateToFile(
641|5824b6|            error.sanitizedFile,
642|3f1c73|            line: error.line,
643|11b099|            column: error.column
644|3143a4|        )
645|27e597|    }
646|b4687f|    
647|50a9d6|    /// Highlight all errors in an output view
648|7e746e|    func highlightErrors(in outputView: UIView, errors: [ErrorLocation]) {
649|c885b2|        errorHighlighter?.highlightErrors(in: outputView, errors: errors)
650|27e597|    }
651|b4687f|    
652|965297|    /// Highlight all parsed errors in an output view
653|13b699|    func highlightParsedErrors(in outputView: UIView, errors: [ParsedError]) {
654|655f4d|        let locations = errors.map { $0.toErrorLocation(fullOutput: "") }
655|db8816|        errorHighlighter?.highlightErrors(in: outputView, errors: locations)
656|27e597|    }
657|b4687f|    
658|4563a2|    /// Clear all error highlights from a view
659|353e74|    func clearHighlights(from view: UIView) {
660|2b80b7|        errorHighlighter?.clearHighlights(from: view)
661|27e597|    }
662|b4687f|    
663|8f5206|    // MARK: - Private Helper Methods
664|b4687f|    
665|ddccdf|    private func detectLanguage(from output: String) -> ErrorLocation.ErrorType {
666|09730a|        // Auto-detect language based on patterns in output
667|75ad8c|        if output.contains("File \"") && output.contains("Traceback") {
668|48afab|            return .python
669|eee598|        } else if output.contains("at ") && output.contains(".js:") {
670|8ced1e|            return .nodeJS
671|91e39d|        } else if output.contains(".swift:") && output.contains("error:") {
672|ce5dbf|            return .swift
673|c15af2|        } else if output.contains("error[E") && output.contains("-->") {
674|60ea5d|            return .rust
675|f73a6d|        } else if output.contains(".go:") {
676|25b895|            return .go
677|bcff79|        } else if output.contains(".rb:") && output.contains("in `") {
678|dc8932|            return .ruby
679|34d868|        } else if output.contains(".c:") || output.contains(".cpp:") || output.contains(".h:") {
680|a3e89c|            return .gcc
681|5f3077|        }
682|471f60|        return .unknown
683|27e597|    }
684|b4687f|    
685|21f42a|    // MARK: - Legacy Parsing Methods (maintained for compatibility)
686|b4687f|    
687|76d80a|    private func parseGoErrorsToParsedErrors(_ output: String) -> [ParsedError] {
688|57d34d|        var errors: [ParsedError] = []
689|587dfb|        let nsRange = NSRange(output.startIndex..., in: output)
690|ebfe3d|        let matches = goPattern.matches(in: output, range: nsRange)
691|d6ed84|        
692|847e6d|        for match in matches {
693|9e2436|            guard let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: output),
694|aa24a2|                  let lineRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: output) else {
695|1df510|                continue
696|a7dc16|            }
697|3070d1|            
698|40d9f4|            let file = String(output[fileRange])
699|af1c35|            let line = Int(output[lineRange]) ?? 1
700|487efc|            var column = 0
701|3070d1|            
702|e08c95|            if match.numberOfRanges > 3,
703|290821|               let colRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: output) {
704|3fac53|                let colString = String(output[colRange])
705|4e7762|                column = Int(colString) ?? 0
706|a7dc16|            }
707|3070d1|            
708|49ae1c|            guard let messageRange = Range(match.range(at: 4), in: output) else {
709|1df510|                continue
710|a7dc16|            }
711|c8551a|            let message = String(output[messageRange])
712|3070d1|            
713|0d070a|            errors.append(ParsedError(
714|18a4fa|                file: file,
715|39366e|                line: line,
716|7273ea|                column: column,
717|596fe8|                message: message,
718|76f119|                severity: .error
719|30ec32|            ))
720|5f3077|        }
721|d6ed84|        
722|6f1798|        return errors
723|27e597|    }
724|b4687f|    
725|120f2c|    private func parseRubyErrorsToParsedErrors(_ output: String) -> [ParsedError] {
726|57d34d|        var errors: [ParsedError] = []
727|587dfb|        let nsRange = NSRange(output.startIndex..., in: output)
728|d6ed84|        
729|64fd14|        // Parse main error line
730|93052d|        let mainMatches = rubyPattern.matches(in: output, range: nsRange)
731|d6ed84|        
732|e19e5e|        for match in mainMatches {
733|9e2436|            guard let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: output),
734|cf9ef8|                  let lineRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: output),
735|adce16|                  let funcRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: output),
736|12e8a4|                  let messageRange = Range(match.range(at: 4), in: output) else {
737|1df510|                continue
738|a7dc16|            }
739|3070d1|            
740|40d9f4|            let file = String(output[fileRange])
741|af1c35|            let line = Int(output[lineRange]) ?? 1
742|af6c49|            let function = String(output[funcRange])
743|c8551a|            let message = String(output[messageRange])
744|3070d1|            
745|0d070a|            errors.append(ParsedError(
746|18a4fa|                file: file,
747|39366e|                line: line,
748|b7efb0|                column: 0,
749|610ff8|                message: "\(message) (in '\(function)')",
750|76f119|                severity: .error
751|30ec32|            ))
752|5f3077|        }
753|d6ed84|        
754|30bca0|        // Parse traceback lines
755|7d83a5|        let traceMatches = rubyTracePattern.matches(in: output, range: nsRange)
756|d6ed84|        
757|b5826c|        for match in traceMatches {
758|9e2436|            guard let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: output),
759|aa24a2|                  let lineRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: output) else {
760|1df510|                continue
761|a7dc16|            }
762|3070d1|            
763|40d9f4|            let file = String(output[fileRange])
764|af1c35|            let line = Int(output[lineRange]) ?? 1
765|3070d1|            
766|0d070a|            errors.append(ParsedError(
767|18a4fa|                file: file,
768|39366e|                line: line,
769|b7efb0|                column: 0,
770|b86d57|                message: "Called from traceback",
771|9cae7c|                severity: .note
772|30ec32|            ))
773|5f3077|        }
774|d6ed84|        
775|6f1798|        return errors
776|27e597|    }
777|b31277|}

779|f7530a|// MARK: - Error Highlighter
780|adc83b|
781|47348d|/// Handles visual highlighting of errors in output views
782|1e8861|class ErrorHighlighter {
783|b4687f|    
784|3f70f8|    private var highlightViews: [UIView] = []
785|b4687f|    
786|dcf911|    /// Highlight error locations in a text view
787|7e746e|    func highlightErrors(in outputView: UIView, errors: [ErrorLocation]) {
788|762079|        clearHighlights(from: outputView)
789|d6ed84|        
790|4c0ed3|        guard let textView = outputView as? UITextView else {
791|751fd9|            // For non-text views, add overlay highlights
792|58ea54|            addOverlayHighlights(to: outputView, errors: errors)
793|bef5d6|            return
794|5f3077|        }
795|d6ed84|        
796|8b2e8e|        highlightInTextView(textView, errors: errors)
797|27e597|    }
798|b4687f|    
799|e8510e|    /// Clear all highlights from a view
800|353e74|    func clearHighlights(from view: UIView) {
801|08ac99|        for highlightView in highlightViews {
802|7c5272|            highlightView.removeFromSuperview()
803|5f3077|        }
804|e9ec4d|        highlightViews.removeAll()
805|d6ed84|        
806|0f3469|        // Reset text view attributes if applicable
807|85eee7|        if let textView = view as? UITextView {
808|201d60|            let text = textView.text
809|a127ba|            textView.attributedText = NSAttributedString(string: text)
810|5f3077|        }
811|27e597|    }
812|b4687f|    
813|049941|    // MARK: - Private Methods
814|b4687f|    
815|e22ba9|    private func highlightInTextView(_ textView: UITextView, errors: [ErrorLocation]) {
816|2f71ae|        guard !errors.isEmpty else { return }
817|d6ed84|        
818|9238f3|        let attributedText = NSMutableAttributedString(string: textView.text)
819|2dbd96|        let text = textView.text
820|d6ed84|        
821|ee3291|        // Set default attributes
822|dc9a81|        let fullRange = NSRange(location: 0, length: text.count)
823|aad3d0|        attributedText.addAttribute(
824|48dfef|            .foregroundColor,
825|b79871|            value: UIColor.label,
826|278cde|            range: fullRange
827|3143a4|        )
828|d6ed84|        
829|bf6af6|        // Highlight each error location
830|6588d5|        for error in errors {
831|f8388d|            // Find the location string in the text
832|0c58a3|            let locationString = error.locationString
833|a14a4f|            if let range = text.range(of: locationString) {
834|3664a3|                let nsRange = NSRange(range, in: text)
835|216278|                
836|a4ef67|                // Apply error styling
837|4cbfc8|                attributedText.addAttribute(
838|c437e2|                    .backgroundColor,
839|5662c7|                    value: UIColor.systemRed.withAlphaComponent(0.3),
840|9bfaef|                    range: nsRange
841|6f642e|                )
842|4cbfc8|                attributedText.addAttribute(
843|d21c6d|                    .foregroundColor,
844|3ec0cf|                    value: UIColor.systemRed,
845|9bfaef|                    range: nsRange
846|6f642e|                )
847|4cbfc8|                attributedText.addAttribute(
848|3ac709|                    .underlineStyle,
849|3ff5b6|                    value: NSUnderlineStyle.single.rawValue,
850|9bfaef|                    range: nsRange
851|6f642e|                )
852|a7dc16|            }
853|3070d1|            
854|af1192|            // Also try to find and highlight the error message
855|893b0a|            if let messageRange = text.range(of: error.message) {
856|870817|                let nsRange = NSRange(messageRange, in: text)
857|4cbfc8|                attributedText.addAttribute(
858|d21c6d|                    .foregroundColor,
859|3ec0cf|                    value: UIColor.systemRed,
860|9bfaef|                    range: nsRange
861|6f642e|                )
862|a7dc16|            }
863|5f3077|        }
864|d6ed84|        
865|b47883|        textView.attributedText = attributedText
866|27e597|    }
867|b4687f|    
868|7f56d2|    private func addOverlayHighlights(to view: UIView, errors: [ErrorLocation]) {
869|ebbab7|        // Add a badge showing error count
870|1ea415|        let badge = UILabel()
871|363dd4|        badge.text = "\(errors.count) error\(errors.count == 1 ? "" : "s")"
872|53532f|        badge.font = UIFont.preferredFont(forTextStyle: .caption1)
873|9e1e82|        badge.textColor = .white
874|ceee64|        badge.backgroundColor = .systemRed
875|5b2115|        badge.textAlignment = .center
876|418c5a|        badge.layer.cornerRadius = 4
877|047d60|        badge.clipsToBounds = true
878|d6ed84|        
879|cb1e7b|        badge.translatesAutoresizingMaskIntoConstraints = false
880|d2ae20|        view.addSubview(badge)
881|d6ed84|        
882|c31f08|        NSLayoutConstraint.activate([
883|170c62|            badge.topAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.topAnchor, constant: 8),
884|120a64|            badge.trailingAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.trailingAnchor, constant: -8),
885|cc557b|            badge.widthAnchor.constraint(greaterThanOrEqualToConstant: 60),
886|65a01b|            badge.heightAnchor.constraint(equalToConstant: 20)
887|082e2d|        ])
888|d6ed84|        
889|3b8efd|        highlightViews.append(badge)
890|27e597|    }
891|b31277|}

896|adc83b|
897|92a882|/// SwiftUI view modifier for error highlighting
898|07b677|struct ErrorHighlightModifier: ViewModifier {
899|b6dbc7|    let errors: [ErrorLocation]
900|190f98|    let parser: ErrorParser
901|b4687f|    
902|881671|    func body(content: Content) -> some View {
903|9749af|        content
904|18f111|            .overlay(
905|2d2b57|                ErrorBadgeView(errors: errors)
906|cc57fe|                    .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, maxHeight: .infinity, alignment: .topTrailing)
907|d79a18|                    .padding(8)
908|43d041|            )
909|27e597|    }
910|b31277|}
911|adc83b|
912|067d9b|/// Badge showing error count
913|53b20f|struct ErrorBadgeView: View {
914|b6dbc7|    let errors: [ErrorLocation]
915|b4687f|    
916|504e43|    var body: some View {
917|249108|        if errors.isEmpty {
918|2d07b8|            EmptyView()
919|b31999|        } else {
920|8e935a|            Text("\(errors.count) error\(errors.count == 1 ? "" : "s")")
921|916793|                .font(.caption)
922|3263f8|                .padding(.horizontal, 8)
923|4b050c|                .padding(.vertical, 4)
924|938c35|                .background(Color.red.opacity(0.8))
925|52ba43|                .foregroundColor(.white)
926|ad2177|                .cornerRadius(4)
927|5f3077|        }
928|27e597|    }
929|b31277|}
930|adc83b|
931|3f9fd6|/// SwiftUI view modifier for parsed error highlighting
932|90360a|struct ParsedErrorHighlightModifier: ViewModifier {
933|8f3048|    let errors: [ParsedError]
934|b4687f|    
935|881671|    func body(content: Content) -> some View {
936|9749af|        content
937|18f111|            .overlay(
938|5cd1e2|                ParsedErrorBadgeView(errors: errors)
939|cc57fe|                    .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, maxHeight: .infinity, alignment: .topTrailing)
940|d79a18|                    .padding(8)
941|43d041|            )
942|27e597|    }
943|b31277|}
944|adc83b|
945|75dbd9|/// Badge showing parsed error count with severity breakdown
946|8d0175|struct ParsedErrorBadgeView: View {
947|8f3048|    let errors: [ParsedError]
948|b4687f|    
949|fc106f|    private var errorCount: Int {
950|424a18|        errors.filter { $0.severity == .error }.count
951|27e597|    }
952|b4687f|    
953|81da33|    private var warningCount: Int {
954|ac5d7f|        errors.filter { $0.severity == .warning }.count
955|27e597|    }
956|b4687f|    
957|504e43|    var body: some View {
958|249108|        if errors.isEmpty {
959|2d07b8|            EmptyView()
960|b31999|        } else {
961|c0775d|            HStack(spacing: 8) {
962|314ffe|                if errorCount > 0 {
963|56f5c8|                    Text("\(errorCount) E")
964|cdb0af|                        .font(.caption)
965|39ab79|                        .padding(.horizontal, 6)
966|dd7d22|                        .padding(.vertical, 4)
967|616e8c|                        .background(Color.red.opacity(0.8))
968|b1d8de|                        .foregroundColor(.white)
969|61663b|                        .cornerRadius(4)
970|4e2d32|                }
971|443ee5|                if warningCount > 0 {
972|91a1df|                    Text("\(warningCount) W")
973|cdb0af|                        .font(.caption)
974|39ab79|                        .padding(.horizontal, 6)
975|dd7d22|                        .padding(.vertical, 4)
976|98d0c7|                        .background(Color.yellow.opacity(0.8))
977|092d9d|                        .foregroundColor(.black)
978|61663b|                        .cornerRadius(4)
979|4e2d32|                }
980|a7dc16|            }
981|5f3077|        }
982|27e597|    }
983|b31277|}
984|adc83b|

222|4e2d32|                }

226|a7dc16|            }
227|40cfc4|            return true

263|441de9|    private func buildFileTree(at url: URL) -> FileTreeNode? {
264|a367ea|        let fileManager = FileManager.default
265|adc83b|
266|4da690|        do {
267|45bac6|            let resourceValues = try url.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey, .nameKey])
268|06b9e9|            let isDirectory = resourceValues.isDirectory ?? false
269|2496f5|            let name = resourceValues.name ?? url.lastPathComponent
270|adc83b|
271|8a6b94|            if isDirectory {
272|2a0651|                let contents = try fileManager.contentsOfDirectory(
273|81f0bc|                    at: url,
274|f8247b|                    includingPropertiesForKeys: [.isDirectoryKey],
275|710ee3|                    options: [.skipsHiddenFiles]
276|6f642e|                )
277|c19b31|                let children = contents.compactMap { buildFileTree(at: $0) }.sorted { $0.name < $1.name }
278|f12663|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: true, children: children)
279|f5a6eb|            } else {
280|0a1aa4|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: false, children: [])
281|a7dc16|            }
282|853889|        } catch {
283|8e9e2d|            print("Error building file tree at \(url): \(error)")
284|1c8557|            return nil
285|5f3077|        }
286|27e597|    }

298|c1ef96|    private func uniqueDestinationURL(for initial: URL, fileManager: FileManager) -> URL {
299|690372|        if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: initial.path) { return initial }
300|adc83b|
301|e383c4|        let folder = initial.deletingLastPathComponent()
302|75aa53|        let isDirectory = (try? initial.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey]).isDirectory) ?? initial.hasDirectoryPath
303|adc83b|
304|b8c47e|        let baseName = initial.deletingPathExtension().lastPathComponent
305|ef2053|        let ext = initial.pathExtension
306|adc83b|
307|48b2e9|        var counter = 1
308|722ae9|        while true {
309|41dfde|            let candidateName: String
310|f8f674|            if ext.isEmpty {
311|943330|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter)"
312|f5a6eb|            } else {
313|b2e7c3|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter).\(ext)"
314|a7dc16|            }
315|adc83b|
316|80986c|            let candidate = folder.appendingPathComponent(candidateName, isDirectory: isDirectory)
317|840e8b|            if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: candidate.path) {
318|659238|                return candidate
319|a7dc16|            }
320|484fa6|            counter += 1
321|5f3077|        }
322|27e597|    }

153|d6ed84|

155|86ed4b|            "client_id": Self.clientID,
156|63faec|            "scope": Self.scope

159|d6ed84|

169|63ff7f|                throw GitHubAuthError.deviceFlowFailed("HTTP \(httpResponse.statusCode): \(errorBody)")
170|a7dc16|            }
171|3070d1|            
172|dc8a03|            let decoder = JSONDecoder()

174|3defcd|            self.deviceCodeResponse = deviceCode
175|3070d1|

178|3070d1|

181|25ae70|                await UIApplication.shared.open(verifyURL)
182|a7dc16|            }
183|3070d1|            
184|4e1018|            // Start polling for token
185|9add0f|            startPolling(
186|44754d|                deviceCode: deviceCode.deviceCode,
187|43470e|                interval: deviceCode.interval,
188|54e876|                expiresIn: deviceCode.expiresIn
189|43d041|            )
190|3070d1|            
191|086e8f|        } catch let error as GitHubAuthError {
192|42793f|            self.errorMessage = error.localizedDescription

194|853889|        } catch {

203|463ea2|    /// Step 2: Poll GitHub until user authorizes (or timeout)
204|f74cbb|    private func startPolling(deviceCode: String, interval: Int, expiresIn: Int) {
205|fd9eb9|        // Cancel any existing poll
206|34c205|        pollTask?.cancel()
207|780222|        isPolling = true
208|d6ed84|        
209|7bc0a7|        pollTask = Task {
210|683a9c|            let pollInterval = max(interval, 5) // GitHub minimum is 5 seconds
211|49b210|            let deadline = Date().addingTimeInterval(TimeInterval(expiresIn))
212|3070d1|            
213|dac4c4|            while !Task.isCancelled && Date() < deadline {
214|0def4c|                // Wait the required interval
215|89d237|                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: UInt64(pollInterval) * 1_000_000_000)
216|216278|                
217|bc71c9|                guard !Task.isCancelled else { break }
218|216278|                
219|a9ed45|                do {
220|329790|                    let token = try await pollForToken(deviceCode: deviceCode)
221|dd2193|                    
222|7dcb0d|                    // Success! Save token and fetch user
223|8e6188|                    try? KeychainManager.shared.saveGitHubToken(token)
224|e3777a|                    self.isAuthenticated = true
225|be724b|                    self.isPolling = false
226|536f8b|                    self.deviceCodeResponse = nil
227|dd2193|                    
228|5ed0e2|                    try? await fetchUser(token: token)
229|dd2193|                    
230|03abf0|                    print("[GitHubAuth] Successfully authenticated!")
231|dd2193|                    
232|433a32|                    // Notify other parts of the app
233|ec4297|                    NotificationCenter.default.post(
234|3740e3|                        name: NSNotification.Name("GitHubAuthDidChange"),
235|115d90|                        object: nil,
236|d0b441|                        userInfo: ["authenticated": true]
237|1961a4|                    )
238|d253ab|                    return
239|dd2193|                    
240|2559bc|                } catch GitHubAuthError.tokenPollDenied {
241|fca15e|                    self.errorMessage = "Login was denied."
242|be724b|                    self.isPolling = false
243|536f8b|                    self.deviceCodeResponse = nil
244|d253ab|                    return
245|dd2193|                    
246|eceb72|                } catch GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired {
247|1af66c|                    // Keep polling until deadline
248|f41bef|                    continue
249|dd2193|                    
250|6bf1ca|                } catch {
251|6d6a4c|                    // authorization_pending - keep polling
252|f41bef|                    continue
253|4e2d32|                }
254|a7dc16|            }
255|3070d1|            
256|8a21bd|            // Timed out
257|a8f1c2|            if !Task.isCancelled {
258|d00484|                self.errorMessage = "Login timed out. Please try again."
259|95ab45|                self.isPolling = false
260|b2bc23|                self.deviceCodeResponse = nil
261|a7dc16|            }
262|5f3077|        }
263|27e597|    }
264|b4687f|    
265|5c071c|    /// Single poll attempt to exchange device code for token
266|8fdc58|    private func pollForToken(deviceCode: String) async throws -> String {
267|3b9f39|        let url = URL(string: "https://github.com/login/oauth/access_token")!
268|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
269|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
270|3fa184|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Accept")
271|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
272|d6ed84|        
273|90fe0a|        let body: [String: String] = [
274|86ed4b|            "client_id": Self.clientID,
275|155c27|            "device_code": deviceCode,
276|78700f|            "grant_type": "urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:device_code"
277|220505|        ]
278|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
279|d6ed84|        
280|251aeb|        let (data, _) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
281|d6ed84|        
282|7f28b2|        // Parse response
283|eb46b7|        guard let json = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any] else {
284|fce97b|            throw GitHubAuthError.invalidResponse
285|5f3077|        }
286|d6ed84|        
287|a20373|        // Check for access token
288|e54ce0|        if let accessToken = json["access_token"] as? String {
289|5f184c|            return accessToken
290|5f3077|        }
291|d6ed84|        
292|117542|        // Check for error states
293|e969c8|        if let error = json["error"] as? String {
294|da39ef|            switch error {
295|f29883|            case "authorization_pending":
296|15ace7|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired // Not really expired, just pending
297|938a8b|            case "slow_down":
298|2dcdae|                // Need to increase interval - sleep extra 5 seconds
299|0ec537|                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 5_000_000_000)
300|a2c53f|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired
301|6475f3|            case "expired_token":
302|a2c53f|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired
303|354722|            case "access_denied":
304|7c97f9|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollDenied
305|ea3438|            default:
306|6fb117|                let description = json["error_description"] as? String ?? error
307|6503e4|                throw GitHubAuthError.deviceFlowFailed(description)
308|a7dc16|            }
309|5f3077|        }
310|d6ed84|        
311|f01e4e|        throw GitHubAuthError.invalidResponse
312|27e597|    }
313|b4687f|    
314|265ecc|    // MARK: - Fetch User
315|b4687f|    
316|975a6e|    func fetchUser(token: String? = nil) async throws {
317|487094|        let authToken = token ?? KeychainManager.shared.getGitHubToken()
318|a15a83|        guard let authToken else {
319|a782aa|            throw GitHubAuthError.userFetchFailed("No token available")
320|5f3077|        }
321|d6ed84|        
322|9730a7|        let url = URL(string: "https://api.github.com/user")!
323|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
324|136018|        request.setValue("Bearer \(authToken)", forHTTPHeaderField: "Authorization")
325|58101d|        request.setValue("application/vnd.github+json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Accept")
326|d6ed84|        
327|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
328|d6ed84|        
329|3a0c01|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse,
330|acd675|              httpResponse.statusCode == 200 else {
331|18d01d|            let statusCode = (response as? HTTPURLResponse)?.statusCode ?? -1
332|c4bb91|            throw GitHubAuthError.userFetchFailed("HTTP \(statusCode)")
333|5f3077|        }
334|d6ed84|        
335|900ed2|        let decoder = JSONDecoder()
336|2135f0|        self.user = try decoder.decode(GitHubUser.self, from: data)
337|27e597|    }
338|b4687f|    
339|62b3c3|    // MARK: - Logout
340|b4687f|

342|34c205|        pollTask?.cancel()
343|ffbaca|        pollTask = nil
344|ca7dff|        isPolling = false
345|dc2ea0|        deviceCodeResponse = nil
346|d6ed84|

348|579d6c|        isAuthenticated = false

350|5a9168|        errorMessage = nil
351|d6ed84|        
352|63edcc|        NotificationCenter.default.post(
353|277513|            name: NSNotification.Name("GitHubAuthDidChange"),
354|33f159|            object: nil,
355|47a97c|            userInfo: ["authenticated": false]
356|3143a4|        )
357|d6ed84|        
358|1aeafb|        print("[GitHubAuth] Logged out")

363|477f9c|    func cancelLogin() {
364|34c205|        pollTask?.cancel()
365|ffbaca|        pollTask = nil
366|ca7dff|        isPolling = false
367|dc2ea0|        deviceCodeResponse = nil
368|295f36|        isLoading = false

9|bd7a91|/// Lightweight in-memory git state + mocked operations.

19|adc83b|
20|14a687|    /// Commits not pushed
21|2c2fe3|    @Published var aheadCount: Int = 0
22|adc83b|
23|72c810|    /// Remote commits not pulled
24|470fd2|    @Published var behindCount: Int = 0
25|adc83b|
26|8364fc|    @Published var stashes: [GitStash] = []
27|adc83b|
28|c43ba1|    @Published var isBusy: Bool = false
29|b4687f|

31|b4687f|    
32|ec07bb|    @Published var lastErrorMessage: String? = nil
33|adc83b|
34|54113e|    private init() {}
35|b4687f|

39|e7a97a|            self.currentBranch = branch
40|f7aca3|            self.isBusy = false

43|27e597|    }

49|5f3077|        }
50|3fe7b8|        isBusy = true

214|5f3077|        }

223|d6ed84|

227|5f3077|        }
228|d6ed84|

230|3d5fa5|            guard let working = status.working else { return nil }
231|c3fce9|            return GitFileChange(path: status.path, kind: mapStatusType(working), staged: false)
232|5f3077|        }
233|d6ed84|

237|5f3077|        }
238|d6ed84|        
239|e17e18|        // Recent commits
240|1f2245|        let commits = reader.recentCommits(count: 20)
241|ae143e|        recentCommits = commits.map { commit in

243|5f3077|        }

258|7a1b57|    /// Build a real diff for a working-copy file against HEAD (offline, using NativeGitReader).
259|422db6|    func diffWorkingCopyToHEAD(path: String, kind: GitChangeKind) async -> DiffFile? {
260|a40fde|        guard let repoURL = workingDirectory else { return nil }
261|d6ed84|        
262|0dc171|        return await Task.detached {
263|3519ac|            guard let reader = NativeGitReader(repositoryURL: repoURL) else { return nil }
264|3070d1|            
265|83a740|            let headSha = reader.headSHA()
266|85bb51|            let oldText = reader.fileContentsString(atPath: path, commitSHA: headSha) ?? ""
267|3070d1|            
268|b35691|            let workingURL = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(path)
269|567024|            let newText = (try? String(contentsOf: workingURL, encoding: .utf8)) ?? ""
270|3070d1|            
271|848698|            return DiffBuilder.build(
272|d02bb2|                fileName: path,
273|7e8d9b|                status: kind.rawValue,
274|7f9b45|                old: oldText,
275|87834e|                new: newText
276|43d041|            )
277|2ecb78|        }.value
278|27e597|    }

324|5f3077|        }

328|d578f4|        try "ref: refs/heads/\(branch)\n".write(to: headPath, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
329|d6ed84|

331|61ed9d|        await refresh()
332|27e597|    }

398|3b3ea2|    func discard(file: String) async throws {
399|ad5dbf|        // Discard changes by restoring from HEAD
400|7ac4a0|        guard let repoURL = workingDirectory,
401|4ba5ca|              let reader = nativeReader else {
402|2085bb|            throw GitManagerError.invalidRepository
403|5f3077|        }
404|d6ed84|        
405|c615d4|        // Get file content from HEAD
406|e2e112|        if let headSHA = reader.headSHA(),
407|5eb0d8|           let content = reader.fileContentsString(atPath: file, commitSHA: headSHA) {
408|e883ab|            let filePath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(file)
409|144328|            try content.write(to: filePath, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
410|b31999|        } else {
411|37d681|            // File doesn't exist in HEAD - delete it
412|e883ab|            let filePath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(file)
413|7528cd|            try? FileManager.default.removeItem(at: filePath)
414|5f3077|        }
415|d6ed84|        
416|61ed9d|        await refresh()
417|27e597|    }

422|025908|            try await discard(file: change.path)
423|5f3077|        }
424|9f2c52|        for file in untrackedFiles {
425|6e5080|            guard let repoURL = workingDirectory else { continue }
426|079d80|            let filePath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(file.path)
427|7528cd|            try? FileManager.default.removeItem(at: filePath)
428|5f3077|        }
429|61ed9d|        await refresh()
430|27e597|    }
431|b4687f|    
432|83db62|    func discardChanges(file: String) async throws {
433|ec122b|        try await discard(file: file)
434|27e597|    }
435|b4687f|    
436|7b4d97|    func fetch() async throws {
437|8b5f97|        // Fetch requires network - same as pull
438|2ad072|        try await pull()

245|8160ec|    /// VS Code `launch.json` often uses JSON with comments (JSONC). This strips
246|11a55b|    /// both `//` line comments and `/* ... */` block comments.
247|fb989d|    private static func stripJSONComments(_ input: String) -> String {
248|e91279|        // Remove block comments first.
249|5749dc|        let blockPattern = "/\\*[^*]*\\*+(?:[^/*][^*]*\\*+)*/"
250|e0e74b|        let linePattern = "(?m)//.*$"
251|adc83b|
252|aec1b9|        let withoutBlocks = input.replacingOccurrences(of: blockPattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)

254|2c31a3|        return withoutLines
255|27e597|    }

68|d6ed84|        
69|b25cd9|        if existingStatus == errSecSuccess {
70|5c5459|            // Update existing item

197|c3a08d|    /// Build a keychain query dictionary

335|f7113a|    func maskAPIKey(_ key: String) -> String {
336|7d22af|        guard key.count > 8 else { return "****" }
337|144aa0|        let prefix = String(key.prefix(4))

339|dac2af|        return "\(prefix)...\(suffix)"

366|a7dc16|            }

188|7aea86|    /// Patch tokenizer_config.json to fix known issues with MLX community models.
189|2cbc84|    ///
190|0b5bd8|    /// ## Nanbeige 4.1 Chat Template Fix
191|2cbc84|    ///
192|a45827|    /// **Problem:** `mlx-community/Nanbeige4.1-3B-heretic-4bit` is missing the `chat_template`
193|a8d0ea|    /// field entirely in its `tokenizer_config.json`. The official `Nanbeige/Nanbeige4.1-3B` has
194|abe787|    /// the template, but the MLX community quantization stripped it out. Without a chat template,
195|473ad3|    /// the model receives raw unformatted text instead of properly delimited messages, causing
196|d68212|    /// broken/looping output.
197|2cbc84|    ///
198|e24a63|    /// **Root Cause:** Nanbeige uses non-standard STX/ETX control characters (U+0002/U+0003)
199|4933b8|    /// as message delimiters instead of ChatML's `<|im_start|>/<|im_end|>` tokens. Format:
200|5ac9b4|    /// ```
201|aa8a94|    /// ␂system\n{system_prompt}␃\n
202|499cc3|    /// ␂user\n{user_message}␃\n
203|b4a140|    /// ␂assistant\n{response}␃\n
204|5ac9b4|    /// ```
205|dfda8b|    /// The official template also defaults to Chinese system prompts ("你是南北阁...").
206|2cbc84|    ///
207|ed7654|    /// **Fix:** Two cases:
208|5a42c5|    /// 1. MLX version (no template): Inject full Jinja template with STX/ETX tokens + English defaults
209|05cc99|    /// 2. Official version (Chinese defaults): String-replace Chinese prompts with English equivalents
210|2cbc84|    ///
211|7d8d3c|    /// ## TokenizerClass Fix
212|2cbc84|    ///
213|f8be54|    /// The MLX version also uses `"TokenizersBackend"` as `tokenizer_class`, which
214|12ef07|    /// `swift-transformers` doesn't recognize. We patch it to `"PreTrainedTokenizerFast"`.
215|2cbc84|    ///
216|458bb8|    /// - Parameter url: Path to the downloaded `tokenizer_config.json`
217|bbb846|    private func patchTokenizerConfig(at url: URL) throws {
218|7dcb26|        let data = try Data(contentsOf: url)
219|9f35b7|        guard var json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any] else { return }
220|d6ed84|        
221|5d331a|        var needsWrite = false
222|65d968|        let tokenizerClass = json["tokenizer_class"] as? String ?? ""
223|d6ed84|        
224|e4affc|        // Fix non-standard tokenizer classes that swift-transformers doesn't recognize
225|697e82|        if tokenizerClass == "TokenizersBackend" {
226|9c6f93|            json["tokenizer_class"] = "PreTrainedTokenizerFast"
227|fdd298|            print("[LocalLLM] Patched tokenizer_class: \(tokenizerClass) -> PreTrainedTokenizerFast")
228|8b1a9f|            needsWrite = true
229|5f3077|        }
230|d6ed84|        
231|a3249e|        // Nanbeige MLX version is MISSING chat_template entirely - must add full template
232|c727fd|        let existingTemplate = json["chat_template"] as? String
233|0b19c4|        let isNanbeige = url.path.lowercased().contains("nanbeige")
234|d6ed84|        
235|7c1a07|        if isNanbeige && (existingTemplate == nil || existingTemplate?.isEmpty == true) {
236|106acd|            // Full Nanbeige template with English defaults (from official repo)
237|3dce45|            // Uses special tokens: ␂system, ␃, ␂user, ␂assistant, etc.
238|51b788|            let nanbeigeTemplate = """
239|574591|{%- if messages[0]['role'] == 'system' -%}
240|799d9d|{{- '\u{0002}system\n' + messages[0]['content'] + '\u{0003}\n' -}}
241|a01acf|{%- else -%}
242|15ae22|{{- '\u{0002}system\nYou are a helpful coding assistant. Always respond in English.\u{0003}\n' -}}
243|14e4f2|{%- endif -%}
244|f60180|{%- for message in messages -%}
245|7bf0d8|{%- if message['role'] == 'user' -%}
246|9eb39a|{{- '\u{0002}user\n' + message['content'] + '\u{0003}\n' -}}
247|b7e345|{%- elif message['role'] == 'assistant' -%}
248|3ef1d3|{{- '\u{0002}assistant\n' + message['content'] + '\u{0003}\n' -}}
249|14e4f2|{%- endif -%}
250|617545|{%- endfor -%}
251|9361ae|{%- if add_generation_prompt -%}
252|0c97c4|{{- '\u{0002}assistant\n' -}}
253|14e4f2|{%- endif -%}
254|e4615a|"""
255|de0b01|            json["chat_template"] = nanbeigeTemplate
256|f8c633|            print("[LocalLLM] Added Nanbeige chat_template (was missing in MLX version)")
257|8b1a9f|            needsWrite = true
258|c7757d|        } else if let template = existingTemplate, template.contains("你是南北阁") {
259|83aa9f|            // Official version has template but with Chinese - replace with English
260|4f1c0a|            var patched = template
261|265ecc|            patched = patched.replacingOccurrences(
262|9b5091|                of: "你是南北阁，一款由BOSS直聘自主研发并训练的专业大语言模型。",
263|56d38a|                with: "You are a helpful coding assistant. Always respond in English."
264|43d041|            )
265|265ecc|            patched = patched.replacingOccurrences(
266|887387|                of: "你是一位工具函数调用专家，你会得到一个问题和一组可能的工具函数。根据问题，你需要进行一个或多个函数/工具调用以实现目的，请尽量尝试探索通过工具解决问题。\n如果没有一个函数可以使用，请直接使用自然语言回复用户。\n如果给定的问题缺少函数所需的参数，请使用自然语言进行提问，向用户询问必要信息。\n如果调用结果已经足够回答用户问题，请对历史结果进行总结，使用自然语言回复用户。",
267|e3e136|                with: "You are a tool function expert. Based on the question, make function calls to achieve the goal. Always respond in English."
268|43d041|            )
269|b13f0a|            json["chat_template"] = patched
270|519888|            print("[LocalLLM] Patched Nanbeige: replaced Chinese defaults with English")
271|8b1a9f|            needsWrite = true
272|5f3077|        }
273|d6ed84|        
274|9bb1a4|        if needsWrite {
275|087460|            let patched = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: json, options: [.prettyPrinted, .sortedKeys])
276|a03c25|            try patched.write(to: url)
277|5f3077|        }
278|27e597|    }

289|26f7b8|    /// Clear all cached models to force re-download with fixed templates
290|302181|    func clearModelCache() {
291|e5b060|        unloadModel()
292|d6ed84|

314|72eb88|    // MARK: - Chat Interface (non-streaming)
315|b4687f|    
316|07dae2|    func chat(messages: [(role: String, content: String)], systemPrompt: String? = nil) async throws -> String {
317|ec510f|        guard isModelLoaded, let container = modelContainer else {
318|57ecf6|            throw LocalLLMError.modelNotLoaded
319|5f3077|        }
320|d6ed84|        
321|4e596a|        guard !isGenerating else {
322|9094d3|            throw LocalLLMError.alreadyGenerating
323|5f3077|        }
324|d6ed84|        
325|446c05|        isGenerating = true
326|8830ac|        defer { isGenerating = false }
327|d6ed84|        
328|f32e1d|        let system = systemPrompt ?? defaultSystemPrompt
329|85fbf7|        let session = MLXChatSession(container, instructions: system, generateParameters: generateParams)
330|d6ed84|        
331|f7e1c3|        // Get last user message only
332|308cc9|        let lastUserMessage = messages.last(where: { $0.role == "user" })?.content ?? ""
333|d6ed84|        
334|3ff51d|        let response = try await session.respond(to: lastUserMessage)
335|d6ed84|        
336|04d412|        // Strip thinking tags
337|198207|        let cleaned = stripThinkingTags(response)
338|d35461|        return cleaned.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
339|27e597|    }
