72|f1db3d|    func refreshStatus() {
73|3fe7b8|        isBusy = true
74|5b07be|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.4) {
75|b4dd6e|            self.statusText = "On branch \(self.currentBranch)\n" +
76|080db7|            "Your branch is up to date with 'origin/\(self.currentBranch)'.\n\n" +
77|0f6d37|            "Changes not staged for commit:\n" +
78|55438a|            "  modified:   ContentView.swift\n" +
79|266684|            "  modified:   README.md"
80|f7aca3|            self.isBusy = false
81|5f3077|        }
82|27e597|    }
83|adc83b|
84|e92111|    func commit(message: String) {
85|3fe7b8|        isBusy = true
86|145a34|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.8) {
87|04295e|            self.aheadCount += 1
88|b4dd6e|            self.statusText = "On branch \(self.currentBranch)\n" +
89|8958eb|            "Your branch is ahead of 'origin/\(self.currentBranch)' by \(self.aheadCount) commit(s).\n\n" +
90|21e260|            "nothing to commit, working tree clean"
91|f7aca3|            self.isBusy = false
92|5f3077|        }
93|27e597|    }
94|adc83b|
95|cdc5c9|    func pull() {
96|3fe7b8|        isBusy = true
97|145a34|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.8) {
98|3c3495|            if self.behindCount > 0 {
99|4fb755|                self.behindCount = 0
100|a7dc16|            }
101|b4dd6e|            self.statusText = "On branch \(self.currentBranch)\n" +
102|b4e992|            "Already up to date."
103|f7aca3|            self.isBusy = false
104|5f3077|        }
105|27e597|    }
106|adc83b|
107|6ae160|    func push() {
108|3fe7b8|        isBusy = true
109|145a34|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.8) {
110|71ac8a|            if self.aheadCount > 0 {
111|02a64f|                self.aheadCount = 0
112|a7dc16|            }
113|b4dd6e|            self.statusText = "On branch \(self.currentBranch)\n" +
114|d615dd|            "Everything up-to-date"
115|f7aca3|            self.isBusy = false
116|5f3077|        }
117|27e597|    }
118|adc83b|
119|be1804|    // MARK: - Stash
120|adc83b|
121|d58a1b|    func stashSave(message: String?) {
122|3fe7b8|        isBusy = true
123|5b07be|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.4) {
124|a21659|            let trimmed = (message ?? "").trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
125|5c3d57|            let msg = trimmed.isEmpty ? "WIP on \(self.currentBranch)" : trimmed
126|69b2a1|            self.stashes.insert(GitStash(message: msg, date: Date()), at: 0)
127|c1d148|            self.statusText = "Saved working directory and index state: \(msg)"
128|f7aca3|            self.isBusy = false
129|5f3077|        }
130|27e597|    }
131|adc83b|
132|de20de|    func stashApply(index: Int) {
133|91826e|        guard stashes.indices.contains(index) else { return }
134|3fe7b8|        isBusy = true
135|7d951c|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.5) {
136|85868c|            self.statusText = "Applied stash@{\(index)}: \(self.stashes[index].message)"
137|f7aca3|            self.isBusy = false
138|5f3077|        }
139|27e597|    }
140|adc83b|
141|3d2837|    func stashPop(index: Int) {
142|91826e|        guard stashes.indices.contains(index) else { return }
143|3fe7b8|        isBusy = true
144|7d951c|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.5) {
145|c4fb80|            let msg = self.stashes[index].message
146|103eb1|            self.stashes.remove(at: index)
147|308397|            self.statusText = "Dropped stash@{\(index)}: \(msg)"
148|f7aca3|            self.isBusy = false
149|5f3077|        }
150|27e597|    }

68|69d728|@MainActor
69|3b3c5b|class ExtensionManager: ObservableObject {
70|ca6478|    static let shared = ExtensionManager()

72|6691b7|    @Published var installedExtensions: [IDEExtension] = []
73|cbcb7b|    @Published var catalogExtensions: [IDEExtension] = []
74|633dd8|    @Published var searchText: String = ""
75|922a8d|    @Published var selectedFilter: ExtensionFilter = .installed
76|c5937e|    @Published var selectedCategory: ExtensionCategory? = nil

86|724bcf|    // MARK: - Filtered Results
87|b4687f|    
88|2f0226|    var filteredExtensions: [IDEExtension] {
89|7a53ec|        var results: [IDEExtension]
90|d6ed84|        
91|15b4a1|        switch selectedFilter {
92|dfca12|        case .installed:
93|40bd83|            results = catalogExtensions.filter { $0.isInstalled }
94|7b5ef3|        case .recommended:
95|aa0b4f|            results = catalogExtensions.filter { !$0.isInstalled && $0.rating >= 4.0 }
96|db247e|        case .popular:
97|0e1a4a|            results = catalogExtensions.sorted { $0.downloadCount > $1.downloadCount }
98|35ffb3|        case .all:
99|64c215|            results = catalogExtensions
100|5f3077|        }
101|d6ed84|        
102|7b6678|        if let category = selectedCategory {
103|30baaf|            results = results.filter { $0.category == category }
104|5f3077|        }
105|d6ed84|        
106|c3a36a|        if !searchText.isEmpty {
107|725d7c|            let query = searchText.lowercased()
108|fb0de6|            results = results.filter {
109|1a313a|                $0.name.lowercased().contains(query) ||
110|23162d|                $0.displayName.lowercased().contains(query) ||
111|44ed96|                $0.publisher.lowercased().contains(query) ||
112|0baf55|                $0.description.lowercased().contains(query)
113|a7dc16|            }
114|5f3077|        }
115|d6ed84|        
116|32b4af|        return results
117|27e597|    }

161|b84217|        let installed = catalogExtensions.filter { $0.isInstalled }.map { $0.fullId }
162|59ac8b|        let disabled = catalogExtensions.filter { $0.isInstalled && !$0.isEnabled }.map { $0.fullId }

165|27e597|    }

168|e8eb3e|        let installed = Set(UserDefaults.standard.stringArray(forKey: installedKey) ?? defaultInstalledIds)
169|330d4b|        let disabled = Set(UserDefaults.standard.stringArray(forKey: "disabledExtensionIds") ?? [])
170|964dd5|        for i in catalogExtensions.indices {
171|c4fa08|            catalogExtensions[i].isInstalled = installed.contains(catalogExtensions[i].fullId)
172|2377e1|            if disabled.contains(catalogExtensions[i].fullId) {
173|07c873|                catalogExtensions[i].isEnabled = false

175|5f3077|        }

395|6da113|            return String(format: "%.0fK", Double(downloadCount) / 1_000)
396|5f3077|        }

403|dc3a6c|        var stars = String(repeating: "★", count: full)
404|178bbc|        if half { stars += "½" }
405|f825d4|        return stars
406|27e597|    }

68|69d728|@MainActor
69|3b3c5b|class ExtensionManager: ObservableObject {
70|ca6478|    static let shared = ExtensionManager()
71|b4687f|    
72|6691b7|    @Published var installedExtensions: [IDEExtension] = []
73|cbcb7b|    @Published var catalogExtensions: [IDEExtension] = []
74|633dd8|    @Published var searchText: String = ""
75|922a8d|    @Published var selectedFilter: ExtensionFilter = .installed
76|c5937e|    @Published var selectedCategory: ExtensionCategory? = nil
77|e588e6|    @Published var isLoading: Bool = false
78|b4687f|    
79|3ff50f|    private let installedKey = "installedExtensionIds"

86|724bcf|    // MARK: - Filtered Results
87|b4687f|    
88|2f0226|    var filteredExtensions: [IDEExtension] {
89|7a53ec|        var results: [IDEExtension]
90|d6ed84|        
91|15b4a1|        switch selectedFilter {
92|dfca12|        case .installed:
93|40bd83|            results = catalogExtensions.filter { $0.isInstalled }
94|7b5ef3|        case .recommended:
95|aa0b4f|            results = catalogExtensions.filter { !$0.isInstalled && $0.rating >= 4.0 }
96|db247e|        case .popular:
97|0e1a4a|            results = catalogExtensions.sorted { $0.downloadCount > $1.downloadCount }
98|35ffb3|        case .all:
99|64c215|            results = catalogExtensions
100|5f3077|        }
101|d6ed84|        
102|7b6678|        if let category = selectedCategory {
103|30baaf|            results = results.filter { $0.category == category }
104|5f3077|        }
105|d6ed84|        
106|c3a36a|        if !searchText.isEmpty {
107|725d7c|            let query = searchText.lowercased()
108|fb0de6|            results = results.filter {
109|1a313a|                $0.name.lowercased().contains(query) ||
110|23162d|                $0.displayName.lowercased().contains(query) ||
111|44ed96|                $0.publisher.lowercased().contains(query) ||
112|0baf55|                $0.description.lowercased().contains(query)
113|a7dc16|            }
114|5f3077|        }
115|d6ed84|        
116|32b4af|        return results
117|27e597|    }

128|fcbcd9|            catalogExtensions[index].isEnabled = true
129|b10956|            saveInstalledState()

134|43d041|            )
135|5f3077|        }
136|27e597|    }

140|034e45|            catalogExtensions[index].isInstalled = false
141|37f7d4|            catalogExtensions[index].isEnabled = false
142|b10956|            saveInstalledState()

160|ffc75f|    private func saveInstalledState() {
161|b84217|        let installed = catalogExtensions.filter { $0.isInstalled }.map { $0.fullId }
162|59ac8b|        let disabled = catalogExtensions.filter { $0.isInstalled && !$0.isEnabled }.map { $0.fullId }
163|07d278|        UserDefaults.standard.set(installed, forKey: installedKey)
164|b13b1e|        UserDefaults.standard.set(disabled, forKey: "disabledExtensionIds")
165|27e597|    }

167|34f9c9|    private func loadInstalledState() {

170|964dd5|        for i in catalogExtensions.indices {
171|c4fa08|            catalogExtensions[i].isInstalled = installed.contains(catalogExtensions[i].fullId)
172|2377e1|            if disabled.contains(catalogExtensions[i].fullId) {
173|07c873|                catalogExtensions[i].isEnabled = false
174|a7dc16|            }
175|5f3077|        }
176|27e597|    }

388|a34d20|// MARK: - Download Count Formatting
389|adc83b|
390|1a71a0|extension IDEExtension {
391|b9009a|    var formattedDownloads: String {
392|763789|        if downloadCount >= 1_000_000 {
393|22c9ae|            return String(format: "%.1fM", Double(downloadCount) / 1_000_000)
394|0d7b59|        } else if downloadCount >= 1_000 {
395|6da113|            return String(format: "%.0fK", Double(downloadCount) / 1_000)
396|5f3077|        }
397|ef98c1|        return "\(downloadCount)"
398|27e597|    }
399|b4687f|    
400|7898c2|    var ratingStars: String {
401|b12cd6|        let full = Int(rating)
402|9d2cf9|        let half = (rating - Double(full)) >= 0.5
403|dc3a6c|        var stars = String(repeating: "★", count: full)
404|178bbc|        if half { stars += "½" }
405|f825d4|        return stars
406|27e597|    }

69|3b3c5b|class ExtensionManager: ObservableObject {

73|cbcb7b|    @Published var catalogExtensions: [IDEExtension] = []
74|633dd8|    @Published var searchText: String = ""
75|922a8d|    @Published var selectedFilter: ExtensionFilter = .installed

86|724bcf|    // MARK: - Filtered Results
87|b4687f|    
88|2f0226|    var filteredExtensions: [IDEExtension] {
89|7a53ec|        var results: [IDEExtension]
90|d6ed84|        
91|15b4a1|        switch selectedFilter {
92|dfca12|        case .installed:
93|40bd83|            results = catalogExtensions.filter { $0.isInstalled }
94|7b5ef3|        case .recommended:
95|aa0b4f|            results = catalogExtensions.filter { !$0.isInstalled && $0.rating >= 4.0 }
96|db247e|        case .popular:
97|0e1a4a|            results = catalogExtensions.sorted { $0.downloadCount > $1.downloadCount }
98|35ffb3|        case .all:
99|64c215|            results = catalogExtensions
100|5f3077|        }
101|d6ed84|        
102|7b6678|        if let category = selectedCategory {
103|30baaf|            results = results.filter { $0.category == category }
104|5f3077|        }
105|d6ed84|        
106|c3a36a|        if !searchText.isEmpty {
107|725d7c|            let query = searchText.lowercased()
108|fb0de6|            results = results.filter {
109|1a313a|                $0.name.lowercased().contains(query) ||
110|23162d|                $0.displayName.lowercased().contains(query) ||
111|44ed96|                $0.publisher.lowercased().contains(query) ||
112|0baf55|                $0.description.lowercased().contains(query)
113|a7dc16|            }
114|5f3077|        }
115|d6ed84|        
116|32b4af|        return results
117|27e597|    }

128|fcbcd9|            catalogExtensions[index].isEnabled = true
129|b10956|            saveInstalledState()

131|e708cc|                name: .extensionInstalled,
132|f52817|                object: nil,

134|43d041|            )
135|5f3077|        }
136|27e597|    }

139|72adbc|        if let index = catalogExtensions.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == extension_.id }) {
140|034e45|            catalogExtensions[index].isInstalled = false
141|37f7d4|            catalogExtensions[index].isEnabled = false
142|b10956|            saveInstalledState()

160|ffc75f|    private func saveInstalledState() {
161|b84217|        let installed = catalogExtensions.filter { $0.isInstalled }.map { $0.fullId }
162|59ac8b|        let disabled = catalogExtensions.filter { $0.isInstalled && !$0.isEnabled }.map { $0.fullId }
163|07d278|        UserDefaults.standard.set(installed, forKey: installedKey)
164|b13b1e|        UserDefaults.standard.set(disabled, forKey: "disabledExtensionIds")
165|27e597|    }
166|b4687f|    
167|34f9c9|    private func loadInstalledState() {
168|e8eb3e|        let installed = Set(UserDefaults.standard.stringArray(forKey: installedKey) ?? defaultInstalledIds)
169|330d4b|        let disabled = Set(UserDefaults.standard.stringArray(forKey: "disabledExtensionIds") ?? [])
170|964dd5|        for i in catalogExtensions.indices {
171|c4fa08|            catalogExtensions[i].isInstalled = installed.contains(catalogExtensions[i].fullId)
172|2377e1|            if disabled.contains(catalogExtensions[i].fullId) {
173|07c873|                catalogExtensions[i].isEnabled = false
174|a7dc16|            }
175|5f3077|        }
176|27e597|    }

266|8c2b8c|    private func updateSession() {

268|3817b6|        if let index = sessions.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == currentSession.id }) {
269|6fcbfa|            sessions[index] = currentSession
270|5f3077|        }
271|7ad73d|        saveSessions()

279|5f3077|        }
280|27e597|    }

289|0ea925|    // MARK: - API Key Validation
290|b4687f|    
291|ca1870|    func hasValidAPIKey() -> Bool {
292|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
293|9ecaf9|        case .openai: return !openAIKey.isEmpty
294|9e889d|        case .anthropic: return !anthropicKey.isEmpty
295|913761|        case .google: return !googleKey.isEmpty
296|2d4ef2|        case .kimi: return !kimiKey.isEmpty
297|bc2b9b|        case .glm: return !glmKey.isEmpty
298|47ba54|        case .groq: return !groqKey.isEmpty
299|d902be|        case .deepseek: return !deepseekKey.isEmpty
300|c5192a|        case .mistral: return !mistralKey.isEmpty
301|06a0e1|        case .ollama: return true // Ollama doesn't require API key
302|6c4184|        case .localMLX: return true // Local model, no API key needed
303|5f3077|        }
304|27e597|    }
305|b4687f|    
306|9839dd|    func getAPIKey() -> String {
307|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
308|93ff72|        case .openai: return openAIKey
309|7ce3eb|        case .anthropic: return anthropicKey
310|ca0d01|        case .google: return googleKey
311|30539a|        case .kimi: return kimiKey
312|d32dc6|        case .glm: return glmKey
313|40a8a4|        case .groq: return groqKey
314|5109f7|        case .deepseek: return deepseekKey
315|2ffd6d|        case .mistral: return mistralKey
316|c37216|        case .ollama: return ""
317|443135|        case .localMLX: return ""
318|5f3077|        }
319|27e597|    }
320|b4687f|    
321|caea46|    // MARK: - Send Message
322|b4687f|    
323|0fd45c|    @MainActor
324|b8b714|    func sendMessage(_ content: String, context: String? = nil) async {
325|915e6f|        guard hasValidAPIKey() else {
326|06856b|            error = "Please set your API key in settings"
327|bef5d6|            return
328|5f3077|        }
329|d6ed84|        
330|e352e6|        let userMessage = ChatMessage(role: .user, content: content)
331|382c05|        currentSession.messages.append(userMessage)
332|aa2963|        updateSession()
333|d6ed84|        
334|8495c1|        // Update title if first message
335|8926e1|        if currentSession.messages.count == 1 {
336|066ce6|            currentSession.title = String(content.prefix(50))
337|e749a7|            updateSession()
338|5f3077|        }
339|d6ed84|        
340|d52924|        isLoading = true
341|0406ba|        error = nil
342|dc34fb|        streamingResponse = ""
343|d6ed84|        
344|4da690|        do {
345|ce5098|            let response = try await makeAPIRequest(messages: currentSession.messages, context: context)
346|70672e|            let assistantMessage = ChatMessage(role: .assistant, content: response, codeBlocks: extractCodeBlocks(from: response))
347|c17117|            currentSession.messages.append(assistantMessage)
348|e749a7|            updateSession()
349|853889|        } catch {
350|97a9c5|            self.error = error.localizedDescription
351|5f3077|        }
352|d6ed84|        
353|295f36|        isLoading = false
354|27e597|    }
355|b4687f|    
356|7e38b7|    // MARK: - Code Actions
357|b4687f|    
358|0fd45c|    @MainActor
359|70008d|    func explainCode(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
360|337b30|        let prompt = "Explain the following \(language) code in detail. What does it do, and how does it work?\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
361|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
362|27e597|    }
363|b4687f|    
364|0fd45c|    @MainActor
365|a1609b|    func fixCode(_ code: String, language: String, errorMessage: String? = nil) async -> String {
366|7b5f15|        var prompt = "Fix any issues in the following \(language) code and explain what was wrong:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
367|bf3125|        if let error = errorMessage {
368|5ee495|            prompt += "\n\nError message: \(error)"
369|5f3077|        }
370|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
371|27e597|    }
372|b4687f|    
373|0fd45c|    @MainActor
374|61e13d|    func generateTests(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
375|a6412a|        let prompt = "Generate comprehensive unit tests for the following \(language) code. Include edge cases and typical usage:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
376|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
377|27e597|    }
378|b4687f|    
379|0fd45c|    @MainActor
380|83d5b9|    func refactorCode(_ code: String, language: String, instruction: String) async -> String {
381|eefc66|        let prompt = "Refactor the following \(language) code according to this instruction: \(instruction)\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
382|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
383|27e597|    }
384|b4687f|    
385|0fd45c|    @MainActor
386|e7b4e9|    func documentCode(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
387|02ed0f|        let prompt = "Add comprehensive documentation/comments to the following \(language) code:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
388|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
389|27e597|    }
390|b4687f|    
391|0fd45c|    @MainActor
392|90c566|    private func sendAndGetResponse(_ prompt: String) async -> String {
393|915e6f|        guard hasValidAPIKey() else {
394|1b72a2|            return "Error: Please set your API key in settings"
395|5f3077|        }
396|d6ed84|        
397|d52924|        isLoading = true
398|0406ba|        error = nil
399|d6ed84|        
400|4da690|        do {
401|3b5c4f|            let messages = [ChatMessage(role: .user, content: prompt)]
402|153d92|            let response = try await makeAPIRequest(messages: messages, context: nil)
403|612c3f|            isLoading = false
404|d392d0|            return response
405|853889|        } catch {
406|612c3f|            isLoading = false
407|0cacff|            return "Error: \(error.localizedDescription)"
408|5f3077|        }
409|27e597|    }
410|b4687f|    
411|579307|    // MARK: - API Request
412|b4687f|    
413|0a6144|    private func makeAPIRequest(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
414|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
415|6ca85d|        case .openai:
416|d9a528|            return try await callOpenAI(messages: messages, context: context)
417|2b5eb0|        case .anthropic:
418|afe61a|            return try await callAnthropic(messages: messages, context: context)
419|51e5bc|        case .google:
420|688f02|            return try await callGoogle(messages: messages, context: context)
421|a90b5c|        case .kimi:
422|467f79|            return try await callKimi(messages: messages, context: context)
423|448974|        case .glm:
424|d03556|            return try await callGLM(messages: messages, context: context)
425|6a2402|        case .groq:
426|2fdc7f|            return try await callGroq(messages: messages, context: context)
427|586fca|        case .deepseek:
428|b7290a|            return try await callDeepSeek(messages: messages, context: context)
429|0935ee|        case .mistral:
430|048202|            return try await callMistral(messages: messages, context: context)
431|7b8ebd|        case .ollama:
432|20a226|            return try await callOllama(messages: messages, context: context)
433|5135a3|        case .localMLX:
434|258af5|            return try await callLocalMLX(messages: messages, context: context)
435|5f3077|        }
436|27e597|    }
437|b4687f|    
438|b90399|    // MARK: - OpenAI API
439|b4687f|    
440|c4fdfa|    private func callOpenAI(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
441|bc2d67|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.openai.baseURL)/chat/completions")!
442|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
443|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
444|7fd512|        request.setValue("Bearer \(openAIKey)", forHTTPHeaderField: "Authorization")
445|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
446|d6ed84|        
447|84a07c|        var apiMessages: [[String: String]] = []
448|d6ed84|        
449|5740dd|        // Add system message with context
450|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
451|55709b|        apiMessages.append(["role": "system", "content": systemPrompt])
452|d6ed84|        
453|c5ae63|        // Add conversation messages
454|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
455|89949c|            apiMessages.append(["role": msg.role.rawValue, "content": msg.content])
456|5f3077|        }
457|d6ed84|        
458|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
459|e981b8|            "model": selectedModel.id,
460|b5548e|            "messages": apiMessages,
461|d6271e|            "max_tokens": 4096,
462|f1c54d|            "temperature": 0.7
463|220505|        ]
464|d6ed84|        
465|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
466|d6ed84|        
467|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
468|d6ed84|        
469|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
470|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
471|5f3077|        }
472|d6ed84|        
473|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
474|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
475|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
476|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
477|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
478|a7dc16|            }
479|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
480|5f3077|        }
481|d6ed84|        
482|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
483|95fe6c|        guard let choices = json?["choices"] as? [[String: Any]],
484|6c7545|              let firstChoice = choices.first,
485|9e7d93|              let message = firstChoice["message"] as? [String: Any],
486|870b1f|              let content = message["content"] as? String else {
487|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
488|5f3077|        }
489|d6ed84|        
490|9be7b6|        return content
491|27e597|    }
492|b4687f|

502|d6ed84|        
503|84a07c|        var apiMessages: [[String: String]] = []

507|5f3077|        }
508|d6ed84|        
509|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
510|d6ed84|        
511|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
512|e981b8|            "model": selectedModel.id,
513|d6271e|            "max_tokens": 4096,
514|f06de6|            "system": systemPrompt,
515|60c92e|            "messages": apiMessages
516|220505|        ]
517|d6ed84|        
518|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
519|d6ed84|        
520|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
521|d6ed84|        
522|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
523|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
524|5f3077|        }
525|d6ed84|        
526|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
527|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
528|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
529|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
530|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
531|a7dc16|            }
532|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
533|5f3077|        }
534|d6ed84|        
535|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
536|918dea|        guard let content = json?["content"] as? [[String: Any]],
537|fda5e9|              let firstContent = content.first,
538|31d41c|              let text = firstContent["text"] as? String else {
539|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
540|5f3077|        }
541|d6ed84|        
542|ec263c|        return text
543|27e597|    }

545|87a420|    // MARK: - Google API
546|b4687f|    
547|190d00|    private func callGoogle(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
548|dd3258|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.google.baseURL)/models/\(selectedModel.id):generateContent?key=\(googleKey)")!
549|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
550|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
551|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
552|d6ed84|        
553|2ae98d|        var parts: [[String: Any]] = []
554|d6ed84|        
555|288895|        // Add system context
556|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
557|e08e07|        parts.append(["text": "System: \(systemPrompt)"])
558|d6ed84|        
559|c1c8d4|        // Add messages
560|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
561|989b77|            let role = msg.role == .assistant ? "Model" : "User"
562|35f120|            parts.append(["text": "\(role): \(msg.content)"])
563|5f3077|        }
564|d6ed84|        
565|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
566|6251fc|            "contents": [
567|f76f20|                ["parts": parts]
568|97e7d5|            ],
569|0eaa6f|            "generationConfig": [
570|80d7f4|                "maxOutputTokens": 4096,
571|e772de|                "temperature": 0.7
572|324820|            ]
573|220505|        ]
574|d6ed84|        
575|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
576|d6ed84|        
577|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
578|d6ed84|        
579|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
580|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
581|5f3077|        }
582|d6ed84|        
583|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
584|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
585|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
586|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
587|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
588|a7dc16|            }
589|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
590|5f3077|        }
591|d6ed84|        
592|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
593|12af8b|        guard let candidates = json?["candidates"] as? [[String: Any]],
594|977b10|              let firstCandidate = candidates.first,
595|0ff2f5|              let content = firstCandidate["content"] as? [String: Any],
596|9ddaf9|              let parts = content["parts"] as? [[String: Any]],
597|61737e|              let firstPart = parts.first,
598|a6eafc|              let text = firstPart["text"] as? String else {
599|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
600|5f3077|        }
601|d6ed84|        
602|ec263c|        return text
603|27e597|    }

708|48ce6d|    private func callGLM(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {

711|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
712|cb1855|        request.setValue("Bearer \(glmKey)", forHTTPHeaderField: "Authorization")

714|d6ed84|        
715|84a07c|        var apiMessages: [[String: String]] = []

953|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
954|b4687f|    
955|a96bea|    private func buildSystemPrompt(context: String?) -> String {
956|a60aaf|        var prompt = """
957|de15a3|You are an expert coding assistant integrated into a code editor on iPadOS. You help developers write, debug, explain, and improve their code. Always respond in English.
958|adc83b|
959|3584f0|Guidelines:
960|9e10fd|- Provide clear, concise explanations
961|d9814a|- Use code blocks with proper language tags for code snippets
962|fab31f|- Suggest best practices and optimizations
963|17f65d|- Be helpful with debugging and error resolution
964|a2707f|- When generating code, ensure it's complete and runnable
965|ea2d25|- ALWAYS respond in English regardless of input language
966|d72f9a|- Never output raw XML tags like <think> or </think>
967|e4615a|"""
968|d6ed84|        
969|54cd50|        if let context = context, !context.isEmpty {
970|b91f6a|            prompt += "\n\nCurrent file context:\n```\n\(context)\n```"
971|5f3077|        }
972|d6ed84|        
973|dd02e7|        return prompt
974|27e597|    }
975|b4687f|    
976|c53a51|    private func extractCodeBlocks(from text: String) -> [CodeBlock] {
977|791eb5|        var blocks: [CodeBlock] = []
978|0f2b2b|        let pattern = "```(\\w*)\\n([\\s\\S]*?)```"
979|d6ed84|        
980|cbccc8|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern) else {
981|f7ed63|            return blocks
982|5f3077|        }
983|d6ed84|        
984|10d615|        let range = NSRange(text.startIndex..., in: text)
985|b29406|        let matches = regex.matches(in: text, range: range)
986|d6ed84|        
987|847e6d|        for match in matches {
988|b137ab|            if let langRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: text),
989|f66f31|               let codeRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: text) {
990|dfd4cc|                let language = String(text[langRange])
991|894c52|                let code = String(text[codeRange]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
992|9e5c94|                blocks.append(CodeBlock(language: language.isEmpty ? "text" : language, code: code))
993|a7dc16|            }
994|5f3077|        }
995|d6ed84|        
996|db7106|        return blocks
997|27e597|    }
998|b31277|}

1001|adc83b|
1002|c16cee|enum AIError: LocalizedError {
1003|06d89d|    case invalidResponse
1004|dbebbc|    case httpError(Int)
1005|24e92a|    case apiError(String)
1006|b833b2|    case noAPIKey
1007|b4687f|    
1008|242b78|    var errorDescription: String? {
1009|2e6d08|        switch self {
1010|9a7b43|        case .invalidResponse: return "Invalid response from AI service"
1011|385ec1|        case .httpError(let code): return "HTTP Error: \(code)"
1012|1b0277|        case .apiError(let message): return message
1013|e8a23b|        case .noAPIKey: return "No API key configured"
1014|5f3077|        }
1015|27e597|    }

127|e66206|    /// Updates suggestions based on the current text and cursor.

130|785f23|    /// FEAT-047: adds a curated set of Swift stdlib completions.
131|6224c3|    func updateSuggestions(for text: String, cursorPosition: Int) {

134|0efe98|            apply(items: [])

224|7d7b95|    private struct CompletionContext {

231|f6601a|    private func completionContext(in text: String, cursorPosition: Int) -> CompletionContext? {
232|4c2df9|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return nil }
233|d6ed84|        
234|42915b|        // Safety check: ensure cursorPosition is within bounds
235|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))
236|1fae78|        let cursorIndex = text.index(text.startIndex, offsetBy: safeCursor)
237|adc83b|
238|5aebf3|        // Find start of current identifier (letters/digits/_).
239|39f169|        var start = cursorIndex
240|26ebb3|        while start > text.startIndex {
241|c5c76e|            let prev = text.index(before: start)
242|9f8a31|            if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
243|1929f8|                start = prev
244|f5a6eb|            } else {
245|74cfd8|                break
246|a7dc16|            }
247|5f3077|        }
248|adc83b|
249|bf292f|        let prefix = String(text[start..<cursorIndex])
250|adc83b|
251|824562|        // Member completion if immediately preceded by '.'
252|e374b4|        var isMember = false
253|e47c72|        var memberBase: String? = nil
254|adc83b|
255|0c2c38|        if start > text.startIndex {
256|2aa058|            let dotIndex = text.index(before: start)
257|88bd65|            if text[dotIndex] == "." {
258|ca8397|                isMember = true
259|adc83b|
260|6f6689|                // Parse identifier before '.'
261|91f615|                var baseEnd = dotIndex
262|521a36|                var baseStart = baseEnd
263|5fa357|                while baseStart > text.startIndex {
264|56e352|                    let prev = text.index(before: baseStart)
265|2a8ddd|                    if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
266|fbabfa|                        baseStart = prev
267|540066|                    } else {
268|28a64b|                        break
269|c9717a|                    }
270|4e2d32|                }
271|f96abf|                let base = String(text[baseStart..<baseEnd])
272|ce472b|                if !base.isEmpty {
273|b9c992|                    memberBase = base
274|4e2d32|                }
275|a7dc16|            }
276|5f3077|        }
277|adc83b|
278|081616|        return CompletionContext(prefix: prefix,
279|c93ac4|                                 replacementRange: start..<cursorIndex,
280|a50c25|                                 isMemberCompletion: isMember,
281|ee9636|                                 memberBase: memberBase)
282|27e597|    }

284|818e4b|    private func isIdentifierChar(_ c: Character) -> Bool {
285|c233b9|        // Swift identifiers are more complex, but this is enough for basic autocomplete.
286|a164d4|        return c.isLetter || c.isNumber || c == "_"
287|27e597|    }

289|117bcf|    private func memberCandidates(forBase base: String) -> [String] {
290|cf1cb2|        // Basic heuristic: only match known stdlib types by exact name.
291|622249|        if let members = memberCompletions[base] { return members }
292|b72a10|        return []
293|27e597|    }

295|6ba6d8|    private func extractSymbols(from text: String) -> [String] {
296|1098cf|        // Very lightweight symbol extraction: looks for common declarations.
297|141450|        // Intentionally best-effort; keeps FEAT-046 self-contained.
298|f746d2|        var results = Set<String>()
299|adc83b|
300|f97d0d|        func addMatches(pattern: String) {
301|ca0afa|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return }
302|6c811f|            let ns = text as NSString
303|b25f5b|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
304|d25847|            regex.enumerateMatches(in: text, options: [], range: range) { match, _, _ in
305|14f5aa|                guard let match, match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return }
306|345d9a|                let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
307|de56e8|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { return }
308|8989a1|                let name = ns.substring(with: nameRange)
309|66b469|                if !name.isEmpty { results.insert(name) }
310|a7dc16|            }
311|5f3077|        }
312|adc83b|
313|a1c515|        // func Foo
314|cd4071|        addMatches(pattern: "\\bfunc\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
315|5eaefb|        // class/struct/enum/protocol/typealias Foo
316|685691|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:class|struct|enum|protocol|typealias)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
317|3764b8|        // let/var foo (captures first name before : = , )
318|bbf05c|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)(?=\\s*[:=,])")
319|adc83b|
320|01a90c|        return results.sorted { $0.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1) == .orderedAscending }
321|27e597|    }
322|adc83b|
323|1470f2|    private func mergeAndSort(_ items: [Suggestion]) -> [Suggestion] {
324|ff1146|        // Keep highest-scored entry per id.
325|f6e288|        var bestById: [String: Suggestion] = [:]
326|686171|        for item in items {
327|0701eb|            if let existing = bestById[item.id] {
328|d5a6de|                if item.score > existing.score {
329|763640|                    bestById[item.id] = item
330|4e2d32|                }
331|f5a6eb|            } else {
332|b949a2|                bestById[item.id] = item
333|a7dc16|            }
334|5f3077|        }
335|adc83b|
336|cfe5f9|        return bestById.values.sorted {
337|708c2d|            if $0.score != $1.score { return $0.score > $1.score }
338|e5aa71|            return $0.displayText.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1.displayText) == .orderedAscending
339|5f3077|        }
340|27e597|    }
341|adc83b|

345|c77b90|        showSuggestions = !items.isEmpty
346|81a6a8|        selectedIndex = 0
347|27e597|    }

192|778290|    /// Resolve a ref path (like refs/heads/main) to a SHA
193|19e1b1|    func resolveRef(_ refPath: String) -> String? {
194|8a8abb|        // First check loose refs
195|a3e341|        let refFile = gitDir.appendingPathComponent(refPath)
196|43b4ff|        if let content = try? String(contentsOf: refFile, encoding: .utf8) {
197|6c4c5f|            return content.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
198|5f3077|        }
199|d6ed84|        
200|668bcf|        // Check packed-refs
201|54d73b|        return resolvePackedRef(refPath)

203|b4687f|    
204|a7f14d|    private func resolvePackedRef(_ refPath: String) -> String? {
205|5b1253|        let packedRefsFile = gitDir.appendingPathComponent("packed-refs")
206|49faab|        guard let content = try? String(contentsOf: packedRefsFile, encoding: .utf8) else {
207|1c8557|            return nil
208|5f3077|        }
209|d6ed84|        
210|d2b4bd|        for line in content.components(separatedBy: .newlines) {
211|ec6750|            let trimmed = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
212|27ab74|            if trimmed.isEmpty || trimmed.hasPrefix("#") || trimmed.hasPrefix("^") {
213|1df510|                continue
214|a7dc16|            }
215|3070d1|            
216|bc4e64|            let parts = trimmed.split(separator: " ", maxSplits: 1)
217|46a25b|            if parts.count == 2, String(parts[1]) == refPath {
218|d663bb|                return String(parts[0])
219|a7dc16|            }
220|5f3077|        }
221|d6ed84|        
222|c2ae65|        return nil
223|27e597|    }

237|b4687f|    
238|e7ad65|    /// Get recent commits from HEAD
239|d5a901|    func recentCommits(count: Int = 20) -> [GitCommitInfo] {
240|289d01|        guard let headSha = headSHA() else { return [] }
241|d6ed84|        
242|f582b6|        var commits: [GitCommitInfo] = []

246|46914a|            guard let commit = parseCommit(sha: sha) else { break }
247|dde72b|            commits.append(commit)
248|e73242|            currentSha = commit.parentSHA
249|5f3077|        }
250|d6ed84|        
251|b34909|        return commits
252|27e597|    }

256|d46395|    /// Read a git object by SHA (from loose objects or pack files)
257|bd06e9|    func readObject(sha: String) -> GitObject? {

259|b4e01c|        if let obj = readLooseObject(sha: sha) {
260|e9f8c9|            return obj

264|a51ea8|        return readPackedObject(sha: sha)

267|8b65c5|    private func readLooseObject(sha: String) -> GitObject? {
268|d9a6f1|        guard sha.count >= 2 else { return nil }
269|d6ed84|        
270|bac8e2|        let prefix = String(sha.prefix(2))
271|fc0849|        let suffix = String(sha.dropFirst(2))
272|d50afc|        let objectPath = gitDir
273|392379|            .appendingPathComponent("objects")
274|565f86|            .appendingPathComponent(prefix)
275|3c6ffe|            .appendingPathComponent(suffix)
276|d6ed84|        
277|46f24e|        guard let compressedData = try? Data(contentsOf: objectPath) else {
278|1c8557|            return nil
279|5f3077|        }
280|d6ed84|        
281|7bab35|        // Git objects are zlib compressed
282|e2ad71|        guard let decompressed = decompressZlib(compressedData) else {
283|1c8557|            return nil
284|5f3077|        }
285|d6ed84|        
286|f1263c|        return parseGitObject(data: decompressed)
287|27e597|    }
288|b4687f|    
289|9d0a29|    private func readPackedObject(sha: String) -> GitObject? {
290|9cc670|        // Pack file reading is complex - for now return nil
291|e20ec6|        // Full implementation would:
292|627f69|        // 1. Read .git/objects/pack/*.idx files
293|35c3f6|        // 2. Find SHA in index
294|e5321f|        // 3. Read corresponding .pack file
295|fda1b3|        // 4. Handle delta compression
296|d6ed84|        
297|049880|        // For MVP, rely on loose objects + SSH fallback for packed repos
298|c2ae65|        return nil
299|27e597|    }
300|b4687f|    
301|1da514|    private func parseGitObject(data: Data) -> GitObject? {
302|2a4885|        // Git object format: "type size\0content"
303|8567f6|        guard let nullIndex = data.firstIndex(of: 0) else { return nil }
304|d6ed84|        
305|81d9ba|        let headerData = data[..<nullIndex]
306|a9b044|        guard let header = String(data: headerData, encoding: .utf8) else { return nil }
307|d6ed84|        
308|9df3b4|        let parts = header.split(separator: " ")
309|fc60f4|        guard parts.count == 2,
310|bf6cb4|              let type = GitObjectType(rawValue: String(parts[0])),
311|01cc7d|              let size = Int(parts[1]) else {
312|1c8557|            return nil
313|5f3077|        }
314|d6ed84|        
315|ae5929|        let contentStart = data.index(after: nullIndex)
316|b863d6|        let content = data[contentStart...]
317|d6ed84|        
318|5ba359|        return GitObject(type: type, size: size, data: Data(content))
319|27e597|    }

326|e60569|        guard let data = try? Data(contentsOf: indexPath) else {
327|1c8557|            return nil

329|d6ed84|        
330|b9b252|        return GitIndex.parse(data: data)

333|63bec4|    // MARK: - Working Directory Status
334|b4687f|    
335|6b5f2a|    /// Compare working directory to index and HEAD to determine status
336|d2a62e|    func status() -> [GitFileStatus] {
337|3a7b2f|        var statuses: [GitFileStatus] = []
338|d6ed84|        
339|f52630|        // Get index entries
340|c41fe1|        let index = readIndex()
341|e0a297|        let indexEntries = index?.entries ?? []
342|67b5f4|        let indexPaths = Set(indexEntries.map { $0.path })
343|d6ed84|        
344|d26aa8|        // Get HEAD tree entries
345|df700f|        let headTree = headTreeEntries()
346|3af7b7|        let headPaths = Set(headTree.keys)
347|d6ed84|        
348|104273|        // Get working directory files
349|1e6044|        let workingFiles = scanWorkingDirectory()
350|66054e|        let workingPaths = Set(workingFiles.keys)
351|d6ed84|        
352|dd8d32|        // Determine status for each file
353|6a2e97|        let allPaths = indexPaths.union(headPaths).union(workingPaths)
354|d6ed84|        
355|1da01e|        for path in allPaths {
356|d48197|            let inIndex = indexPaths.contains(path)
357|2bf8c4|            let inHead = headPaths.contains(path)
358|ce674b|            let inWorking = workingPaths.contains(path)
359|3070d1|            
360|0f267c|            let indexEntry = indexEntries.first { $0.path == path }
361|79f9e2|            let headSha = headTree[path]
362|e24ca9|            let workingInfo = workingFiles[path]
363|3070d1|            
364|ff67a0|            // Determine staged status (index vs HEAD)
365|32ca74|            var stagedStatus: GitStatusType? = nil
366|90e632|            if inIndex && !inHead {
367|e619b2|                stagedStatus = .added
368|8a5d88|            } else if !inIndex && inHead {
369|c9c548|                stagedStatus = .deleted
370|f186a0|            } else if inIndex && inHead {
371|a758f2|                if indexEntry?.sha != headSha {
372|8e7322|                    stagedStatus = .modified
373|4e2d32|                }
374|a7dc16|            }
375|3070d1|            
376|002272|            // Determine working status (working dir vs index)
377|619e11|            var workingStatus: GitStatusType? = nil
378|84f003|            if inWorking && !inIndex && !inHead {
379|8dccc4|                workingStatus = .untracked
380|26a2de|            } else if !inWorking && inIndex {
381|da90cf|                workingStatus = .deleted
382|0b04c9|            } else if inWorking && inIndex {
383|a1abb3|                // Compare working file to index
384|cfed41|                if let entry = indexEntry, let info = workingInfo {
385|c71b0c|                    if info.mtime != entry.mtime || info.size != entry.size {
386|c960ed|                        // File changed - verify with content hash if needed
387|a10a6f|                        workingStatus = .modified
388|c9717a|                    }
389|4e2d32|                }
390|a7dc16|            }
391|3070d1|            
392|52339a|            if stagedStatus != nil || workingStatus != nil {
393|2c0507|                statuses.append(GitFileStatus(
394|869d14|                    path: path,
395|b0f02d|                    staged: stagedStatus,
396|da5693|                    working: workingStatus
397|2188d8|                ))
398|a7dc16|            }
399|5f3077|        }
400|d6ed84|        
401|e65ba7|        return statuses.sorted { $0.path < $1.path }
402|27e597|    }
403|b4687f|    
404|741290|    /// Get tree entries from HEAD commit
405|af070d|    private func headTreeEntries() -> [String: String] {
406|eedd84|        guard let headSha = headSHA(),
407|a8bfab|              let commit = parseCommit(sha: headSha),
408|851b09|              let treeSha = commit.treeSHA else {
409|a3b117|            return [:]
410|5f3077|        }
411|d6ed84|        
412|d18f0b|        return flattenTree(sha: treeSha, prefix: "")
413|27e597|    }
414|b4687f|    
415|0913c8|    private func flattenTree(sha: String, prefix: String) -> [String: String] {
416|43cac9|        guard let object = readObject(sha: sha),
417|d461de|              object.type == .tree else {
418|a3b117|            return [:]
419|5f3077|        }
420|d6ed84|

438|da6b38|    private func parseTreeEntries(data: Data) -> [(mode: String, name: String, sha: String)] {
439|10efd1|        var entries: [(String, String, String)] = []
440|2cb527|        var offset = 0
441|d6ed84|        
442|126a3b|        while offset < data.count {
443|747911|            // Find space after mode
444|67fc5d|            guard let spaceIndex = data[offset...].firstIndex(of: 0x20) else { break }
445|a3cc9c|            let modeData = data[offset..<spaceIndex]
446|6d483e|            guard let mode = String(data: modeData, encoding: .ascii) else { break }
447|3070d1|            
448|4ec6cd|            // Find null after name
449|d36b62|            let nameStart = spaceIndex + 1
450|306227|            guard let nullIndex = data[nameStart...].firstIndex(of: 0) else { break }
451|327bc9|            let nameData = data[nameStart..<nullIndex]
452|237c3c|            guard let name = String(data: nameData, encoding: .utf8) else { break }
453|3070d1|            
454|92403e|            // Read 20-byte SHA
455|c5842b|            let shaStart = nullIndex + 1
456|be9d3b|            let shaEnd = shaStart + 20
457|eb4a79|            guard shaEnd <= data.count else { break }
458|0075b7|            let shaData = data[shaStart..<shaEnd]
459|bb46c1|            let sha = shaData.map { String(format: "%02x", $0) }.joined()
460|3070d1|            
461|3e2294|            entries.append((mode, name, sha))
462|372dcb|            offset = shaEnd
463|5f3077|        }
464|d6ed84|        
465|f9dee7|        return entries
466|27e597|    }

470|578db3|        var results: [String: (Date, Int)] = [:]

484|1df510|                continue
485|a7dc16|            }

493|216278|

495|566577|                let mtime = values.contentModificationDate ?? Date.distantPast
496|e204a4|                let size = values.fileSize ?? 0

503|d6ed84|

508|b4687f|    
509|53b94b|    private func decompressZlib(_ data: Data) -> Data? {
510|9b6576|        // Git uses zlib compression (DEFLATE with zlib header)
511|82065f|        // iOS Compression framework supports COMPRESSION_ZLIB
512|d6ed84|        
513|072510|        guard data.count > 2 else { return nil }
514|d6ed84|        
515|92162c|        // Zlib format: 1 byte CMF + 1 byte FLG + compressed data + 4 byte Adler-32
516|3b7b90|        // We need to skip the 2-byte header for raw DEFLATE
517|66961e|        let sourceData: Data
518|22af4c|        if data[0] == 0x78 { // Zlib header present
519|833c99|            // Skip zlib header (2 bytes) and Adler-32 checksum (last 4 bytes)
520|440446|            if data.count > 6 {
521|446361|                sourceData = data.dropFirst(2).dropLast(4)
522|f5a6eb|            } else {
523|3efd1d|                sourceData = data.dropFirst(2)
524|a7dc16|            }
525|b31999|        } else {
526|63b8ac|            sourceData = data
527|5f3077|        }
528|d6ed84|        
529|b8be62|        // Allocate destination buffer (git objects are usually small, but can be large)
530|ef28bc|        let destinationBufferSize = max(sourceData.count * 10, 65536)
531|edfde8|        let destinationBuffer = UnsafeMutablePointer<UInt8>.allocate(capacity: destinationBufferSize)
532|e94821|        defer { destinationBuffer.deallocate() }
533|d6ed84|        
534|abe232|        let decompressedSize = sourceData.withUnsafeBytes { sourcePtr -> Int in
535|81db49|            guard let sourceBaseAddress = sourcePtr.baseAddress else { return 0 }
536|3070d1|            
537|7e34e8|            return compression_decode_buffer(
538|60d8f8|                destinationBuffer,
539|3e48b6|                destinationBufferSize,
540|fe1a17|                sourceBaseAddress.assumingMemoryBound(to: UInt8.self),
541|0b0392|                sourceData.count,
542|8da2f2|                nil,
543|ae388b|                COMPRESSION_ZLIB
544|43d041|            )
545|5f3077|        }
546|d6ed84|        
547|058db1|        guard decompressedSize > 0 else {
548|d4695a|            // Try with raw DEFLATE if zlib failed
549|1d084e|            return decompressRawDeflate(sourceData)
550|5f3077|        }
551|d6ed84|        
552|c630d8|        return Data(bytes: destinationBuffer, count: decompressedSize)
553|27e597|    }

654|3841ee|    private static func parseIdentity(_ str: String) -> (name: String, email: String, date: Date) {
655|1369ed|        // Format: "Name <email> timestamp timezone"
656|57a328|        // Example: "John Doe <john@example.com> 1234567890 +0000"
657|d6ed84|        
658|d2cd08|        guard let emailStart = str.firstIndex(of: "<"),
659|ec06df|              let emailEnd = str.firstIndex(of: ">") else {
660|d229c9|            return (str, "", Date())
661|5f3077|        }
662|d6ed84|        
663|85c61f|        let name = String(str[..<emailStart]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
664|8474b6|        let email = String(str[str.index(after: emailStart)..<emailEnd])
665|d6ed84|        
666|362b3c|        // Parse timestamp
667|8c5df2|        let afterEmail = str[str.index(after: emailEnd)...]
668|936763|        let parts = afterEmail.split(separator: " ")
669|4d3a9c|        var date = Date()
670|b7fde4|        if let timestampStr = parts.first, let timestamp = TimeInterval(timestampStr) {
671|1662de|            date = Date(timeIntervalSince1970: timestamp)
672|5f3077|        }
673|d6ed84|        
674|819a87|        return (name, email, date)
675|27e597|    }

695|adc83b|
696|9e4a69|struct GitIndexEntry {
697|206d64|    let ctime: Date
698|903928|    let mtime: Date
699|55f627|    let dev: UInt32
700|89b9d7|    let ino: UInt32
701|3fdcaf|    let mode: UInt32
702|141928|    let uid: UInt32
703|f6a1bb|    let gid: UInt32
704|714851|    let size: Int

706|8a98e4|    let flags: UInt16

708|b31277|}
709|adc83b|
710|412441|struct GitIndex {
711|0d5289|    let version: UInt32
712|d5551c|    let entries: [GitIndexEntry]
713|b4687f|    
714|4b2cd0|    static func parse(data: Data) -> GitIndex? {
715|ba2859|        guard data.count >= 12 else { return nil }
716|d6ed84|        
717|28bfd7|        // Check signature "DIRC"
718|02c810|        let signature = String(data: data[0..<4], encoding: .ascii)
719|b2a497|        guard signature == "DIRC" else { return nil }
720|d6ed84|        
721|4e3304|        // Read version (4 bytes, big endian)
722|c8e065|        let version = data[4..<8].withUnsafeBytes { $0.load(as: UInt32.self).bigEndian }
723|144bc7|        guard version >= 2 && version <= 4 else { return nil }
724|d6ed84|        
725|7a9546|        // Read entry count
726|dcc3f5|        let entryCount = data[8..<12].withUnsafeBytes { $0.load(as: UInt32.self).bigEndian }
727|d6ed84|        
728|6a7d34|        // Parse entries
729|57c846|        var entries: [GitIndexEntry] = []
730|6c9e6b|        var offset = 12
731|d6ed84|        
732|4db410|        for _ in 0..<entryCount {
733|e588b0|            guard offset + 62 <= data.count else { break }
734|3070d1|            
735|ae47e8|            // Read fixed-size fields (62 bytes for v2)
736|b7166d|            let ctimeSec = data[offset..<offset+4].withUnsafeBytes { $0.load(as: UInt32.self).bigEndian }
737|50f88a|            let ctimeNano = data[offset+4..<offset+8].withUnsafeBytes { $0.load(as: UInt32.self).bigEndian }
738|e16d6f|            let mtimeSec = data[offset+8..<offset+12].withUnsafeBytes { $0.load(as: UInt32.self).bigEndian }
739|60fa09|            let mtimeNano = data[offset+12..<offset+16].withUnsafeBytes { $0.load(as: UInt32.self).bigEndian }
740|48fa0e|            let dev = data[offset+16..<offset+20].withUnsafeBytes { $0.load(as: UInt32.self).bigEndian }
741|66bd82|            let ino = data[offset+20..<offset+24].withUnsafeBytes { $0.load(as: UInt32.self).bigEndian }
742|417501|            let mode = data[offset+24..<offset+28].withUnsafeBytes { $0.load(as: UInt32.self).bigEndian }
743|922cef|            let uid = data[offset+28..<offset+32].withUnsafeBytes { $0.load(as: UInt32.self).bigEndian }
744|a64f3a|            let gid = data[offset+32..<offset+36].withUnsafeBytes { $0.load(as: UInt32.self).bigEndian }
745|2b8b05|            let size = data[offset+36..<offset+40].withUnsafeBytes { Int($0.load(as: UInt32.self).bigEndian) }
746|3070d1|            
747|e9dd74|            // SHA (20 bytes)
748|bfc593|            let shaData = data[offset+40..<offset+60]
749|bb46c1|            let sha = shaData.map { String(format: "%02x", $0) }.joined()
750|3070d1|            
751|b05074|            // Flags (2 bytes)
752|323051|            let flags = data[offset+60..<offset+62].withUnsafeBytes { $0.load(as: UInt16.self).bigEndian }
753|af2bd4|            let nameLen = Int(flags & 0x0FFF)
754|3070d1|            
755|d554f5|            offset += 62
756|3070d1|            
757|3cce59|            // Extended flags for v3+
758|549e8b|            if version >= 3 && (flags & 0x4000) != 0 {
759|f38f88|                offset += 2
760|a7dc16|            }
761|3070d1|            
762|b1b492|            // Read path name
763|8df390|            let pathEnd: Int
764|15ee1e|            if nameLen < 0xFFF {
765|4a16df|                pathEnd = offset + nameLen
766|f5a6eb|            } else {
767|7e3bcf|                // Name length is >= 0xFFF, find null terminator
768|d6f469|                if let nullIdx = data[offset...].firstIndex(of: 0) {
769|740382|                    pathEnd = nullIdx
770|fdd0e2|                } else {
771|8dcb2c|                    break
772|4e2d32|                }
773|a7dc16|            }
774|3070d1|            
775|776294|            guard pathEnd <= data.count else { break }
776|defd0c|            let pathData = data[offset..<pathEnd]
777|fe1240|            guard let path = String(data: pathData, encoding: .utf8) else { break }
778|3070d1|            
779|d243e8|            // Entries are padded to 8 bytes
780|05b889|            let entryLen = 62 + path.utf8.count + 1 // +1 for null terminator
781|0818ab|            let padding = (8 - (entryLen % 8)) % 8
782|b175c3|            offset = pathEnd + 1 + padding
783|3070d1|            
784|44e881|            let ctime = Date(timeIntervalSince1970: Double(ctimeSec) + Double(ctimeNano) / 1_000_000_000)
785|25c3df|            let mtime = Date(timeIntervalSince1970: Double(mtimeSec) + Double(mtimeNano) / 1_000_000_000)
786|3070d1|            
787|39dd8d|            entries.append(GitIndexEntry(
788|192553|                ctime: ctime,
789|5a6e94|                mtime: mtime,
790|2bac62|                dev: dev,
791|dd1a51|                ino: ino,
792|cfe53e|                mode: mode,
793|7cb2e7|                uid: uid,
794|74b33e|                gid: gid,
795|22e923|                size: size,
796|c97dd9|                sha: sha,
797|bf7ce6|                flags: flags,
798|18c940|                path: path
799|30ec32|            ))
800|5f3077|        }
801|d6ed84|        
802|8b5724|        return GitIndex(version: version, entries: entries)
803|27e597|    }

56|d6ed84|

204|a7f14d|    private func resolvePackedRef(_ refPath: String) -> String? {
205|5b1253|        let packedRefsFile = gitDir.appendingPathComponent("packed-refs")

207|1c8557|            return nil

211|ec6750|            let trimmed = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
212|27ab74|            if trimmed.isEmpty || trimmed.hasPrefix("#") || trimmed.hasPrefix("^") {
213|1df510|                continue

215|3070d1|            
216|bc4e64|            let parts = trimmed.split(separator: " ", maxSplits: 1)
217|46a25b|            if parts.count == 2, String(parts[1]) == refPath {

220|5f3077|        }
221|d6ed84|        
222|c2ae65|        return nil
223|27e597|    }

238|e7ad65|    /// Get recent commits from HEAD

267|8b65c5|    private func readLooseObject(sha: String) -> GitObject? {
268|d9a6f1|        guard sha.count >= 2 else { return nil }
269|d6ed84|        
270|bac8e2|        let prefix = String(sha.prefix(2))
271|fc0849|        let suffix = String(sha.dropFirst(2))
272|d50afc|        let objectPath = gitDir

277|46f24e|        guard let compressedData = try? Data(contentsOf: objectPath) else {
278|1c8557|            return nil
279|5f3077|        }
280|d6ed84|        
281|7bab35|        // Git objects are zlib compressed
282|e2ad71|        guard let decompressed = decompressZlib(compressedData) else {
283|1c8557|            return nil
284|5f3077|        }
285|d6ed84|        
286|f1263c|        return parseGitObject(data: decompressed)
287|27e597|    }

289|9d0a29|    private func readPackedObject(sha: String) -> GitObject? {

292|627f69|        // 1. Read .git/objects/pack/*.idx files
293|35c3f6|        // 2. Find SHA in index
294|e5321f|        // 3. Read corresponding .pack file

301|1da514|    private func parseGitObject(data: Data) -> GitObject? {
302|2a4885|        // Git object format: "type size\0content"
303|8567f6|        guard let nullIndex = data.firstIndex(of: 0) else { return nil }
304|d6ed84|        
305|81d9ba|        let headerData = data[..<nullIndex]
306|a9b044|        guard let header = String(data: headerData, encoding: .utf8) else { return nil }
307|d6ed84|        
308|9df3b4|        let parts = header.split(separator: " ")
309|fc60f4|        guard parts.count == 2,
310|bf6cb4|              let type = GitObjectType(rawValue: String(parts[0])),
311|01cc7d|              let size = Int(parts[1]) else {
312|1c8557|            return nil
313|5f3077|        }
314|d6ed84|        
315|ae5929|        let contentStart = data.index(after: nullIndex)
316|b863d6|        let content = data[contentStart...]
317|d6ed84|        
318|5ba359|        return GitObject(type: type, size: size, data: Data(content))
319|27e597|    }

327|1c8557|            return nil
328|5f3077|        }
329|d6ed84|        
330|b9b252|        return GitIndex.parse(data: data)
331|27e597|    }

334|b4687f|    
335|6b5f2a|    /// Compare working directory to index and HEAD to determine status
336|d2a62e|    func status() -> [GitFileStatus] {
337|3a7b2f|        var statuses: [GitFileStatus] = []
338|d6ed84|        
339|f52630|        // Get index entries
340|c41fe1|        let index = readIndex()

342|67b5f4|        let indexPaths = Set(indexEntries.map { $0.path })
343|d6ed84|

345|df700f|        let headTree = headTreeEntries()
346|3af7b7|        let headPaths = Set(headTree.keys)
347|d6ed84|        
348|104273|        // Get working directory files
349|1e6044|        let workingFiles = scanWorkingDirectory()
350|66054e|        let workingPaths = Set(workingFiles.keys)
351|d6ed84|        
352|dd8d32|        // Determine status for each file
353|6a2e97|        let allPaths = indexPaths.union(headPaths).union(workingPaths)
354|d6ed84|        
355|1da01e|        for path in allPaths {
356|d48197|            let inIndex = indexPaths.contains(path)
357|2bf8c4|            let inHead = headPaths.contains(path)
358|ce674b|            let inWorking = workingPaths.contains(path)
359|3070d1|            
360|0f267c|            let indexEntry = indexEntries.first { $0.path == path }
361|79f9e2|            let headSha = headTree[path]
362|e24ca9|            let workingInfo = workingFiles[path]
363|3070d1|            
364|ff67a0|            // Determine staged status (index vs HEAD)
365|32ca74|            var stagedStatus: GitStatusType? = nil
366|90e632|            if inIndex && !inHead {
367|e619b2|                stagedStatus = .added
368|8a5d88|            } else if !inIndex && inHead {
369|c9c548|                stagedStatus = .deleted
370|f186a0|            } else if inIndex && inHead {
371|a758f2|                if indexEntry?.sha != headSha {
372|8e7322|                    stagedStatus = .modified
373|4e2d32|                }
374|a7dc16|            }
375|3070d1|            
376|002272|            // Determine working status (working dir vs index)
377|619e11|            var workingStatus: GitStatusType? = nil
378|84f003|            if inWorking && !inIndex && !inHead {
379|8dccc4|                workingStatus = .untracked
380|26a2de|            } else if !inWorking && inIndex {
381|da90cf|                workingStatus = .deleted
382|0b04c9|            } else if inWorking && inIndex {
383|a1abb3|                // Compare working file to index

389|4e2d32|                }
390|a7dc16|            }
391|3070d1|            
392|52339a|            if stagedStatus != nil || workingStatus != nil {

398|a7dc16|            }

230|d81681|    private func findOpeningBracket(in chars: [Character], from startIndex: Int, type: BracketType) -> Int? {
231|29e83a|        var depth = 1
232|e79b86|        var inString = false
233|11024e|        var stringChar: Character = "\""
234|d6ed84|        
235|f6da67|        // For backward search, we need a simpler approach since escape sequences are tricky
236|fe2046|        // We'll do a basic scan that handles most common cases
237|267cd6|        for i in stride(from: startIndex - 1, through: 0, by: -1) {
238|8672ad|            let char = chars[i]
239|3070d1|            
240|1d0b12|            // Simple string detection (not perfect but handles common cases)
241|631cb5|            if char == "\"" || char == "'" {
242|9df61c|                // Check if escaped
243|d575e8|                if i > 0 && chars[i - 1] == "\\" {
244|f41bef|                    continue
245|4e2d32|                }
246|399b31|                inString = !inString
247|54e155|                stringChar = char
248|1df510|                continue
249|a7dc16|            }
250|3070d1|            
251|28e059|            if inString { continue }
252|3070d1|            
253|b67e2d|            if char == type.close {
254|4994cd|                depth += 1
255|d1d7f1|            } else if char == type.open {
256|ae2b9f|                depth -= 1
257|f13da5|                if depth == 0 {
258|125c3c|                    return i
259|4e2d32|                }
260|a7dc16|            }
261|5f3077|        }
262|d6ed84|        
263|c2ae65|        return nil
264|27e597|    }

28|97d12a|    func executeCurrentFile(fileName: String, content: String) {
29|cc9311|        let fileExtension = (fileName as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
30|d6ed84|        
31|2eea91|        switch fileExtension {
32|ff039a|        case "js", "mjs":

36|de8aa1|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.javascript

39|25499b|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.python

41|cc7290|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] No runner available for .\(fileExtension) files", to: OutputChannel.output, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
42|c75b79|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.output
43|5f3077|        }

50|e39e9c|        outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.javascript
51|d6ed84|        
52|a728d5|        // Clear previous output and show execution header
53|1511a8|        outputManager.clear(OutputChannel.javascript)
54|6cfb10|        outputManager.append("▶ Running: \(fileName)", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
55|89174a|        outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
56|d6ed84|

58|462f68|        jsRunner = JSRunner()
59|d6ed84|

61|305ad3|        jsRunner?.setConsoleHandler { [weak self] message in
62|270dfc|            Task { @MainActor in
63|150252|                guard let self = self else { return }
64|216278|                
65|b169c6|                // Determine stream type based on message prefix
66|27b18b|                let streamType: StreamType = message.hasPrefix("[ERROR]") || message.hasPrefix("[EXCEPTION]") ? StreamType.stderr : StreamType.stdout
67|216278|                
68|4b39b7|                // Remove the prefix for cleaner output display
69|62636a|                var cleanMessage = message
70|121995|                for prefix in ["[LOG] ", "[INFO] ", "[WARN] ", "[ERROR] ", "[EXCEPTION] "] {
71|1df682|                    if message.hasPrefix(prefix) {
72|11af1f|                        cleanMessage = String(message.dropFirst(prefix.count))
73|28a64b|                        break
74|c9717a|                    }
75|4e2d32|                }
76|216278|

78|a7dc16|            }
79|5f3077|        }

84|3070d1|

94|4e2d32|                }
95|216278|

99|216278|                
100|77a0dc|            } catch let error as JSRunnerError {
101|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
102|a0d863|                outputManager.append("✗ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
103|216278|                
104|91b9a2|            } catch {

116|7aa5bd|    /// Format a JSValue for display
117|e68bfd|    private func formatJSValue(_ value: JSValue) -> String {
118|c903ed|        if value.isNull {
119|c04d4d|            return "null"
120|35d02e|        } else if value.isUndefined {
121|b32932|            return "undefined"
122|edfa6b|        } else if value.isBoolean {
123|1a76ee|            return value.toBool() ? "true" : "false"
124|4e414f|        } else if value.isNumber {
125|9abc83|            let num = value.toNumber()
126|d3fc6f|            // Check if it's an integer
127|a09f20|            if let n = num, n.doubleValue == Double(n.intValue) {
128|ee9ad8|                return "\(n.intValue)"
129|a7dc16|            }
130|64a140|            return "\(num?.doubleValue ?? 0)"
131|419991|        } else if value.isString {
132|7c8a45|            return "\"\(value.toString() ?? "")\""
133|a72377|        } else if value.isArray {
134|d7f252|            if let array = value.toArray() {
135|c35363|                return "[\(array.map { "\($0)" }.joined(separator: ", "))]"
136|a7dc16|            }
137|976c47|            return "[]"
138|bb3c98|        } else if value.isObject {
139|b4fae0|            if let dict = value.toDictionary() {
140|ee1ab7|                let json = try? JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: dict, options: [.prettyPrinted, .sortedKeys])
141|a9b0f4|                if let json = json, let str = String(data: json, encoding: .utf8) {
142|cfed56|                    return str
143|4e2d32|                }
144|a7dc16|            }
145|0b436d|            return value.toString() ?? "[object]"
146|5f3077|        }
147|bbc620|        return value.toString() ?? "undefined"
148|27e597|    }
149|b31277|}

214|3070d1|            
215|9273f4|            // MARK: - Function/Method Detection
216|8fb15a|            if let functionInfo = detectFunction(trimmed) {

219|fdd0e2|                } else {
220|ca50d4|                    // Function without opening brace - look ahead

229|6b5dd6|            if let controlFlowLabel = detectControlFlow(trimmed) {

285|d80e09|    private func detectRegionStart(_ line: String) -> String? {
286|2a6674|        // C# / VS style regions
287|1989c4|        if line.hasPrefix("#region") {
288|08b9aa|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#region")
289|94d9b5|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Region"
290|5f3077|        }
291|39fca1|        // Objective-C pragma marks
292|667815|        if line.hasPrefix("#pragma mark") {
293|4621b4|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#pragma mark")
294|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
295|5f3077|        }
296|ccd53a|        // Swift MARK comments
297|b5e23f|        if line.contains("MARK:") {
298|504937|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "MARK:")
299|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
300|5f3077|        }
301|c9afee|        // TODO/FIXME regions
302|453092|        if line.contains("TODO:") {
303|a4bc68|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "TODO:")
304|5b14a7|            return "TODO: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
305|5f3077|        }
306|92ac0a|        if line.contains("FIXME:") {
307|0b0cff|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "FIXME:")
308|218d1e|            return "FIXME: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
309|5f3077|        }
310|c2ae65|        return nil
311|27e597|    }
312|b4687f|    
313|c62450|    private func detectRegionEnd(_ line: String) -> Bool {
314|6c0837|        return line.hasPrefix("#endregion") || 
315|325a81|               line == "// MARK: -" ||
316|52ea28|               line.hasPrefix("#pragma mark -")
317|27e597|    }
318|b4687f|    
319|c6e97d|    private func detectCommentStart(_ line: String) -> Bool {
320|1cbff6|        return line.hasPrefix("/*") && !line.contains("*/")
321|27e597|    }
322|b4687f|    
323|ea9113|    private func detectCommentEnd(_ line: String) -> Bool {
324|d521b7|        return line.contains("*/") && !line.hasPrefix("/*")
325|27e597|    }

327|766920|    private func findConsecutiveImports(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int {
328|b1d128|        var endIndex = startIndex
329|2c6406|        for i in startIndex..<lines.count {
330|ac4d84|            let trimmed = lines[i].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
331|25e1cc|            if trimmed.hasPrefix("import ") {
332|d549e2|                endIndex = i
333|4a3466|            } else if !trimmed.isEmpty {
334|74cfd8|                break
335|a7dc16|            }
336|5f3077|        }
337|7678e6|        return endIndex
338|27e597|    }
339|b4687f|    
340|fd2e13|    private func findConsecutiveComments(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int {
341|b1d128|        var endIndex = startIndex
342|2c6406|        for i in startIndex..<lines.count {
343|ac4d84|            let trimmed = lines[i].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
344|730926|            if trimmed.starts(with: "//") {
345|d549e2|                endIndex = i
346|4a3466|            } else if !trimmed.isEmpty {
347|74cfd8|                break
348|a7dc16|            }
349|5f3077|        }
350|7678e6|        return endIndex
351|27e597|    }
