165|ff9873|        let vscodeDir = root.appendingPathComponent(".vscode", isDirectory: true)
166|37ea42|        let settingsURL = vscodeDir.appendingPathComponent("settings.json", isDirectory: false)
167|adc83b|
168|4da690|        do {
169|bbe253|            try FileManager.default.createDirectory(at: vscodeDir, withIntermediateDirectories: true)
170|adc83b|
171|6c19a0|            let dict = Self.serializeWorkspaceSettings(workspaceSettings)
172|0f31e5|            let data = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: dict, options: [.prettyPrinted, .sortedKeys])
173|adc83b|
174|613f33|            // Add trailing newline for nicer diffs.
175|c44c47|            var out = String(decoding: data, as: UTF8.self)
176|424c8a|            if !out.hasSuffix("\n") { out += "\n" }
177|adc83b|
178|5e6d38|            try out.data(using: .utf8)?.write(to: settingsURL, options: [.atomic])
179|853889|        } catch {
180|9746f2|            lastErrorMessage = "Couldn’t save .vscode/settings.json"
181|5f3077|        }
182|27e597|    }

187|6e7c49|        func int(_ key: String) -> Int? {
188|2a8834|            dict[key] as? Int
189|5f3077|        }
190|6abde4|        func bool(_ key: String) -> Bool? {
191|ad025c|            dict[key] as? Bool
192|5f3077|        }
193|9ee76d|        func string(_ key: String) -> String? {
194|bef963|            dict[key] as? String
195|5f3077|        }
196|5d9d58|        func double(_ key: String) -> Double? {
197|e3c63f|            if let d = dict[key] as? Double { return d }
198|af9729|            if let i = dict[key] as? Int { return Double(i) }
199|1c8557|            return nil
200|5f3077|        }
201|adc83b|
202|260924|        return WorkspaceSettings(
203|c5ac08|            tabSize: int("editor.tabSize"),
204|dbd09f|            insertSpaces: bool("editor.insertSpaces"),
205|90f950|            formatOnSave: bool("editor.formatOnSave"),
206|8561bc|            theme: string("workbench.colorTheme"),

208|335677|            fontSize: double("editor.fontSize")

212|10c1a7|    private static func serializeWorkspaceSettings(_ settings: WorkspaceSettings) -> [String: Any] {
213|4bd403|        var dict: [String: Any] = [:]
214|adc83b|
215|5c5c54|        if let tabSize = settings.tabSize { dict["editor.tabSize"] = tabSize }
216|a7ff32|        if let insertSpaces = settings.insertSpaces { dict["editor.insertSpaces"] = insertSpaces }
217|8cb06f|        if let formatOnSave = settings.formatOnSave { dict["editor.formatOnSave"] = formatOnSave }
218|cddc56|        if let theme = settings.theme, !theme.isEmpty { dict["workbench.colorTheme"] = theme }
219|cd41fb|        if let fontFamily = settings.fontFamily, !fontFamily.isEmpty { dict["editor.fontFamily"] = fontFamily }
220|49f99f|        if let fontSize = settings.fontSize { dict["editor.fontSize"] = fontSize }
221|adc83b|
222|7849e9|        return dict
223|27e597|    }
224|adc83b|
225|ae92ad|    // MARK: - JSONC helpers
226|adc83b|
227|196f77|    /// VS Code `settings.json` can contain JSON with comments (JSONC). This strips
228|11a55b|    /// both `//` line comments and `/* ... */` block comments.
229|fb989d|    private static func stripJSONComments(_ input: String) -> String {
230|5749dc|        let blockPattern = "/\\*[^*]*\\*+(?:[^/*][^*]*\\*+)*/"
231|e0e74b|        let linePattern = "(?m)//.*$"
232|adc83b|
233|aec1b9|        let withoutBlocks = input.replacingOccurrences(of: blockPattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
234|1e4b82|        let withoutLines = withoutBlocks.replacingOccurrences(of: linePattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
235|2c31a3|        return withoutLines
236|27e597|    }

120|68094a|    func reload() {

122|741d33|        workspaceSettings = .empty
123|adc83b|
124|de1de1|        guard let root = workspaceRootURL else { return }
125|adc83b|
126|29c204|        let settingsURL = root
127|f52c63|            .appendingPathComponent(".vscode", isDirectory: true)
128|ac5c20|            .appendingPathComponent("settings.json", isDirectory: false)

135|adc83b|
136|6ffd29|            guard let dict = obj as? [String: Any] else {

139|a7dc16|            }
140|adc83b|
141|0e7035|            workspaceSettings = Self.parseWorkspaceSettings(from: dict)

158|79ca4f|    func save() {
159|288471|        lastErrorMessage = nil
160|27fcd0|        guard let root = workspaceRootURL else {
161|a04589|            lastErrorMessage = "No workspace folder is open"
162|bef5d6|            return
163|5f3077|        }
164|adc83b|
165|ff9873|        let vscodeDir = root.appendingPathComponent(".vscode", isDirectory: true)

167|adc83b|
168|4da690|        do {
169|bbe253|            try FileManager.default.createDirectory(at: vscodeDir, withIntermediateDirectories: true)
170|adc83b|
171|6c19a0|            let dict = Self.serializeWorkspaceSettings(workspaceSettings)
172|0f31e5|            let data = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: dict, options: [.prettyPrinted, .sortedKeys])
173|adc83b|
174|613f33|            // Add trailing newline for nicer diffs.
175|c44c47|            var out = String(decoding: data, as: UTF8.self)
176|424c8a|            if !out.hasSuffix("\n") { out += "\n" }
177|adc83b|
178|5e6d38|            try out.data(using: .utf8)?.write(to: settingsURL, options: [.atomic])
179|853889|        } catch {
180|9746f2|            lastErrorMessage = "Couldn’t save .vscode/settings.json"
181|5f3077|        }
182|27e597|    }

185|adc83b|
186|ad13c4|    private static func parseWorkspaceSettings(from dict: [String: Any]) -> WorkspaceSettings {
187|6e7c49|        func int(_ key: String) -> Int? {
188|2a8834|            dict[key] as? Int
189|5f3077|        }
190|6abde4|        func bool(_ key: String) -> Bool? {
191|ad025c|            dict[key] as? Bool
192|5f3077|        }
193|9ee76d|        func string(_ key: String) -> String? {
194|bef963|            dict[key] as? String
195|5f3077|        }
196|5d9d58|        func double(_ key: String) -> Double? {
197|e3c63f|            if let d = dict[key] as? Double { return d }
198|af9729|            if let i = dict[key] as? Int { return Double(i) }
199|1c8557|            return nil
200|5f3077|        }
201|adc83b|
202|260924|        return WorkspaceSettings(
203|c5ac08|            tabSize: int("editor.tabSize"),
204|dbd09f|            insertSpaces: bool("editor.insertSpaces"),
205|90f950|            formatOnSave: bool("editor.formatOnSave"),
206|8561bc|            theme: string("workbench.colorTheme"),
207|1accf7|            fontFamily: string("editor.fontFamily"),
208|335677|            fontSize: double("editor.fontSize")
209|3143a4|        )
210|27e597|    }
211|adc83b|
212|10c1a7|    private static func serializeWorkspaceSettings(_ settings: WorkspaceSettings) -> [String: Any] {
213|4bd403|        var dict: [String: Any] = [:]
214|adc83b|
215|5c5c54|        if let tabSize = settings.tabSize { dict["editor.tabSize"] = tabSize }
216|a7ff32|        if let insertSpaces = settings.insertSpaces { dict["editor.insertSpaces"] = insertSpaces }
217|8cb06f|        if let formatOnSave = settings.formatOnSave { dict["editor.formatOnSave"] = formatOnSave }
218|cddc56|        if let theme = settings.theme, !theme.isEmpty { dict["workbench.colorTheme"] = theme }
219|cd41fb|        if let fontFamily = settings.fontFamily, !fontFamily.isEmpty { dict["editor.fontFamily"] = fontFamily }
220|49f99f|        if let fontSize = settings.fontSize { dict["editor.fontSize"] = fontSize }
221|adc83b|
222|7849e9|        return dict
223|27e597|    }
224|adc83b|
225|ae92ad|    // MARK: - JSONC helpers
226|adc83b|
227|196f77|    /// VS Code `settings.json` can contain JSON with comments (JSONC). This strips
228|11a55b|    /// both `//` line comments and `/* ... */` block comments.
229|fb989d|    private static func stripJSONComments(_ input: String) -> String {
230|5749dc|        let blockPattern = "/\\*[^*]*\\*+(?:[^/*][^*]*\\*+)*/"
231|e0e74b|        let linePattern = "(?m)//.*$"
232|adc83b|
233|aec1b9|        let withoutBlocks = input.replacingOccurrences(of: blockPattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
234|1e4b82|        let withoutLines = withoutBlocks.replacingOccurrences(of: linePattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
235|2c31a3|        return withoutLines
236|27e597|    }
237|b31277|}
238|adc83b|

35|329f7b|        let didStartItem = url.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()

182|1743f6|        let didStartSourceParent = (!didStartSource) ? source.deletingLastPathComponent().startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() : false
183|61e821|        let didStartDest = destinationFolder.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()

221|aedab7|                    if didStartDestParent { destination.deletingLastPathComponent().stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }

226|a7dc16|            }

256|adc83b|
257|9c36f1|        DispatchQueue.main.async { self.refreshFileTree() }
258|1d3fe4|        return success
259|27e597|    }
260|adc83b|
261|9f2857|    // MARK: - Tree
262|adc83b|
263|441de9|    private func buildFileTree(at url: URL) -> FileTreeNode? {
264|a367ea|        let fileManager = FileManager.default
265|adc83b|
266|4da690|        do {
267|45bac6|            let resourceValues = try url.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey, .nameKey])
268|06b9e9|            let isDirectory = resourceValues.isDirectory ?? false
269|2496f5|            let name = resourceValues.name ?? url.lastPathComponent
270|adc83b|
271|8a6b94|            if isDirectory {
272|2a0651|                let contents = try fileManager.contentsOfDirectory(
273|81f0bc|                    at: url,
274|f8247b|                    includingPropertiesForKeys: [.isDirectoryKey],
275|710ee3|                    options: [.skipsHiddenFiles]
276|6f642e|                )
277|c19b31|                let children = contents.compactMap { buildFileTree(at: $0) }.sorted { $0.name < $1.name }
278|f12663|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: true, children: children)
279|f5a6eb|            } else {
280|0a1aa4|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: false, children: [])
281|a7dc16|            }
282|853889|        } catch {
283|8e9e2d|            print("Error building file tree at \(url): \(error)")
284|1c8557|            return nil
285|5f3077|        }
286|27e597|    }
287|adc83b|
288|d090c5|    func toggleExpanded(path: String) {
289|50b6a4|        if expandedPaths.contains(path) {
290|f464b3|            expandedPaths.remove(path)
291|b31999|        } else {
292|35f20f|            expandedPaths.insert(path)
293|5f3077|        }
294|27e597|    }
295|adc83b|
296|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
297|adc83b|
298|c1ef96|    private func uniqueDestinationURL(for initial: URL, fileManager: FileManager) -> URL {
299|690372|        if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: initial.path) { return initial }
300|adc83b|
301|e383c4|        let folder = initial.deletingLastPathComponent()
302|75aa53|        let isDirectory = (try? initial.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey]).isDirectory) ?? initial.hasDirectoryPath
303|adc83b|
304|b8c47e|        let baseName = initial.deletingPathExtension().lastPathComponent
305|ef2053|        let ext = initial.pathExtension
306|adc83b|
307|48b2e9|        var counter = 1
308|722ae9|        while true {
309|41dfde|            let candidateName: String
310|f8f674|            if ext.isEmpty {
311|943330|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter)"
312|f5a6eb|            } else {
313|b2e7c3|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter).\(ext)"
314|a7dc16|            }
315|adc83b|
316|80986c|            let candidate = folder.appendingPathComponent(candidateName, isDirectory: isDirectory)
317|840e8b|            if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: candidate.path) {
318|659238|                return candidate
319|a7dc16|            }
320|484fa6|            counter += 1
321|5f3077|        }
322|27e597|    }
323|b31277|}
324|adc83b|
325|775255|struct FileTreeNode: Identifiable {
326|c90f8e|    let id = UUID()
327|bbb634|    let url: URL
328|a5193b|    let name: String
329|e1c6d7|    let isDirectory: Bool
330|b61a7b|    let children: [FileTreeNode]
331|adc83b|
332|e25084|    var fileExtension: String {
333|26034d|        (name as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
334|27e597|    }
335|b31277|}
336|adc83b|

90|26c1b2|    private static let clientID = "178c6fc778ccc68e1d6a" // GitHub CLI's public client ID (works for device flow)

140|dfa032|    /// Step 1: Request a device code from GitHub
141|376dc8|    func startDeviceFlow() async throws {
142|d52924|        isLoading = true
143|5a9168|        errorMessage = nil
144|dc2ea0|        deviceCodeResponse = nil
145|d6ed84|        
146|9c61fa|        defer { isLoading = false }
147|d6ed84|        
148|17160e|        let url = URL(string: "https://github.com/login/device/code")!
149|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
150|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
151|3fa184|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Accept")
152|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
153|d6ed84|        
154|90fe0a|        let body: [String: String] = [
155|86ed4b|            "client_id": Self.clientID,
156|63faec|            "scope": Self.scope
157|220505|        ]
158|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
159|d6ed84|        
160|4da690|        do {
161|051776|            let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
162|3070d1|            
163|f57d44|            guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
164|ecb912|                throw GitHubAuthError.invalidResponse
165|a7dc16|            }
166|3070d1|            
167|2f4205|            guard httpResponse.statusCode == 200 else {
168|fae175|                let errorBody = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) ?? "Unknown error"
169|63ff7f|                throw GitHubAuthError.deviceFlowFailed("HTTP \(httpResponse.statusCode): \(errorBody)")
170|a7dc16|            }
171|3070d1|            
172|dc8a03|            let decoder = JSONDecoder()
173|6a1726|            let deviceCode = try decoder.decode(DeviceCodeResponse.self, from: data)
174|3defcd|            self.deviceCodeResponse = deviceCode
175|3070d1|            
176|04fe54|            print("[GitHubAuth] Device code received. User code: \(deviceCode.userCode)")
177|f80845|            print("[GitHubAuth] Verification URL: \(deviceCode.verificationUri)")
178|3070d1|            
179|cbf015|            // Automatically open the verification URL in Safari
180|895363|            if let verifyURL = URL(string: deviceCode.verificationUri) {
181|25ae70|                await UIApplication.shared.open(verifyURL)
182|a7dc16|            }
183|3070d1|            
184|4e1018|            // Start polling for token
185|9add0f|            startPolling(
186|44754d|                deviceCode: deviceCode.deviceCode,
187|43470e|                interval: deviceCode.interval,
188|54e876|                expiresIn: deviceCode.expiresIn
189|43d041|            )
190|3070d1|            
191|086e8f|        } catch let error as GitHubAuthError {
192|42793f|            self.errorMessage = error.localizedDescription
193|864dfa|            throw error
194|853889|        } catch {
195|701836|            let authError = GitHubAuthError.networkError(error)
196|9fce19|            self.errorMessage = authError.localizedDescription
197|fc009e|            throw authError
198|5f3077|        }
199|27e597|    }

201|d6eb10|    // MARK: - Token Polling
202|b4687f|    
203|463ea2|    /// Step 2: Poll GitHub until user authorizes (or timeout)
204|f74cbb|    private func startPolling(deviceCode: String, interval: Int, expiresIn: Int) {
205|fd9eb9|        // Cancel any existing poll
206|34c205|        pollTask?.cancel()
207|780222|        isPolling = true
208|d6ed84|        
209|7bc0a7|        pollTask = Task {
210|683a9c|            let pollInterval = max(interval, 5) // GitHub minimum is 5 seconds
211|49b210|            let deadline = Date().addingTimeInterval(TimeInterval(expiresIn))
212|3070d1|            
213|dac4c4|            while !Task.isCancelled && Date() < deadline {
214|0def4c|                // Wait the required interval
215|89d237|                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: UInt64(pollInterval) * 1_000_000_000)
216|216278|                
217|bc71c9|                guard !Task.isCancelled else { break }
218|216278|                
219|a9ed45|                do {
220|329790|                    let token = try await pollForToken(deviceCode: deviceCode)
221|dd2193|                    
222|7dcb0d|                    // Success! Save token and fetch user
223|8e6188|                    try? KeychainManager.shared.saveGitHubToken(token)
224|e3777a|                    self.isAuthenticated = true
225|be724b|                    self.isPolling = false
226|536f8b|                    self.deviceCodeResponse = nil
227|dd2193|                    
228|5ed0e2|                    try? await fetchUser(token: token)
229|dd2193|                    
230|03abf0|                    print("[GitHubAuth] Successfully authenticated!")
231|dd2193|                    
232|433a32|                    // Notify other parts of the app
233|ec4297|                    NotificationCenter.default.post(
234|3740e3|                        name: NSNotification.Name("GitHubAuthDidChange"),
235|115d90|                        object: nil,
236|d0b441|                        userInfo: ["authenticated": true]
237|1961a4|                    )
238|d253ab|                    return
239|dd2193|                    
240|2559bc|                } catch GitHubAuthError.tokenPollDenied {
241|fca15e|                    self.errorMessage = "Login was denied."
242|be724b|                    self.isPolling = false
243|536f8b|                    self.deviceCodeResponse = nil
244|d253ab|                    return
245|dd2193|                    
246|eceb72|                } catch GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired {
247|1af66c|                    // Keep polling until deadline
248|f41bef|                    continue
249|dd2193|                    
250|6bf1ca|                } catch {
251|6d6a4c|                    // authorization_pending - keep polling
252|f41bef|                    continue
253|4e2d32|                }
254|a7dc16|            }
255|3070d1|            
256|8a21bd|            // Timed out
257|a8f1c2|            if !Task.isCancelled {
258|d00484|                self.errorMessage = "Login timed out. Please try again."
259|95ab45|                self.isPolling = false
260|b2bc23|                self.deviceCodeResponse = nil
261|a7dc16|            }
262|5f3077|        }
263|27e597|    }
264|b4687f|    
265|5c071c|    /// Single poll attempt to exchange device code for token
266|8fdc58|    private func pollForToken(deviceCode: String) async throws -> String {
267|3b9f39|        let url = URL(string: "https://github.com/login/oauth/access_token")!
268|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
269|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
270|3fa184|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Accept")
271|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
272|d6ed84|        
273|90fe0a|        let body: [String: String] = [
274|86ed4b|            "client_id": Self.clientID,
275|155c27|            "device_code": deviceCode,
276|78700f|            "grant_type": "urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:device_code"
277|220505|        ]
278|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
279|d6ed84|        
280|251aeb|        let (data, _) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
281|d6ed84|        
282|7f28b2|        // Parse response
283|eb46b7|        guard let json = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any] else {
284|fce97b|            throw GitHubAuthError.invalidResponse
285|5f3077|        }
286|d6ed84|        
287|a20373|        // Check for access token
288|e54ce0|        if let accessToken = json["access_token"] as? String {
289|5f184c|            return accessToken
290|5f3077|        }
291|d6ed84|        
292|117542|        // Check for error states
293|e969c8|        if let error = json["error"] as? String {
294|da39ef|            switch error {
295|f29883|            case "authorization_pending":
296|15ace7|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired // Not really expired, just pending
297|938a8b|            case "slow_down":
298|2dcdae|                // Need to increase interval - sleep extra 5 seconds
299|0ec537|                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 5_000_000_000)
300|a2c53f|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired
301|6475f3|            case "expired_token":
302|a2c53f|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired
303|354722|            case "access_denied":
304|7c97f9|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollDenied
305|ea3438|            default:
306|6fb117|                let description = json["error_description"] as? String ?? error
307|6503e4|                throw GitHubAuthError.deviceFlowFailed(description)
308|a7dc16|            }
309|5f3077|        }
310|d6ed84|        
311|f01e4e|        throw GitHubAuthError.invalidResponse
312|27e597|    }
313|b4687f|    
314|265ecc|    // MARK: - Fetch User
315|b4687f|    
316|975a6e|    func fetchUser(token: String? = nil) async throws {
317|487094|        let authToken = token ?? KeychainManager.shared.getGitHubToken()
318|a15a83|        guard let authToken else {
319|a782aa|            throw GitHubAuthError.userFetchFailed("No token available")
320|5f3077|        }
321|d6ed84|        
322|9730a7|        let url = URL(string: "https://api.github.com/user")!
323|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
324|136018|        request.setValue("Bearer \(authToken)", forHTTPHeaderField: "Authorization")
325|58101d|        request.setValue("application/vnd.github+json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Accept")
326|d6ed84|        
327|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
328|d6ed84|        
329|3a0c01|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse,
330|acd675|              httpResponse.statusCode == 200 else {
331|18d01d|            let statusCode = (response as? HTTPURLResponse)?.statusCode ?? -1
332|c4bb91|            throw GitHubAuthError.userFetchFailed("HTTP \(statusCode)")
333|5f3077|        }
334|d6ed84|        
335|900ed2|        let decoder = JSONDecoder()
336|2135f0|        self.user = try decoder.decode(GitHubUser.self, from: data)
337|27e597|    }
338|b4687f|    
339|62b3c3|    // MARK: - Logout
340|b4687f|    
341|69ba08|    func logout() {
342|34c205|        pollTask?.cancel()
343|ffbaca|        pollTask = nil
344|ca7dff|        isPolling = false
345|dc2ea0|        deviceCodeResponse = nil
346|d6ed84|        
347|787655|        try? KeychainManager.shared.deleteGitHubToken()
348|579d6c|        isAuthenticated = false
349|500bbd|        user = nil
350|5a9168|        errorMessage = nil
351|d6ed84|        
352|63edcc|        NotificationCenter.default.post(
353|277513|            name: NSNotification.Name("GitHubAuthDidChange"),
354|33f159|            object: nil,
355|47a97c|            userInfo: ["authenticated": false]
356|3143a4|        )
357|d6ed84|        
358|1aeafb|        print("[GitHubAuth] Logged out")
359|27e597|    }
360|b4687f|    
361|7a17f8|    // MARK: - Cancel Login
362|b4687f|    
363|477f9c|    func cancelLogin() {
364|34c205|        pollTask?.cancel()
365|ffbaca|        pollTask = nil
366|ca7dff|        isPolling = false
367|dc2ea0|        deviceCodeResponse = nil
368|295f36|        isLoading = false
369|5a9168|        errorMessage = nil

186|8360c6|        // Add to history
187|94b9dd|        allNotifications.insert(notification, at: 0)
188|d6ed84|

192|5f3077|        }
193|d6ed84|        
194|d11393|        // Show as toast (max 3 visible)
195|14a630|        withAnimation(.spring(response: 0.35, dampingFraction: 0.85)) {
196|e06322|            activeNotifications.append(notification)
197|e0ce67|            if activeNotifications.count > 3 {
198|a385d9|                activeNotifications.removeFirst()
199|a7dc16|            }
200|5f3077|        }
201|d6ed84|        
202|c9d67c|        // Schedule auto-dismiss
203|0e3e94|        if let seconds = notification.autoDismissSeconds {
204|1b792a|            let id = notification.id
205|c44710|            dismissTimers[id] = Task {
206|c7aa25|                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: UInt64(seconds * 1_000_000_000))
207|8ac0db|                if !Task.isCancelled {
208|b307f2|                    dismiss(notification)
209|4e2d32|                }
210|a7dc16|            }
211|5f3077|        }
212|27e597|    }

224|4e2d32|                }
225|a7dc16|            }
226|5f3077|        }
227|d6ed84|

230|110e3e|        ) { [weak self] notif in

90|3070d1|            
91|abdb8d|            let status = SecItemAdd(query as CFDictionary, nil)

186|8360c6|        // Add to history

192|5f3077|        }

199|a7dc16|            }
200|5f3077|        }
201|d6ed84|

204|1b792a|            let id = notification.id
205|c44710|            dismissTimers[id] = Task {
206|c7aa25|                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: UInt64(seconds * 1_000_000_000))

208|b307f2|                    dismiss(notification)
209|4e2d32|                }
210|a7dc16|            }
211|5f3077|        }
212|27e597|    }

265|adc83b|

273|81f0bc|                    at: url,
274|f8247b|                    includingPropertiesForKeys: [.isDirectoryKey],
275|710ee3|                    options: [.skipsHiddenFiles]
276|6f642e|                )
277|c19b31|                let children = contents.compactMap { buildFileTree(at: $0) }.sorted { $0.name < $1.name }
278|f12663|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: true, children: children)
279|f5a6eb|            } else {
280|0a1aa4|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: false, children: [])
281|a7dc16|            }

298|c1ef96|    private func uniqueDestinationURL(for initial: URL, fileManager: FileManager) -> URL {
299|690372|        if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: initial.path) { return initial }
300|adc83b|
301|e383c4|        let folder = initial.deletingLastPathComponent()
302|75aa53|        let isDirectory = (try? initial.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey]).isDirectory) ?? initial.hasDirectoryPath
303|adc83b|
304|b8c47e|        let baseName = initial.deletingPathExtension().lastPathComponent
305|ef2053|        let ext = initial.pathExtension
306|adc83b|
307|48b2e9|        var counter = 1
308|722ae9|        while true {
309|41dfde|            let candidateName: String
310|f8f674|            if ext.isEmpty {
311|943330|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter)"
312|f5a6eb|            } else {
313|b2e7c3|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter).\(ext)"
314|a7dc16|            }
315|adc83b|
316|80986c|            let candidate = folder.appendingPathComponent(candidateName, isDirectory: isDirectory)
317|840e8b|            if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: candidate.path) {
318|659238|                return candidate
319|a7dc16|            }
320|484fa6|            counter += 1
321|5f3077|        }
322|27e597|    }

151|b15fe3|    /// Rename a file or folder and return the new URL.
152|d0a1b6|    func renameItem(at url: URL, to newName: String) throws -> URL {
153|079331|        let parent = url.deletingLastPathComponent()
154|adc83b|
155|329f7b|        let didStartItem = url.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
156|51ed14|        let didStartParent = (!didStartItem) ? parent.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() : false
157|cb255a|        defer {
158|d5ee8f|            if didStartItem { url.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
159|552be4|            if didStartParent { parent.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
160|5f3077|        }
161|adc83b|
162|75f3e1|        let isDirectory = (try? url.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey]).isDirectory) ?? false
163|962746|        let destination = parent.appendingPathComponent(newName, isDirectory: isDirectory)
164|adc83b|
165|5963ae|        try FileManager.default.moveItem(at: url, to: destination)
166|9c36f1|        DispatchQueue.main.async { self.refreshFileTree() }
167|1351dd|        return destination
168|27e597|    }

170|3123e6|    /// Move a file/folder into a destination folder and return the new URL.
171|b64a18|    func moveItem(at source: URL, to destinationFolder: URL) throws -> URL {
172|1fc2ac|        let destinationIsDirectory = (try? destinationFolder.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey]).isDirectory) ?? destinationFolder.hasDirectoryPath
173|0db880|        guard destinationIsDirectory else {
174|a9902e|            throw NSError(domain: "FileSystemNavigator", code: 4, userInfo: [NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Destination must be a folder"])
175|5f3077|        }
176|adc83b|
177|1552e8|        let isDirectory = (try? source.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey]).isDirectory) ?? source.hasDirectoryPath
178|a367ea|        let fileManager = FileManager.default
179|adc83b|
180|2f0388|        // Access security scoped resources for both ends.
181|02eef9|        let didStartSource = source.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
182|1743f6|        let didStartSourceParent = (!didStartSource) ? source.deletingLastPathComponent().startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() : false
183|61e821|        let didStartDest = destinationFolder.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
184|cb255a|        defer {
185|143445|            if didStartSource { source.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
186|ea4c03|            if didStartSourceParent { source.deletingLastPathComponent().stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
187|e4107f|            if didStartDest { destinationFolder.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
188|5f3077|        }
189|adc83b|
190|dfbde9|        let initialDest = destinationFolder.appendingPathComponent(source.lastPathComponent, isDirectory: isDirectory)
191|994ef8|        let finalDest = uniqueDestinationURL(for: initialDest, fileManager: fileManager)
192|adc83b|
193|4da690|        do {
194|805ffe|            try fileManager.moveItem(at: source, to: finalDest)
195|853889|        } catch {
196|52af20|            // Fallback for cross-volume moves.
197|38364f|            try fileManager.copyItem(at: source, to: finalDest)
198|acdeb6|            try fileManager.removeItem(at: source)
199|5f3077|        }
200|adc83b|
201|9c36f1|        DispatchQueue.main.async { self.refreshFileTree() }
202|4e0314|        return finalDest
203|27e597|    }
204|adc83b|
205|38f505|    /// Task-required API: move `source` to `destination`.
206|b08146|    /// - If `destination` is a folder, the item is moved *into* that folder.
207|7b9b24|    /// - If `destination` is a file URL, the item is moved/renamed to that exact URL.
208|144775|    @discardableResult
209|48d5ef|    func moveItem(from source: URL, to destination: URL) -> Bool {
210|4da690|        do {
211|9edeba|            let destinationIsDirectory = (try? destination.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey]).isDirectory) ?? destination.hasDirectoryPath
212|ed4781|            if destinationIsDirectory {
213|e4114c|                _ = try moveItem(at: source, to: destination)
214|f5a6eb|            } else {
215|3ee1c6|                let didStartSource = source.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
216|b65ae4|                let didStartSourceParent = (!didStartSource) ? source.deletingLastPathComponent().startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() : false
217|13510b|                let didStartDestParent = destination.deletingLastPathComponent().startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
218|cf089b|                defer {
219|481a15|                    if didStartSource { source.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
220|74071a|                    if didStartSourceParent { source.deletingLastPathComponent().stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
221|aedab7|                    if didStartDestParent { destination.deletingLastPathComponent().stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
222|4e2d32|                }
223|adc83b|
224|57e707|                try FileManager.default.moveItem(at: source, to: destination)
225|f4cba8|                DispatchQueue.main.async { self.refreshFileTree() }
226|a7dc16|            }
227|40cfc4|            return true
228|853889|        } catch {
229|3cc302|            print("Error moving item from \(source) to \(destination): \(error)")
230|e2e187|            return false
231|5f3077|        }
232|27e597|    }
233|adc83b|
234|878ef1|    /// Delete a file or folder and refresh the tree.
235|144775|    @discardableResult
236|f1a606|    func deleteItem(at url: URL) -> Bool {
237|6ef294|        var success = false
238|adc83b|
239|8a4750|        // Try to access the item directly; if that fails, try its parent folder (common for child URLs).
240|329f7b|        let didStartItem = url.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
241|1b55fa|        let parentURL = url.deletingLastPathComponent()
242|13dbc8|        let didStartParent = (!didStartItem) ? parentURL.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() : false
243|adc83b|
244|cb255a|        defer {
245|d5ee8f|            if didStartItem { url.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
246|b12720|            if didStartParent { parentURL.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
247|5f3077|        }
248|adc83b|
249|4da690|        do {
250|32a845|            try FileManager.default.removeItem(at: url) // works for files and directories
251|5b7229|            success = true
252|853889|        } catch {
253|0b5bbc|            print("Error deleting item at \(url): \(error)")
254|4437a6|            success = false
255|5f3077|        }
256|adc83b|
257|9c36f1|        DispatchQueue.main.async { self.refreshFileTree() }
258|1d3fe4|        return success
259|27e597|    }
260|adc83b|
261|9f2857|    // MARK: - Tree
262|adc83b|
263|441de9|    private func buildFileTree(at url: URL) -> FileTreeNode? {
264|a367ea|        let fileManager = FileManager.default
265|adc83b|
266|4da690|        do {
267|45bac6|            let resourceValues = try url.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey, .nameKey])
268|06b9e9|            let isDirectory = resourceValues.isDirectory ?? false
269|2496f5|            let name = resourceValues.name ?? url.lastPathComponent
270|adc83b|
271|8a6b94|            if isDirectory {
272|2a0651|                let contents = try fileManager.contentsOfDirectory(
273|81f0bc|                    at: url,
274|f8247b|                    includingPropertiesForKeys: [.isDirectoryKey],
275|710ee3|                    options: [.skipsHiddenFiles]
276|6f642e|                )
277|c19b31|                let children = contents.compactMap { buildFileTree(at: $0) }.sorted { $0.name < $1.name }
278|f12663|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: true, children: children)
279|f5a6eb|            } else {
280|0a1aa4|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: false, children: [])
281|a7dc16|            }
282|853889|        } catch {
283|8e9e2d|            print("Error building file tree at \(url): \(error)")
284|1c8557|            return nil
285|5f3077|        }
286|27e597|    }
287|adc83b|
288|d090c5|    func toggleExpanded(path: String) {
289|50b6a4|        if expandedPaths.contains(path) {
290|f464b3|            expandedPaths.remove(path)
291|b31999|        } else {
292|35f20f|            expandedPaths.insert(path)
293|5f3077|        }
294|27e597|    }
295|adc83b|
296|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
297|adc83b|
298|c1ef96|    private func uniqueDestinationURL(for initial: URL, fileManager: FileManager) -> URL {
299|690372|        if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: initial.path) { return initial }
300|adc83b|
301|e383c4|        let folder = initial.deletingLastPathComponent()
302|75aa53|        let isDirectory = (try? initial.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey]).isDirectory) ?? initial.hasDirectoryPath
303|adc83b|
304|b8c47e|        let baseName = initial.deletingPathExtension().lastPathComponent
305|ef2053|        let ext = initial.pathExtension
306|adc83b|
307|48b2e9|        var counter = 1
308|722ae9|        while true {
309|41dfde|            let candidateName: String
310|f8f674|            if ext.isEmpty {
311|943330|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter)"
312|f5a6eb|            } else {
313|b2e7c3|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter).\(ext)"
314|a7dc16|            }
315|adc83b|
316|80986c|            let candidate = folder.appendingPathComponent(candidateName, isDirectory: isDirectory)
317|840e8b|            if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: candidate.path) {
318|659238|                return candidate
319|a7dc16|            }
320|484fa6|            counter += 1
321|5f3077|        }
322|27e597|    }
323|b31277|}
324|adc83b|
325|775255|struct FileTreeNode: Identifiable {
326|c90f8e|    let id = UUID()
327|bbb634|    let url: URL
328|a5193b|    let name: String
329|e1c6d7|    let isDirectory: Bool
330|b61a7b|    let children: [FileTreeNode]
331|adc83b|
332|e25084|    var fileExtension: String {
333|26034d|        (name as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
334|27e597|    }
335|b31277|}

65|5507e2|    func font(forFamily family: String, size: CGFloat) -> UIFont {
66|36809c|        // Try common iOS font PostScript names first.
67|8eed34|        let candidates: [String]
68|b37ed2|        switch family {
69|776aba|        case "Menlo":
70|bfb914|            candidates = ["Menlo-Regular", "Menlo"]
71|08b76c|        case "Courier New":
72|fb8c13|            candidates = ["CourierNewPSMT", "Courier New"]
73|0cfb7f|        case "SF Mono":
74|0617dd|            candidates = ["SFMono-Regular", "SF Mono", ".SFMono-Regular"]
75|0298e7|        case "Fira Code":
76|dc7760|            candidates = ["FiraCode-Regular", "Fira Code"]
77|30da51|        case "JetBrains Mono":
78|29ba7c|            candidates = ["JetBrainsMono-Regular", "JetBrains Mono"]
79|520b7d|        default:
80|d7ec8a|            candidates = [family]
81|5f3077|        }
82|adc83b|
83|ef3c25|        for name in candidates {
84|b0cf4a|            if let font = UIFont(name: name, size: size) {
85|404673|                // Ensure monospaced feel if available; otherwise return as-is.
86|6dcd7e|                return font
87|a7dc16|            }
88|5f3077|        }
89|adc83b|
90|c377bd|        // Fallback
91|0966c5|        return UIFont.monospacedSystemFont(ofSize: size, weight: .regular)
92|27e597|    }
93|adc83b|
94|a8b407|    /// A stable key used to detect when re-highlighting is necessary.

118|c903ed|        if value.isNull {
119|c04d4d|            return "null"

121|b32932|            return "undefined"
122|edfa6b|        } else if value.isBoolean {

131|419991|        } else if value.isString {

133|a72377|        } else if value.isArray {
134|d7f252|            if let array = value.toArray() {

136|a7dc16|            }

138|bb3c98|        } else if value.isObject {

141|a9b0f4|                if let json = json, let str = String(data: json, encoding: .utf8) {
142|cfed56|                    return str
143|4e2d32|                }
144|a7dc16|            }

146|5f3077|        }

55|e7ca87|        guard !cleanWord.isEmpty else { return nil }
56|d6ed84|

59|eb7760|            "print": HoverInfo(

65|262e86|            ),

68|cfee8c|                typeInfo: "Swift.String",
69|b11a86|                documentation: "A Unicode string value that is a collection of characters.",
70|b6f715|                range: nil,
71|6ad9a9|                language: "swift"
72|262e86|            ),

74|914a7c|                signature: "protocol View",

77|b6f715|                range: nil,
78|6ad9a9|                language: "swift"
79|43d041|            )
80|220505|        ]
81|d6ed84|        
82|631e3b|        return swiftDocs[cleanWord]
83|27e597|    }

10|a43a38|final class CodeExecutionService {

24|d148d5|    /// Execute the currently active file
25|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
26|4cfe18|    ///   - fileName: Name of the file to execute
27|13e212|    ///   - content: Content/code of the file
28|97d12a|    func executeCurrentFile(fileName: String, content: String) {
29|cc9311|        let fileExtension = (fileName as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
30|d6ed84|        
31|2eea91|        switch fileExtension {
32|ff039a|        case "js", "mjs":
33|760a4e|            executeJavaScript(fileName: fileName, code: content)
34|048ca0|        case "ts", "tsx":
35|b896b9|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] TypeScript execution requires transpilation. Coming soon!", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
36|de8aa1|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.javascript
37|e1d221|        case "py":
38|9e2a3c|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] Python execution not yet available on-device.", to: OutputChannel.python, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
39|25499b|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.python
40|520b7d|        default:
41|cc7290|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] No runner available for .\(fileExtension) files", to: OutputChannel.output, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
42|c75b79|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.output
43|5f3077|        }
44|27e597|    }
45|b4687f|    
46|9b6f68|    // MARK: - JavaScript Execution
47|b4687f|    
48|d76b7d|    private func executeJavaScript(fileName: String, code: String) {
49|0dec37|        // Switch to JavaScript output channel
50|e39e9c|        outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.javascript
51|d6ed84|        
52|a728d5|        // Clear previous output and show execution header
53|1511a8|        outputManager.clear(OutputChannel.javascript)
54|6cfb10|        outputManager.append("▶ Running: \(fileName)", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
55|89174a|        outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
56|d6ed84|        
57|a3f62b|        // Create a fresh JSRunner instance
58|462f68|        jsRunner = JSRunner()
59|d6ed84|        
60|e61664|        // Set up console handler to capture output
61|305ad3|        jsRunner?.setConsoleHandler { [weak self] message in
62|270dfc|            Task { @MainActor in
63|150252|                guard let self = self else { return }
64|216278|                
65|b169c6|                // Determine stream type based on message prefix
66|27b18b|                let streamType: StreamType = message.hasPrefix("[ERROR]") || message.hasPrefix("[EXCEPTION]") ? StreamType.stderr : StreamType.stdout
67|216278|                
68|4b39b7|                // Remove the prefix for cleaner output display
69|62636a|                var cleanMessage = message
70|121995|                for prefix in ["[LOG] ", "[INFO] ", "[WARN] ", "[ERROR] ", "[EXCEPTION] "] {
71|1df682|                    if message.hasPrefix(prefix) {
72|11af1f|                        cleanMessage = String(message.dropFirst(prefix.count))
73|28a64b|                        break
74|c9717a|                    }
75|4e2d32|                }
76|216278|                
77|6a3616|                self.outputManager.append(cleanMessage, to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: streamType)
78|a7dc16|            }
79|5f3077|        }
80|d6ed84|        
81|5a9195|        // Execute the code asynchronously
82|0f1953|        Task {
83|073be0|            let startTime = Date()
84|3070d1|            
85|71cc09|            do {
86|f3a1fd|                let result = try await jsRunner?.execute(code: code)
87|1ee120|                let duration = Date().timeIntervalSince(startTime)
88|216278|                
89|73b1fb|                // Show result if it's not undefined
90|f23508|                if let result = result, !result.isUndefined {
91|8a7075|                    let resultString = formatJSValue(result)
92|174733|                    outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
93|1c40a4|                    outputManager.append("⮐ Result: \(resultString)", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
94|4e2d32|                }
95|216278|                
96|b2c6e7|                // Show completion message
97|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
98|2c8c65|                outputManager.append("✓ Completed in \(String(format: "%.2f", duration * 1000))ms", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
99|216278|                
100|77a0dc|            } catch let error as JSRunnerError {
101|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
102|a0d863|                outputManager.append("✗ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
103|216278|                
104|91b9a2|            } catch {
105|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
106|a0d863|                outputManager.append("✗ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
107|a7dc16|            }
108|3070d1|            
109|eb797f|            // Clean up runner
110|e9e019|            jsRunner = nil
111|5f3077|        }
112|27e597|    }
113|b4687f|    
114|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
115|b4687f|    
116|7aa5bd|    /// Format a JSValue for display
117|e68bfd|    private func formatJSValue(_ value: JSValue) -> String {
118|c903ed|        if value.isNull {
119|c04d4d|            return "null"
120|35d02e|        } else if value.isUndefined {
121|b32932|            return "undefined"
122|edfa6b|        } else if value.isBoolean {
123|1a76ee|            return value.toBool() ? "true" : "false"
124|4e414f|        } else if value.isNumber {
125|9abc83|            let num = value.toNumber()
126|d3fc6f|            // Check if it's an integer
127|a09f20|            if let n = num, n.doubleValue == Double(n.intValue) {
128|ee9ad8|                return "\(n.intValue)"
129|a7dc16|            }
130|64a140|            return "\(num?.doubleValue ?? 0)"
131|419991|        } else if value.isString {
132|7c8a45|            return "\"\(value.toString() ?? "")\""
133|a72377|        } else if value.isArray {
134|d7f252|            if let array = value.toArray() {
135|c35363|                return "[\(array.map { "\($0)" }.joined(separator: ", "))]"
136|a7dc16|            }
137|976c47|            return "[]"
138|bb3c98|        } else if value.isObject {
139|b4fae0|            if let dict = value.toDictionary() {
140|ee1ab7|                let json = try? JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: dict, options: [.prettyPrinted, .sortedKeys])
141|a9b0f4|                if let json = json, let str = String(data: json, encoding: .utf8) {
142|cfed56|                    return str
143|4e2d32|                }
144|a7dc16|            }
145|0b436d|            return value.toString() ?? "[object]"
146|5f3077|        }
147|bbc620|        return value.toString() ?? "undefined"
148|27e597|    }
149|b31277|}

224|7d7b95|    private struct CompletionContext {
225|0dee4e|        let prefix: String
226|b4787e|        let replacementRange: Range<String.Index>
227|56198f|        let isMemberCompletion: Bool
228|79772b|        let memberBase: String?
229|27e597|    }
230|adc83b|
231|f6601a|    private func completionContext(in text: String, cursorPosition: Int) -> CompletionContext? {
232|4c2df9|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return nil }
233|d6ed84|        
234|42915b|        // Safety check: ensure cursorPosition is within bounds
235|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))
236|1fae78|        let cursorIndex = text.index(text.startIndex, offsetBy: safeCursor)
237|adc83b|
238|5aebf3|        // Find start of current identifier (letters/digits/_).
239|39f169|        var start = cursorIndex
240|26ebb3|        while start > text.startIndex {
241|c5c76e|            let prev = text.index(before: start)
242|9f8a31|            if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
243|1929f8|                start = prev
244|f5a6eb|            } else {
245|74cfd8|                break
246|a7dc16|            }
247|5f3077|        }
248|adc83b|
249|bf292f|        let prefix = String(text[start..<cursorIndex])
250|adc83b|
251|824562|        // Member completion if immediately preceded by '.'
252|e374b4|        var isMember = false
253|e47c72|        var memberBase: String? = nil
254|adc83b|
255|0c2c38|        if start > text.startIndex {
256|2aa058|            let dotIndex = text.index(before: start)
257|88bd65|            if text[dotIndex] == "." {
258|ca8397|                isMember = true
259|adc83b|
260|6f6689|                // Parse identifier before '.'
261|91f615|                var baseEnd = dotIndex
262|521a36|                var baseStart = baseEnd
263|5fa357|                while baseStart > text.startIndex {
264|56e352|                    let prev = text.index(before: baseStart)
265|2a8ddd|                    if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
266|fbabfa|                        baseStart = prev
267|540066|                    } else {
268|28a64b|                        break
269|c9717a|                    }
270|4e2d32|                }
271|f96abf|                let base = String(text[baseStart..<baseEnd])
272|ce472b|                if !base.isEmpty {
273|b9c992|                    memberBase = base
274|4e2d32|                }
275|a7dc16|            }
276|5f3077|        }
277|adc83b|
278|081616|        return CompletionContext(prefix: prefix,
279|c93ac4|                                 replacementRange: start..<cursorIndex,
280|a50c25|                                 isMemberCompletion: isMember,
281|ee9636|                                 memberBase: memberBase)
282|27e597|    }
283|adc83b|
284|818e4b|    private func isIdentifierChar(_ c: Character) -> Bool {
285|c233b9|        // Swift identifiers are more complex, but this is enough for basic autocomplete.
286|a164d4|        return c.isLetter || c.isNumber || c == "_"
287|27e597|    }
288|adc83b|
289|117bcf|    private func memberCandidates(forBase base: String) -> [String] {
290|cf1cb2|        // Basic heuristic: only match known stdlib types by exact name.
291|622249|        if let members = memberCompletions[base] { return members }
292|b72a10|        return []
293|27e597|    }
294|adc83b|
295|6ba6d8|    private func extractSymbols(from text: String) -> [String] {
296|1098cf|        // Very lightweight symbol extraction: looks for common declarations.
297|141450|        // Intentionally best-effort; keeps FEAT-046 self-contained.
298|f746d2|        var results = Set<String>()
299|adc83b|
300|f97d0d|        func addMatches(pattern: String) {
301|ca0afa|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return }
302|6c811f|            let ns = text as NSString
303|b25f5b|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
304|d25847|            regex.enumerateMatches(in: text, options: [], range: range) { match, _, _ in
305|14f5aa|                guard let match, match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return }
306|345d9a|                let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
307|de56e8|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { return }
308|8989a1|                let name = ns.substring(with: nameRange)
309|66b469|                if !name.isEmpty { results.insert(name) }
310|a7dc16|            }
311|5f3077|        }
312|adc83b|
313|a1c515|        // func Foo
314|cd4071|        addMatches(pattern: "\\bfunc\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
315|5eaefb|        // class/struct/enum/protocol/typealias Foo
316|685691|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:class|struct|enum|protocol|typealias)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
317|3764b8|        // let/var foo (captures first name before : = , )
318|bbf05c|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)(?=\\s*[:=,])")
319|adc83b|
320|01a90c|        return results.sorted { $0.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1) == .orderedAscending }
321|27e597|    }
322|adc83b|
323|1470f2|    private func mergeAndSort(_ items: [Suggestion]) -> [Suggestion] {
324|ff1146|        // Keep highest-scored entry per id.
325|f6e288|        var bestById: [String: Suggestion] = [:]
326|686171|        for item in items {
327|0701eb|            if let existing = bestById[item.id] {
328|d5a6de|                if item.score > existing.score {
329|763640|                    bestById[item.id] = item
330|4e2d32|                }
331|f5a6eb|            } else {
332|b949a2|                bestById[item.id] = item
333|a7dc16|            }
334|5f3077|        }
335|adc83b|
336|cfe5f9|        return bestById.values.sorted {
337|708c2d|            if $0.score != $1.score { return $0.score > $1.score }
338|e5aa71|            return $0.displayText.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1.displayText) == .orderedAscending
339|5f3077|        }
340|27e597|    }
341|adc83b|
342|ba218c|    private func apply(items: [Suggestion]) {
343|02d13b|        suggestionItems = items
344|f6da05|        suggestions = items.map { $0.displayText }
345|c77b90|        showSuggestions = !items.isEmpty
346|81a6a8|        selectedIndex = 0
347|27e597|    }
348|b31277|}
349|adc83b|
350|c6407f|// MARK: - Safe Array Access
351|adc83b|
352|d72239|private extension Array {
353|686e51|    subscript(safe index: Int) -> Element? {
354|0b415a|        indices.contains(index) ? self[index] : nil
355|27e597|    }

21|fe2801|/// Thread-safe LRU cache for inline code suggestions with TTL expiration
22|e5ec5c|/// Maximum 100 entries, 5 minute expiration
23|4db88e|final class SuggestionCache {
24|f620b3|    // MARK: - Constants
25|b4687f|    
26|21ee5c|    static let maxEntries = 100
27|d2414b|    static let expirationInterval: TimeInterval = 300 // 5 minutes
28|b4687f|    
29|6503ae|    // MARK: - Properties
30|b4687f|    
31|34e47f|    private var cache: [String: CacheEntry] = [:]
32|48d9ba|    /// Ordered list to track LRU access order (least recently used at the beginning)
33|830760|    private var lruOrder: [String] = []
34|b4687f|    
35|dd918f|    /// Thread-safe queue for cache operations using concurrent queue with barriers
36|a3a1ae|    private let cacheQueue = DispatchQueue(label: "com.vscodeipados.suggestioncache", attributes: .concurrent)
37|b4687f|    
38|db9bbb|    // MARK: - Singleton
39|b4687f|    
40|8f377e|    static let shared = SuggestionCache()
41|b4687f|    
42|54113e|    private init() {}
43|b4687f|    
44|fb9d4d|    // MARK: - Key Generation
45|b4687f|    
46|938b88|    /// Generates a SHA256 hash from the code context string
47|62811f|    /// - Parameter context: The code context to hash
48|d02457|    /// - Returns: A hex-encoded SHA256 hash string
49|233ae6|    private func hashContext(_ context: String) -> String {
50|ab8594|        let data = Data(context.utf8)
51|97a5e1|        var hash = [UInt8](repeating: 0, count: Int(CC_SHA256_DIGEST_LENGTH))
52|3e64b0|        _ = data.withUnsafeBytes { bytes in
53|3e6f69|            CC_SHA256(bytes.baseAddress, CC_LONG(data.count), &hash)
54|5f3077|        }
55|f6441a|        return hash.map { String(format: "%02hhx", $0) }.joined()
56|27e597|    }
57|b4687f|    
58|36e755|    // MARK: - Public API
59|b4687f|    
60|033bf4|    /// Retrieves a cached suggestion for the given code context if it exists and hasn't expired.
61|c435d3|    /// Updates LRU order on successful retrieval.
62|112b9c|    /// - Parameter context: The code context string to look up
63|6d9dea|    /// - Returns: The cached suggestion string, or nil if not found or expired
64|5ba297|    func get(context: String) -> String? {
65|a9c444|        let key = hashContext(context)
66|d6ed84|        
67|98f033|        return cacheQueue.sync {
68|9d266a|            guard let entry = cache[key] else {
69|15034a|                return nil
70|a7dc16|            }
71|3070d1|            
72|2f14e2|            // Check if entry has expired
73|e16ac4|            if entry.isExpired {
74|89aad4|                // Remove expired entry
75|185e7a|                cache.removeValue(forKey: key)
76|8d693c|                removeFromLRU(key)
77|15034a|                return nil
78|a7dc16|            }
79|3070d1|            
80|bff744|            // Update LRU order - move to end (most recently used)
81|960881|            updateLRUOrder(key)
82|3070d1|            
83|c5897e|            return entry.suggestion
84|5f3077|        }
85|27e597|    }
86|b4687f|    
87|c07d11|    /// Stores a suggestion for the given code context in the cache.
88|94f7ba|    /// Evicts oldest entry if cache is at max capacity.
89|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
90|3b7936|    ///   - context: The code context string (used as cache key via SHA256 hash)
91|0e56d7|    ///   - suggestion: The AI suggestion to cache
92|682096|    func set(context: String, suggestion: String) {
93|a9c444|        let key = hashContext(context)
94|d6ed84|        
95|2eb06b|        cacheQueue.async(flags: .barrier) { [weak self] in
96|2baf81|            guard let self = self else { return }
97|3070d1|            
98|48bad1|            // Create new entry with TTL
99|464f63|            let entry = CacheEntry(
100|47deb4|                suggestion: suggestion,
101|95552d|                contextHash: key,
102|3a2d94|                ttl: Self.expirationInterval
103|43d041|            )
104|3070d1|            
105|9c2fb2|            // Check if this is an update to existing entry
106|1b247c|            if self.cache[key] != nil {
107|b09099|                // Update existing entry
108|04cd95|                self.cache[key] = entry
109|664568|                self.updateLRUOrder(key)
110|f5a6eb|            } else {
111|a4567b|                // Check if we need to evict oldest entry
112|20b4bf|                if self.cache.count >= Self.maxEntries {
113|f4766d|                    self.evictLRUEntry()
114|4e2d32|                }
115|216278|                
116|e926f1|                // Add new entry
117|04cd95|                self.cache[key] = entry
118|d4d7a7|                self.lruOrder.append(key)
119|a7dc16|            }
120|5f3077|        }
121|27e597|    }
122|b4687f|    
123|06e36f|    /// Clears all entries from the cache.
124|5416f6|    func clear() {
125|2eb06b|        cacheQueue.async(flags: .barrier) { [weak self] in
126|1e7e79|            self?.cache.removeAll()
127|a434d2|            self?.lruOrder.removeAll()
128|5f3077|        }
129|27e597|    }
130|b4687f|    
131|81a958|    // MARK: - Private Helpers
132|b4687f|    
133|e268ba|    /// Removes a key from the LRU order tracking
134|9850b8|    private func removeFromLRU(_ key: String) {
135|acf9f5|        lruOrder.removeAll { $0 == key }
136|27e597|    }
137|b4687f|    
138|4e5908|    /// Updates LRU order by moving the accessed key to the end (most recently used)
139|e5b0f9|    private func updateLRUOrder(_ key: String) {
140|33983e|        removeFromLRU(key)
141|b3c36a|        lruOrder.append(key)
142|27e597|    }
143|b4687f|    
144|1d8cd3|    /// Evicts the least recently used entry from the cache
145|9bba21|    private func evictLRUEntry() {
146|1374a3|        guard !lruOrder.isEmpty else { return }
147|d6ed84|        
148|4b277f|        let oldestKey = lruOrder.removeFirst()
149|5cda32|        cache.removeValue(forKey: oldestKey)
150|27e597|    }
151|b4687f|    
152|70f772|    // MARK: - Debug/Testing
153|b4687f|    
154|897b17|    /// Returns the current number of cached entries (for testing/debugging purposes)
155|26c304|    var count: Int {
156|98f033|        return cacheQueue.sync {
157|14ea56|            // Clean up expired entries before counting
158|a1af1c|            let now = Date()
159|bfa8e1|            let expiredKeys = cache.filter { $0.value.expirationDate < now }.map { $0.key }
160|b44dd2|            for key in expiredKeys {
161|185e7a|                cache.removeValue(forKey: key)
162|8d693c|                removeFromLRU(key)
163|a7dc16|            }
164|27c5f5|            return cache.count
165|5f3077|        }
166|27e597|    }
167|b4687f|    
168|55c124|    /// Removes all expired entries from the cache
169|0ac3ae|    func cleanupExpired() {
170|2eb06b|        cacheQueue.async(flags: .barrier) { [weak self] in
171|2baf81|            guard let self = self else { return }
172|3070d1|            
173|a1af1c|            let now = Date()
174|9b20de|            let expiredKeys = self.cache.filter { $0.value.expirationDate < now }.map { $0.key }
175|3070d1|            
176|b44dd2|            for key in expiredKeys {
177|a42745|                self.cache.removeValue(forKey: key)
178|98338e|                self.removeFromLRU(key)
179|a7dc16|            }
180|5f3077|        }
181|27e597|    }

3|6505f2|/// A lightweight inlay-hints engine used to show inline type annotations.
4|63c993|///
5|18e543|/// Scope (FEAT-133):
6|1f06c1|/// - Detect simple Swift variable declarations without explicit types.
7|6b0114|/// - Infer basic types from the initializer expression.

9|4f8cca|final class InlayHintsManager {
10|5960e0|    static let shared = InlayHintsManager()
11|54113e|    private init() {}
12|adc83b|

14|adc83b|

17|adc83b|
18|7a2975|        /// 0-based line index.
19|c0eddc|        let line: Int
20|adc83b|
21|efa22a|        /// 0-based UTF16 column index within the line.
22|1b9532|        let column: Int
23|adc83b|

27|adc83b|
28|36e755|    // MARK: - Public API
29|adc83b|
30|2ce197|    func hints(for code: String, language: CodeLanguage) -> [InlayHint] {
31|b95802|        guard language == .swift else { return [] }
32|bb2b0b|        return swiftTypeHints(for: code)
33|27e597|    }
34|adc83b|
35|52c601|    // MARK: - Swift parsing
36|adc83b|
37|16c9d6|    private func swiftTypeHints(for code: String) -> [InlayHint] {
38|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
39|46c824|        var result: [InlayHint] = []
40|adc83b|
41|225f78|        // Matches:
42|e2c046|        //   let x = 5
43|2cac4f|        //   var name = "abc"
44|21217b|        // Avoids explicit type annotations because the pattern does not accept `:` before `=`.
45|49e410|        let pattern = "^\\s*(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*=\\s*(.+)$"
46|72432c|        let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: [])
47|adc83b|
48|d1a1ab|        for (lineIndex, line) in lines.enumerated() {
49|cbe876|            let trimmed = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
50|9b2e7c|            guard !trimmed.hasPrefix("//"), !trimmed.isEmpty else { continue }
51|adc83b|
52|18a8aa|            let nsLine = line as NSString
53|89c109|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: nsLine.length)
54|c471d9|            guard let match = regex?.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: range) else { continue }
55|ad3867|            guard match.numberOfRanges >= 3 else { continue }
56|adc83b|
57|423174|            let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
58|3c5579|            let rhsRange = match.range(at: 2)
59|7a7150|            if nameRange.location == NSNotFound || rhsRange.location == NSNotFound { continue }
60|adc83b|
61|165da4|            // Basic sanity checks: ignore tuple bindings like `let (a, b) = ...`
62|679645|            let name = nsLine.substring(with: nameRange)
63|5c9927|            guard !name.isEmpty else { continue }
64|adc83b|
65|666b05|            // RHS, stripped of trailing `//` comments (naive but practical).
66|53413c|            var rhs = nsLine.substring(with: rhsRange)
67|8beea4|            if let commentRange = rhs.range(of: "//") {
68|a56309|                rhs = String(rhs[..<commentRange.lowerBound])
69|a7dc16|            }
70|107569|            rhs = rhs.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
71|adc83b|
72|8f6e07|            // Infer a type. If we can’t infer, don’t create a hint.
73|992808|            guard let inferred = inferSwiftType(from: rhs) else { continue }
74|adc83b|
75|ed8c63|            // Column for hint placement = end of identifier.
76|f4b52b|            let hintColumn = nameRange.location + nameRange.length
77|32af9e|            result.append(InlayHint(line: lineIndex, column: hintColumn, text: ": \(inferred)"))
78|5f3077|        }
79|adc83b|
80|67ed82|        return result
81|27e597|    }
82|adc83b|
83|014518|    // MARK: - Swift type inference (basic)
84|adc83b|
85|e4ea7a|    private func inferSwiftType(from rawExpression: String) -> String? {
86|3784b4|        let expr = rawExpression.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
87|a14679|        guard !expr.isEmpty else { return nil }
88|adc83b|
89|ea35f3|        // Bool
90|62989c|        if expr == "true" || expr == "false" { return "Bool" }
91|adc83b|
92|5f3b7c|        // String literal (simple)
93|553d7e|        if expr.hasPrefix("\"") { return "String" }
94|adc83b|
95|f70754|        // Numeric: Int
96|b5aa27|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+$") { return "Int" }
97|f87d78|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0x[0-9A-Fa-f]+$") { return "Int" }
98|212646|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0b[01]+$") { return "Int" }
99|d18d43|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0o[0-7]+$") { return "Int" }
100|adc83b|
101|e6218e|        // Numeric: Double (Swift defaults floating-point literals to Double)
102|53b861|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+\\.\\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\\d+)?$") { return "Double" }
103|71e012|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\\d+)$") { return "Double" }
104|adc83b|
105|69d592|        // Array / Dictionary literals
106|20ec44|        if expr.hasPrefix("[") {
107|ce2ebb|            if let dictType = inferDictionaryType(from: expr) { return dictType }
108|f27fb4|            if let arrayType = inferArrayType(from: expr) { return arrayType }
109|5f3077|        }
110|adc83b|
111|c1c62e|        // Constructor-looking calls: `TypeName(...)` (biased toward UpperCamelCase types)
112|c8a287|        if let typeName = firstRegexGroup(expr, pattern: "^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*\\(") {
113|7cdb04|            return typeName
114|5f3077|        }
115|adc83b|
116|9ff15e|        // Enum/static member: `TypeName.member`
117|7c8b37|        if let typeName = firstRegexGroup(expr, pattern: "^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\.[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$") {
118|7cdb04|            return typeName
119|5f3077|        }
120|adc83b|
121|c2ae65|        return nil
122|27e597|    }

124|ebc532|    private func inferArrayType(from expr: String) -> String? {
125|53c5a0|        let trimmed = expr.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
126|c8c4b9|        guard trimmed.hasPrefix("[") && trimmed.hasSuffix("]") else { return nil }
127|adc83b|
128|81b2b5|        let inner = trimmed.dropFirst().dropLast().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
129|4d16d8|        if inner.isEmpty { return "[Any]" }
130|adc83b|
131|bdbc65|        // Take the first top-level element (naive: split by comma).
132|51ddab|        let firstPart = inner.split(separator: ",", maxSplits: 1, omittingEmptySubsequences: true).first
133|3197f4|        guard let first = firstPart.map(String.init)?.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines), !first.isEmpty else {
134|88e905|            return "[Any]"
135|5f3077|        }
136|adc83b|
137|e844da|        if let elementType = inferSwiftType(from: first) {
138|655e59|            return "[\(elementType)]"
139|5f3077|        }
140|adc83b|
141|77d208|        return "[Any]"
142|27e597|    }
143|adc83b|
144|f7b9b1|    private func inferDictionaryType(from expr: String) -> String? {
145|53c5a0|        let trimmed = expr.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
146|c8c4b9|        guard trimmed.hasPrefix("[") && trimmed.hasSuffix("]") else { return nil }
147|adc83b|
148|85eff8|        // Fast check: dictionary literals must contain `:` somewhere.
149|8a247d|        guard trimmed.contains(":") else { return nil }
150|adc83b|
151|81b2b5|        let inner = trimmed.dropFirst().dropLast().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
152|be74cb|        if inner.isEmpty { return "[AnyHashable: Any]" }
153|adc83b|
154|141281|        // Grab the first `key: value` pair (naive: up to first comma).
155|53580e|        let firstPair = inner.split(separator: ",", maxSplits: 1, omittingEmptySubsequences: true).first.map(String.init) ?? ""
156|2ae14f|        guard let colonIndex = firstPair.firstIndex(of: ":") else { return nil }
157|adc83b|
158|90fe28|        let keyExpr = String(firstPair[..<colonIndex]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
159|c8c196|        let valueExpr = String(firstPair[firstPair.index(after: colonIndex)...]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
160|adc83b|
161|28ea5b|        let keyType = inferSwiftType(from: keyExpr) ?? "AnyHashable"
162|eb3fdd|        let valueType = inferSwiftType(from: valueExpr) ?? "Any"
163|31573c|        return "[\(keyType): \(valueType)]"
164|27e597|    }

178|c60005|        let ns = text as NSString
